subject: He hates Trump more than he cares about you
body:
He works for you, and that's a problem
| | |
---
| | [](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Fsupport-serive-men-and-women%3Futm_campaign=20251103_Reeves_SupportService%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/1/0100019a56787e56-dc11208f-f966-40f1-aed2-59d534b91953-000000/BGsMXiUSHNh5bdNvtTxx7NDUy5A=451)
---
| |
---
| Peter, Mark Warner wants you to think he's the most bipartisan member of Congress. _But nothing could be further from the truth._ He laughed in the face of Americans while casting his vote to keep the government shutdown... A shutdown that has cost the American people an estimated **$7-$14 BILLION** – that will __never__ be recovered. A shutdown that is impacting our servicemen and women, our air traffic controllers, and millions of other vulnerable Americans. We don't think that's funny at all – so we certainly can't imagine why he thought it was appropriate to laugh about it.
---
| | [FIRE MARK WARNER](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Ffire-mark%3Futm_campaign=20251103_Reeves_FireMark%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/1/0100019a56787e56-dc11208f-f966-40f1-aed2-59d534b91953-000000/d43afdWElsGuqR1IpHZTswVoLPM=451)
---
| The reality is, Mark is as far-Left and radical as they come. Because real, bipartisan Democrats voted to reopen the government – __and Mark wasn 't one of them.__ He let his hatred for President Trump and endless pursuit of obstruction cloud his judgment – and the _**American People are paying the price**_**.** Anyone who doesn't have **YOUR** best interest at heart has no business working for you in Washington. **It 's time to ****FIRE****Mark Warner.**
---
| | [FIRE MARK WARNER](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Ffire-mark%3Futm_campaign=20251103_Reeves_FireMark%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/2/0100019a56787e56-dc11208f-f966-40f1-aed2-59d534b91953-000000/gBFQjUThRqoacHySnTGWtIWreOg=451)
---
| As a former Army Ranger, putting duty, honor, and country before self is second nature to Bryce Reeves – and he would be honored to serve you in Washington. He's not one to back down from a fight – and he certainly isn't intimidated by someone like Mark Warner. Now he just needs the cash flow to back it up. [** _Will you make a contribution of $35 or more to help Bryce Reeves DEFEAT Mark Warner, reclaiming this critical U.S. Senate seat for the AMERICAN PEOPLE? >>>_**](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Ffire-mark%3Futm_campaign=20251103_Reeves_FireMark%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/3/0100019a56787e56-dc11208f-f966-40f1-aed2-59d534b91953-000000/H2pGwrVAanTpic6_Q5uuqZb8hz8=451)
---
| | [DONATE $35](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Ffire-mark%3Futm_campaign=20251103_Reeves_FireMark%26utm_id=CE%253Famount%253D35%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/1/0100019a56787e56-dc11208f-f966-40f1-aed2-59d534b91953-000000/M4o6ONmgVBzHGiBltJeZjf1t8bY=451)

| | [DONATE OTHER](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Ffire-mark%3Futm_campaign=20251103_Reeves_FireMark%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/4/0100019a56787e56-dc11208f-f966-40f1-aed2-59d534b91953-000000/93xs4-3vFi1WvKIlFMBArxV-94M=451)

| Thank you, Team Reeves

body:
Sen. Kennedy’s message was nearly buried. You need to see it before it’s too late.

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Every. Race. Won!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Because of you, we just closed out 2025 with a perfect win record.
From the Wisconsin Supreme Court race in April to yesterday’s elections in Virginia, where all 11 of our endorsed candidates for the House of Delegates won – every race we worked to turn out voters ended in victory.
Thanks to your support, Democrats didn’t just win the big, headline races – we flipped local and statewide seats across Pennsylvania, New Jersey, and Virginia, proving that organizing still works and people-powered campaigns can beat the odds.
Together, we helped elect leaders who will fight for working families, protect reproductive rights, and push back against Trump’s destructive agenda from courthouse to statehouse.
Now, as we turn the page to 2026, we’re already gearing up to defend these gains and take back the U.S. House.
Can you chip in now to help us keep winning? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11052025]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11052025]
Every victory we celebrate today started with someone like you – showing up, believing in this work, and powering our movement forward. Let’s do it again in 2026.
-GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11042025]
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

name: Michael Henry
subject: Zohran Mamdani & Letitia James
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF MICHAEL HENRY
body:
As chief legal officer, I assure you: Mamdani’s agenda will end at
my desk.

[https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-michael-henry-5cf1ec8a/d7af6049f158ad6f/?utm_campaign=20251105&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]

Friend, it’s honestly hard to believe...

...A communist and Hamas sympathizer just became Mayor of the largest
city in America.

_Who put Zohran Mamdani in office?THE INDICTED ATTORNEY GENERAL OF NEW
YORK, LETITIA JAMES._

Letitia James embraced Mamdani even when other Democrats were too
scared to go near him with a ten-foot pole.

| | The country has spoken. After a record Republican government shutdown, the public rewarded Donald Trump and the GOP with a resounding backlash. Last night, Democrats retook the Virginia governorship, won the New Jersey governorship handily, saw California pass a historic redistricting measure in response to the Republican effort to gerrymander the House in its favor, won New York City, and even won two seats on a commission in Georgia we have not won in decades. **One message ties all of these races together: Americans are tired of rising costs and tired of Trump ignoring them.** It is time for the GOP to get the message: fix health care, feed hungry families, address rising prices, and reopen the government so workers get paid. On the heels of our successes last night, I am looking ahead: The path we pave in the next 365 days will determine whether we can take back the U.S. House. This work starts now and starts local. **Every conversation, every door knocked, every voter registered will help decide the balance of power in Washington, D.C., and have a direct impact on life here in Northwest Washington.** Today, I am asking for your support. clean_body: Today marks one year until the 2026 midterm elections. | | | | The country has spoken. After a record Republican government shutdown, the public rewarded Donald Trump and the GOP with a resounding backlash. Last night, Democrats retook the Virginia governorship, won the New Jersey governorship handily, saw California pass a historic redistricting measure in response to the Republican effort to gerrymander the House in its favor, won New York City, and even won two seats on a commission in Georgia we have not won in decades. One message ties all of these races together: Americans are tired of rising costs and tired of Trump ignoring them. It is time for the GOP to get the message: fix health care, feed hungry families, address rising prices, and reopen the government so workers get paid. On the heels of our successes last night, I am looking ahead: The path we pave in the next 365 days will determine whether we can take back the U.S. House. This work starts now and starts local. Every conversation, every door knocked, every voter registered will help decide the balance of power in Washington, D.C., and have a direct impact on life here in Northwest Washington. Today, I am asking for your support. = = = Your support now matters. Because in just 365 days, we have the opportunity to take back the House, restore order, and hold Trump accountable for the hurt he has caused Northwest Washington. More soon, Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . name: Lamont Bagby
subject: Heart. Hustle. Hope. Virginia made history.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
We took back the Governor’s Mansion and expanded our majority together.

| **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118741262/580745288/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDFkNzU2YS1hNGJhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qak8qahdV-oVHfBfXQBeCHfnlcv-yaiK_E9mIUVm07A=&emci=b35f48ce-93ba-f011-8e61-00224824e08d&emdi=941d756a-a4ba-f011-8e61-00224824e08d&ceid=31008101)**
---
We know times are tough. If you'd like to pause our fundraising emails during the shutdown, you can fill out******[this form](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118741263/580745302/-2061794949?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDFkNzU2YS1hNGJhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qak8qahdV-oVHfBfXQBeCHfnlcv-yaiK_E9mIUVm07A=&emci=b35f48ce-93ba-f011-8e61-00224824e08d&emdi=941d756a-a4ba-f011-8e61-00224824e08d&ceid=31008101)**. We'll still keep you updated on the fight for Virginia’s future. **Virginia made history last night.** We elected Abigail Spanberger as our next Governor.
We sent Ghazala Hashmi to the Lieutenant Governor’s office.
We elected Jay Jones as Attorney General.
And, proved once again that when Virginians organize, we win. Last night, we didn’t just win. **We reshaped the map.** We flipped at least 13 seats in the House of Delegates, expanding our majority to a decisive 64 seats and delivering one of the most dominating victories Virginia has seen in a generation. We turned a projected five-seat gain into a Democratic landslide that will define this decade. This victory didn’t happen by accident. It happened because of **heart, hustle, and hope.** Because thousands of Democrats across the Commonwealth rolled up their sleeves, knocked doors, made phone calls, and had conversations that brought neighbors together instead of dividing them. You showed up for working families, for educators, for our children, and for communities that have been left behind for too long. You showed up because you believed in a _better Virginia,_ and you made it real. As someone who’s been proud to serve in the General Assembly, I can tell you firsthand what this landmark victory will mean. It means better schools, safer communities, and an economy that actually works for working people. It means protecting our rights, our freedoms, and our future from the chaos, corruption, and cruelty of MAGA extremism. But this is just the beginning. Turning these wins into lasting change starts now. So today, let’s take a moment to celebrate. Tomorrow, we get back to work. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for believing in this movement, and for helping us build a Commonwealth we can all be proud to call home. With gratitude and determination, **Chairman Lamont Bagby**

name: Phil Weiser
subject: About last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Phil Weiser for Colorado
body:
Voters were clear: No unfair advantages.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118741325/580746705/1239926708?refcode=em_WEI_FR_RR_ENight25_110525&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjFiNTZhYS1hNGJhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LSOViDsfJDMI4QeMonPaO5mbHpJSdtIENtmu6nShPCA=&emci=664d2195-9cba-f011-8e61-00224824e08d&emdi=9b1b56aa-a4ba-f011-8e61-00224824e08d&ceid=51844520) Were you following last night’s election? We had major news out of Virginia and New Jersey. We elected — by historic margins — two Governors who will focus on the cost of living, defending our values, and serving with an innovative mindset. **In California, Prop 50 won easily, with almost 64% of voters stepping up for basic fairness — if Texas is going to redraw districts mid-cycle at the behest of the White House, California is going to match that effort and not allow Republicans to gain an unfair advantage. That’s protecting all of us — and taking a stand for basic fairness.** I woke up this morning in brighter spirits, knowing that Americans are demanding a government that _works for them and are taking a stand._ And here in Denver, we both defeated Big Tobacco’s push to allow flavored vaping, and we passed an important Vibrant Denver bond initiative to invest in our city. I’m running to serve as our next Governor because I am ready to lead Colorado, I am committed to standing up against the lawless bullying of this administration, and I will lead the fight for affordable housing, child care, and energy in the cities and counties we all call home. **[Friend, as governor, I’ll always fight for our people and stand up for what's right. clean_body: Voters were clear: No unfair advantages. Were you following last night’s election? We had major news out of Virginia and New Jersey. We elected — by historic margins — two Governors who will focus on the cost of living, defending our values, and serving with an innovative mindset. In California, Prop 50 won easily, with almost 64% of voters stepping up for basic fairness — if Texas is going to redraw districts mid-cycle at the behest of the White House, California is going to match that effort and not allow Republicans to gain an unfair advantage. That’s protecting all of us — and taking a stand for basic fairness. I woke up this morning in brighter spirits, knowing that Americans are demanding a government that works for them and are taking a stand. And here in Denver, we both defeated Big Tobacco’s push to allow flavored vaping, and we passed an important Vibrant Denver bond initiative to invest in our city. I’m running to serve as our next Governor because I am ready to lead Colorado, I am committed to standing up against the lawless bullying of this administration, and I will lead the fight for affordable housing, child care, and energy in the cities and counties we all call home. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Grateful to have you with us, Phil | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. name: Joe Jaworski
subject: The only poll that matters
disclaimer_text: paid for by Joe Jaworski Campaign
body:
Last night's results confirmed what we already knew: the people are with us. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas.com/last-night?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=2d943fb9ea&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | , Last night was the only poll you need to see. Across the country, voters are fed up, and they’re turning against Trump and MAGA. The results confirmed what we already knew: **the people are with us.** Now it’s our duty to do everything we can to win next November, because the people are counting on us. I expect the MAGA power elite will get even crueler. They’ll shout about “woke” this and “transgender” that, stirring fear and hate instead of solving problems. **But bullies only win when we back down, and we will not back down.** When we stand tall, face to face and nose to nose, they blink. They always do. Our job is simple. We must outnumber cruelty with compassion, and we must win the battle of ideas with a clear, strong economic message. Democrats will tell voters how we will deliver real relief, and they will vote for us. Because that’s what government is for: **to make a savage world more gentle.** Cutting Medicaid and SNAP for millions while celebrating like Gatsby is no way to govern. Democrats will provide the remedy our country needs. I’ll be proud to stand with you on the night of **November 3, 2026** , as your Attorney General-elect, when we defeat MAGA cruelty and restore decency to Texas government. [**Will you help me get there by contributing to our movement today?**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=5edd982743&e=5d8d80652b) And here’s my pledge to you:
**I’ll never lie to you.
I can’t be bought, and
I have your back.** Onward,
**Joe Jaworski**

****

Welcome to The Latino Vote Podcast
Don't recognize this sender? [Unsubscribe with one click](https://substack..ekNSDiFgwW9MN44LEMKhvtFfUzVRyWB5xtq5iwqZtYI?)
The Latino Vote Podcast recently imported your email address from another platform to Substack. You'll now receive their posts via email or the [Substack app](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/400cc3f2-a4fe-45c6-bfda-bc4ad34d11d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). To set up your profile and discover more on Substack, [click here](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5db718be-72b6-4129-a98c-7cd8a0eb5d9d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Washington, D.C. might still be shut down, but Democrats are walking tall this week. The 2025 elections were nothing short of a _blue wave_ , and we wanted to share with our Substack subscribers this morning's recording of _The Latino Vote Podcast_ before it officially airs.
### The Anti-Trump Rage Is Real
From Georgia to Virginia, from New Jersey to California -- Democrats didn't just win, they dominated. Local and state races saw historic margins, with even deep-red districts flipping or tightening dramatically. Mike and Chuck unpack why the "off-year" results matter, how Latino voters shaped key outcomes, and the warning signs still ahead for both parties.
> "This was an old-fashioned ass-kicking," Mike says. "The data doesn't lie -- Trumpism took a major hit last night."
Chuck brings his ground-level insight, fresh off months of organizing in New Jersey, where Latino turnout surged in places like Passaic County -- a bellwether for working-class voters frustrated by inflation, insurance premiums, and rising utility costs.
> "Three big villains last night," Chuck adds, "Donald Trump, utility companies, and insurance companies. That's what people are mad about."
### **Key Takeaways**
* **A Democratic Wave:** Democrats won big in states from New Jersey to Georgia, flipping local seats and solidifying power in Virginia.
* **Latino Voters Re-engaged:** Latino turnout returned to 2016 levels, delivering major wins for Democrats -- but not without warning signs for 2026.
* **Affordability Rules Politics:** Rising insurance, rent, and utility costs are now the central political battleground for working-class voters.
* **Trump Fatigue:** Republican turnout collapsed in red precincts as independent and Latino voters used their ballots to "vote with their middle finger."
* **The Strategy Question:** Democrats now face an internal debate -- focus on _turning out_ existing voters, or _persuading_ disaffected working-class ones?

### **Why It Matters**
Mike and Chuck don't sugarcoat it: this election was a turning point, but the lessons could be easily missed. If Democrats mistake anti-Trump energy for renewed loyalty, they risk repeating 2018's complacency. Meanwhile, Republicans face an existential crisis as their base fractures under the weight of Trump's toxicity.
**💬 Join the conversation:**
What did _you_ see in your local elections? Were Latino voters the deciding factor where you live? Drop your thoughts in the comments or on our [X/Twitter page](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/dbffb967-494d-45e5-98f7-41743264bb88?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
The Latino Vote Podcast is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell The Latino Vote Podcast that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments.

name: Team Cooper
subject: New ranking just dropped, Peter
body:
Need you with us more than ever.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=35%2E124072%2EP7kWSI)
Breaking news, Peter! **Today, the _National Journal_ revealed that _North Carolina’s U.S. Senate race — with Democrat Roy Cooper running neck-and-neck against Trump puppet Michael Whatley — is the #1 Senate election in 2026. And Reuters has named it one of their “key Senate races to watch”._** | [DONATE TO ROY NOW](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1907?t=6&akid=35%2E124072%2EP7kWSI)
---
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1907?t=7&akid=35%2E124072%2EP7kWSI)
All eyes are on us.
Extreme Republicans are unleashing hundreds of millions of dollars against Roy. In fact, experts think this could become the first BILLION-dollar U.S. Senate race ever. _And it’s all to cement GOP control in Washington._
**[Peter, if you stand with Roy against the national GOP machine, please rush a contribution right now>>>](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1907?t=8&akid=35%2E124072%2EP7kWSI)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1908?t=9&akid=35%2E124072%2EP7kWSI)
---
[DONATE $10](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1909?t=10&akid=35%2E124072%2EP7kWSI)
---
[DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1910?t=11&akid=35%2E124072%2EP7kWSI)
---
[DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1911?t=12&akid=35%2E124072%2EP7kWSI)
---
[DONATE $100](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1912?t=13&akid=35%2E124072%2EP7kWSI)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1913?t=14&akid=35%2E124072%2EP7kWSI)
---
Thanks so much,
Team Cooper for NC
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=35%2E124072%2EP7kWSI)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=3&akid=35%2E124072%2EP7kWSI)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?t=4&akid=35%2E124072%2EP7kWSI)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=5&akid=35%2E124072%2EP7kWSI)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=35%2E124072%2EP7kWSI)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=15&akid=35%2E124072%2EP7kWSI)

If not, you may miss this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. Your support of me and the MAGA movement has meant the world to me. We have truly been through it all together, this is why... name: Brianna For Colorado
subject: Upcoming Jeffco Food Drive!🥫
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0cd0d373f353/upcoming-jeffco-food-drive?e=8249791cac)
---
| | | | |
---
| | Hi everyone! This isn’t my regular monthly newsletter, but it was important for me to share.
Jefferson County legislators have joined together to host a food drive this weekend. With many feeling the strain of the cost of groceries, cuts to SNAP, and the upcoming holidays, it is now more important than ever that we work together to help our neighbors.
The top needs for this food drive are cereal, peanut butter, canned fruit, canned meat, canned soup, toilet paper, shampoo/conditioner, soap, and deodorant. If you would like to help out or have any questions, you can fill out this [Google Form link](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=759c4f0ac9&e=8249791cac).
If you cannot attend this weekend, consider [donating](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=6742a6d0ca&e=8249791cac) to or [volunteering](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=de706d5ed7&e=8249791cac) for [Food Bank of the Rockies](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=c684695641&e=8249791cac). They are an incredible organization that works year round to feed and support Coloradans. Donating directly to them is the best way to help support their cause, as a[ monetary donation has a bigger impact than an item donation](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=e7b6c0ae44&e=8249791cac).
Thank you everyone for helping Jefferson County be the best county in Colorado!
---
|
---
|
---
| | [**Virtual Office Hours**]()**** 💻
---
| | We have a simple sign-up process to schedule some one-on-one time with Rep. Titone at YOUR convenience, either via Zoom or phone.
[**Sign up here**](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=61c29ab52c&e=8249791cac)**on Calendly!**

|

| **Dear Friend,**
Charlotte is burning, and Governor Josh Stein is doing NOTHING. **Eight murders in seven days.**
* A Ukrainian refugee stabbed to death.
* Repeat felons with over 40 prior arrests.
* That’s the Democrat “justice” system in action.

I just sent an urgent letter with Reps. Harrigan and Edwards demanding Governor Stein **DEPLOY THE NATIONAL GUARD to Charlotte NOW. **But Stein and his radical allies are deaf to the cries of police officers and terrified families. They’d rather coddle criminals than protect YOU. I’m fighting back – but I can’t do it without you.
---
| [ ](https://markharrisforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=82117f51bb8b79bb18d514427&id=e13b8c6464&e=4024c5123e)

| Your gift today will:
* **Amplify our pressure on Stein to stop stalling and activate the Guard.**
* **Defend****the Queen City before one more life is lost. We’ve seen the National Guard CRUSH crime in D.C. and Memphis under President Trump.**

**It works – and Charlotte needs it NOW. I’m not backing down.**
---

Thank you for standing with us,

Mark Harris

name: BREAKING NEWS [VPP]
subject: re: Trump's plan to END vote by mail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Hopefully we’re mistaken...
| | **THIS IS AN AUTOMATED MESSAGE FOR TOP DEMOCRATS**

We’re reaching out to Democrats who have not added their response to our time-sensitive poll about Trump’s plan to BAN mail-in voting.

**This could completely derail our chances for 2026!_While Trump tries to RIG the midterms, we need to know where you stand:_**

[**Please confirm your signature is submitted before the deadline: DO YOU SUPPORT VOTE-BY-MAIL? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20251105_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=6&akid=21737%2E878179%2ESW1BnT) | [YES, WE MUST PROTECT VOTING RIGHTS! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20251105_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=21737%2E878179%2ESW1BnT)
---
[NO, I AGREE WITH TRUMP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20251105_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=21737%2E878179%2ESW1BnT)
**⬇️ READ OUR ORIGINAL MESSAGE BELOW ⬇️**
**PLEASE DON’T LOOK AWAY:**
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20251105_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=21737%2E878179%2ESW1BnT)
→ Donald Trump wants REVENGE on mail-in voting after it handed him a HUGE DEFEAT in 2020.

→ His latest threat is one of the worst attacks on voting rights in HISTORY.

→ **If we don’t show MASSIVE support for vote-by-mail, MILLIONS of Americans risk having their ballots _thrown in the TRASH!!!_**
[**So we need to hear from YOU:
DO YOU SUPPORT VOTE-BY-MAIL?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20251105_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=21737%2E878179%2ESW1BnT) | [YES, WE MUST PROTECT VOTING RIGHTS! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20251105_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=21737%2E878179%2ESW1BnT)
---
[NO, I AGREE WITH TRUMP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20251105_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=12&akid=21737%2E878179%2ESW1BnT)
If we don’t receive 5,000 responses by midnight, our momentum to save vote-by-mail will be lost. **Please respond ASAP!**

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21737%2E878179%2ESW1BnT). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21737%2E878179%2ESW1BnT).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21737%2E878179%2ESW1BnT) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=21737%2E878179%2ESW1BnT). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21737%2E878179%2ESW1BnT)

name: Maggie Toulouse Oliver
subject: Jena Griswold is fighting for democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg-mt?refcode=251105-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg-mt?refcode=251105-email]
Peter,
I’m incredibly lucky to have a champion for democracy like Jena Griswold in my corner.
As Colorado’s Secretary of State, and now a candidate for Attorney General, Jena has led the way in defending free and fair elections, standing up to MAGA extremism, and protecting reproductive freedom. She’s exactly the kind of leader our country needs more of.
Jena and I have fought many of the same battles — and I’m so proud to have her support as I launch my campaign for Lieutenant Governor of New Mexico.
Now we’re asking you to stand with us. Peter, will you split a donation of $25 between Jena and me today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg-mt?refcode=251105-email&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg-mt?refcode=251105-email&amount=10&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg-mt?refcode=251105-email&amount=25&express_lane=true]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg-mt?refcode=251105-email&amount=50&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg-mt?refcode=251105-email&amount=100&express_lane=true]
CONTRIBUTE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg-mt?refcode=251105-email&amount=250&express_lane=true] ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg-mt?refcode=251105-email]
The stakes in this election are high — not just for New Mexico, but for the country. Our values, our democracy, and our basic rights are on the line, and we need proven fighters like Jena Griswold in every corner of government.
I have worked alongside Jena for years. I have seen her courage, her clarity, and her refusal to be intimidated by extremists trying to tear down our institutions.
I know she will bring that same fight and fire to the Attorney General’s office — and I’m proud to stand with her.
Will you split a donation of $25 between Jena Griswold and me right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg-mt?refcode=251105-email&amount=25]
Thanks for being in this fight with us,
Maggie Toulouse Oliver

| Peter, I have HUGE news.

**Our organizing team helped flip the LAST Republican-held seat on the Orlando City Council, electing Democrat Tom Keen — a true champion for working people.**

**[_If you’re ready to help us build on this momentum and deliver even more Democratic wins in 2026, rush a donation to fuel our movement right now >>_](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/Xk_fHCY-KMV7QHeFRhKocw~~/AAPPABA~/R-fS6q5L49SQUwZYMw6my57ivB-e1w6Hv02Ia7VJHRHB7EHx1Mr0Tx6qkcD17gKF_HwiaTwTyAjzOXpe05T09F7ZkoTKjY1e4gqu9G_G-Uzy0-ybOUdrpDI3WvnxJVKcUVRqf1o9jH_whVRZ5OpeRR40vP0hxfaKWU81JXPdxHUoQvuJuPX_M_fyB9A8d8LxdVSjEC5g84z17E3uK1d5XIXT3qx8_97VHNXI4gp0ie_aX1TV2L9bxQMgdHWtsrJUXQCtP1G76L_qOF3M8vx0u4Cf9sPuvs0dtC0wdSQR3gtbs1b8Ne5i36csuqVq6B7eNlyKTX_cRGQzD6ey-ANa9Q~~)**

It’s why we built a year-round organizing team — not just to support my campaign, but support progressive candidates across Florida.

So we’re going to keep fighting and keep organizing, because every single one of these races, up and down the ballot, is worth fighting for. **Florida is worth fighting for.**

**But right now, a lot of donors are giving up on Florida. Well, screw that. I’m not giving up, and I’m counting on YOU to stand with me in this fight.**

name: Voter Action Project Registration Team
subject: Yesterday showed the impact we could have
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We can't stress this enough: For less than the price of a latte at your local coffee shop, you can help cover the costs of registering a new voter.
We have to start now to be ready for next year's midterm elections. RUSH $24 or more today and help us register a tidal wave of new voters nationwide >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=110525_3&amount=24]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Our voter registration work doesn't end, folks.
Despite vote-suppressing state legislatures making it harder to register to vote -- passing bills to stop organizations like ours and our partners on the ground from helping potential voters navigate the increasingly murky rules around voter registration -- we're still pulling out all the stops to bring voters into the system.
Voter registration is a critical part of grassroots efforts to protect voting rights. The more people who vote, the more our government looks like we, the people. But to get to the point where every voice is heard, we need your help .
Just $3 can help us register a new voter. Will you chip in $24 or more today to help register 8 new voters? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=110525_3&amount=24]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=110525_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=110525_3&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=110525_3&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=110525_3&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=110525_3&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=110525_3&amount=36]
Voter participation has been increasing, and young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights -- see the importance of voting now more than ever. Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming key states with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last few years.
The next election will determine whether our democracy stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories we hear every day or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and march forward to a better future.
New voter registration -- at just about $3 per new voter -- can make a huge difference. Please, can you pitch in with $24 or whatever you can to help us register a wave of new voters ahead of this year's registration deadlines? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=110525_3&amount=24]
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Registration Team
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=110525_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=110525_3&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=5ElfkcbI3KBz%2FDAvnRNoecuXAFfoT3xYI%2BbqE20m%2F194baEbQFbgGV6j7%2FAM8otNAFGvEQ%2BJpS7JLKS%2F3Ri7RVNCOf%2BSoCz74ko96OeXItQy%2BFMl5B0utP4bWJ7hTlw7n7dL2EHm91QtUb74Uk5KfSwLkYTf7kQZ9%2FflqU%2BYtgICN3ZtA6%2BX3oGc18zfBqxirW2xous%2FtHmm%2Fn%2FdlUXr2TnMKfUyOoP3eSSM5%2BYUNSaMo%2BaaoOV%2FdcbTC22LrREgKfPTwX0Bu9F0GtlThTEW9TA50ScuzazJy9h2pf9umxdP9%2BRfhDJ6o%2BEulEfyAfoeFYL6yJQnEJO61VDgA7jj9bq07xQEAc9rssMeU0jzI6wrardfEAtZQIDV%2BNPnpBF8EMwJlMFobs54aUjeZPmvoWUtmgztcelBwZ3xYo%2BZ8yw%3D .

subject: (1) Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
You elected me President 1 year ago, today! Please, can you lend me a hand real quick?
| | | |
# **ONE YEAR AGO WE WON!**

---

**Thank you so much for electing me as your 47th President!**
Even though we won last November, it doesn't mean that MAGA can take its foot off the gas and burn out! No, no, no!
Top Democrat Leadership thinks that a Blue Landslide will FINISH MAGA in the midterms, BUT WITH YOUR HELP THAT WON’T HAPPEN.
I know this sounds crazy, but I need your help. Seriously!

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[HELP TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
We’re partners, so I need to know: how am I doing one year into my second term?
You helped me get here, so please be brutally honest - do you have any critiques for me?

[HELP TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
I know you are super busy, but I would really appreciate it if you could complete this quick survey before our anniversary ends!
THANK YOU FOR HELPING ME MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

[TAKE TRUMP SURVEY](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
\- President Donald J. Trump

name: Sara Schreiber, LCV Victory Fund
subject: VICTORY: How Our State Affiliates Helped Elect Clean Energy Champions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LCV Victory Fund,www
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTMxNDA1MjAS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjM0MDA2NTc0MwS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
What a night, Peter! Last night, voters across the country headed to the polls to deliver a clear
message: leaders must put people first and work to lower energy costs, create
high-paying jobs, and protect communities. When the polls closed, in key races, voters OVERWHELMINGLY chose candidates
whose campaigns centered on lowering household costs, including sky-high utility
rates. In Virginia,our state affiliate VALCV-PAC helped usher in a HUGE victory last night, as
Congresswoman Abigail Spanbergerbecame the first woman to be elected as the state’s governor. Spanberger focused
relentlessly on affordability policies that address the cost of data centers,
and committed to building out clean energy projects long stalled by both the
current governor, Glenn Youngkin, and the Trump administration. VALCV-PAC ran the largest canvassing program in the state, knocking on over
200,000 doors. They also sent more than 660,000 pieces of mail, made over 42,000
calls and texts, and launched a series of digital ads that garnered more than
6.3 million views. In New Jersey,where residents face some of the nation’s largest utility rate hikes,
Congresswoman Mikie Sherrill, a former Navy pilot, won the governor’s race by running on an affordability
agenda, which includes a clean energy plan that aims to reduce costs for New
Jerseyans. Our state affiliate New Jersey LCV Victory Fund made the largest investment in its history in support of Governor-elect Sherrill, launching a campaign squarely focused on Jack Ciatarelli’s costly energy policies https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/L6b_sLZa3Dcd/TlhMRXVTTnNKeWkwcyswMlBhUTMvUlRMYnlhTkxpY0FOSVA4OFBFVGhsanJaTnhPSS9ldkxuUzMyNnl4R2hacXBXYzZRcG1xTGh5VUJWajVFSmpjY25jZ3FqZzcySEMyRHcrOVI4a1JkSDA9S0/ and their impact on New Jersey families. In Georgia, voters chose to elect two new clean energy allies, Peter Hubbard and Dr. Alicia Jackson, to the Georgia Public Service Commission, which oversees the state's largest
utility company and sets utility bill rates. Hubbard and Jackson vowed to lower
energy bills and invest in affordable clean energy. These are the first
Democratic statewide wins in Georgia in 20 YEARS. Our state affiliate Georgia Conservation Voters Action Fund invested over $2.2
million in robust voter outreach and communications, making them the single
largest spender in these elections. clean_body: To view this mail in a browser, copy into your browser. What a night, Peter! Last night, voters across the country headed to the polls to deliver a clear message: leaders must put people first and work to lower energy costs, create high-paying jobs, and protect communities. When the polls closed, in key races, voters OVERWHELMINGLY chose candidates whose campaigns centered on lowering household costs, including sky-high utility rates. In Virginia,our state affiliate VALCV-PAC helped usher in a HUGE victory last night, as Congresswoman Abigail Spanbergerbecame the first woman to be elected as the state’s governor. Spanberger focused relentlessly on affordability policies that address the cost of data centers, and committed to building out clean energy projects long stalled by both the current governor, Glenn Youngkin, and the Trump administration. VALCV-PAC ran the largest canvassing program in the state, knocking on over 200,000 doors. They also sent more than 660,000 pieces of mail, made over 42,000 calls and texts, and launched a series of digital ads that garnered more than 6.3 million views. In New Jersey,where residents face some of the nation’s largest utility rate hikes, Congresswoman Mikie Sherrill, a former Navy pilot, won the governor’s race by running on an affordability agenda, which includes a clean energy plan that aims to reduce costs for New Jerseyans. Our state affiliate New Jersey LCV Victory Fund made the largest investment in its history in support of Governor-elect Sherrill, launching a campaign squarely focused on Jack Ciatarelli’s costly energy policies and their impact on New Jersey families. In Georgia, voters chose to elect two new clean energy allies, Peter Hubbard and Dr. Alicia Jackson, to the Georgia Public Service Commission, which oversees the state's largest utility company and sets utility bill rates. Hubbard and Jackson vowed to lower energy bills and invest in affordable clean energy. These are the first Democratic statewide wins in Georgia in 20 YEARS. Our state affiliate Georgia Conservation Voters Action Fund invested over $2.2 million in robust voter outreach and communications, making them the single largest spender in these elections. They launched a creative, surround-sound campaign that centered on Georgians’ affordability concerns . These victories are a clear demonstration that our movement’s multimillion-dollar efforts to be responsive to voters' concerns around their energy bills is a winning strategy. Thanks to your continued support of our movement, our state affiliates were able to help elect leaders who will champion policies that lower energy costs, create good-paying clean energy jobs, and reduce pollution. This is a day to celebrate, Peter, but it’s just the beginning. We need to take this momentum into 2026 and ensure we elect more climate champions to fight back against Trump’s corrupt pro-polluter regime. If you can, chip in and help LCV Victory Fund defeat polluter-backed politicians. Make a gift today and stand up against Trump’s corrupt agenda now. Thanks for everything you do. name: KAREN CRNKOVICH FOR JOHNSON COUNTY COMMISSION
subject: 2026 starts now, and we’re ready to win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAREN CRNKOVICH FOR JOHNSON COUNTY COMMISSION * 6709 West 119th Street * Ste
body:
Knocked down, not out — Johnson County deserves better.

| | | | | [|
---](https://kcforjoco.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d540da3225ec5b2797f3018d2&id=518cea8074&e=7320325a61)
| | | | [|
---](https://kcforjoco.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d540da3225ec5b2797f3018d2&id=fa43409555&e=7320325a61)
| | | | | | | | | | | |
Dear Peter,Yesterday was tough. The results didn’t go our way, and candidates across Johnson County who share our values and vision came up short. That loss stings. We gave it our all ... our time, energy, and resources. I’m deeply grateful to every candidate who ran and to each of you who assisted in this fight.But hear me clearly: **we are not defeated.** Because this movement was never about one race or one night. It’s about the future of Johnson County, and that fight continues **today.** The 2026 midterm campaign starts now. If we want to stop Mike Kelly and his reckless spending, his runaway $1.9 billion budget, and his harmful policies, then we must **organize, fundraise, and engage voters like never before.** If we don’t act now, we lose more than an election. We lose the chance to **cut property taxes, strengthen infrastructure, and restore accountability** to county government. Every one of those goals depends on what we do in this moment.
---
| [Donate Now!](https://kcforjoco.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d540da3225ec5b2797f3018d2&id=ad8996bed2&e=7320325a61)
---
| |
We know what we’re up against. Mike Kelly and his allies at Amber Wave poured tens of thousands of dollars into local races, drowning out the voices of everyday Johnson Countians. To win in 2026, we must match their resources and outwork them every single day.Every dollar you give helps rebuild our local network, reach new voters, and make sure our message of **fiscal responsibility, respect, and common-sense leadership** is heard loud and clear.We may have been knocked down, but we are far from out. When we come together ... driven, determined, and united, we will rebuild stronger, fight smarter, and win back Johnson County.Let’s rise together,
**Karen Crnkovich
** Candidate for Johnson County Commission Chair

---
| |

---
| | | | | | | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/8e1eac221c34/your-role-matters-lets-win-in-2026-reply-by-17593506?e=7320325a61)

# [Update on Zahid: A Veteran's Ordeal, a Nation's Test of Integrity](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=178137384&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4MTM3Mzg0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjIzOTIyMDEsImV4cCI6MTc2NDk4NDIwMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.VXTvy7FeDd0ha_T3d6l8ViAwXkk9D-qgE4gJaxaUUD0)
### When the System Fails a Loyal, Capable Defender of This Country
| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---
| Nov 6
---
| [](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=178137384&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4MTM3Mzg0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MjM5MjIwMSwiZXhwIjoxNzY0OTg0MjAxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzI2MDExMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dsIgxVKNc-hLdjNRAvIiEb75ViyuA93MEaioeJW9wBk&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=178137384&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4MTM3Mzg0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjIzOTIyMDEsImV4cCI6MTc2NDk4NDIwMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.VXTvy7FeDd0ha_T3d6l8ViAwXkk9D-qgE4gJaxaUUD0&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=178137384&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4MTM3Mzg0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjIzOTIyMDEsImV4cCI6MTc2NDk4NDIwMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.VXTvy7FeDd0ha_T3d6l8ViAwXkk9D-qgE4gJaxaUUD0)
---
| | [](https://substack..BfH3uywt8KnPUliuQ3Mrslgb_-8OaL-yfuenDzRYABg?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/melissa4congress/p/update-on-zahid-a-veterans-ordeal?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Dear friends and supporters,
I write today with a heavy heart--but also with clarity and conviction--to update you on the case of my husband Zahid, an honorable, capable, peaceful, and law-abiding man who has dedicated himself to this country - yet finds himself detained under circumstances that should alarm every patriotic American.
## What's Happened
1. Zahid's petition for a _new bond hearing_ (under the rules set forth in Rodriguez-Vasquez v. Bostock, which say that long term residents are entitled to bond hearings based only on "flight risk" and "danger to the community) -- was **rejected** by Immigration Judge T. Scala. The basis given: "no jurisdiction" because of a purported "final order of removal" from 2008.
* That 2008 order is stale, outdated, was pretextual even at the time, and has been actively litigated for the past 17 years.
* Yet the IJ is accepting it as "final" and therefore asserting that Zahid cannot obtain a new bond hearing, even under the new rules.
2. Even more troubling: The IJ told the Board of Immigration Appeals (BIA) above her head that Zahid's bond appeal on the original "no jurisdiction" finding was **filed out of time**.
* In fact, Zahid filed **within** the required 30-day window.
* The BIA originally rejected his appeal because it demanded a fee of **$1,010** -- but according to their own regulations, the bond appeal **should be free**.
* Zahid hand‐wrote a five‐page submission citing those regulations, re‐filed it, and the appeal was accepted.
* Yet the IJ just inserted a memo in that accepted appeal claiming that he "filed out of time"--when the only reason the filing window was compromised was the BIA's _own_ wrongful rejection.
3. Today, Zahid approached the Federal Public Defender for the Western District of Washington (Seattle FPD office) for help with a habeas petition - which would seek his release from wrongful detention, but not address the underlying legal issues. They told him: "Sorry, we can't help--you don't have a final order of removal."
* Zahid replied: "But just yesterday, this memo from the IJ says I **do**."
* Their response: "She's wrong about that. We only assist after you receive a negative Ninth Circuit decision _and then_ six more months of detention. Until that, we can't represent you."
4. Meanwhile, at the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Ninth Circuit: Our Motion to Expedite Decision **has been granted** , but that doesn't result in an immediate ruling. Zahid's case is calendared for **January** --two full months away. And, even that timeframe may be compromised, because of the government shutdown - the US Attorneys are currently not working, and since the government is a party to this case, it may not be heard on time even then. Or - the Court Clerk didn't say this, but it's a reasonable extrapolation... - at all.
5. **All of this is happening to a man who came to this country** **legally** , fully documented, on visitor visas, never overstayed, never broke U.S. law, served his country in uniform, is a disabled veteran with dependents, is an absolute pillar of his communities, volunteered as a firefighter and paramedic, worked on affordable housing and suicide prevention and ecological repair, and has 25+ years of deep, documented ties to this country.

## Why This Matters--To the Right‐of‐Centre Patriot
Let me take a moment and address Zahid's brothers-in-arms, and the military and intelligence leadership and workforce who is tasked with sustaining excellence, strengthening America, and keeping our country safe. **This is not a story of open ‐borders cheerleaders**. This isn't about someone who crossed the border a month ago with no documents, no skills, and no English - although even those people, once they serve in uniform, routinely become citizens.
This is a story of what happens when the system designed to protect national security, honour service, and uphold rule of law turns on one of its best. If you believe in a strong America--one that defends its flag, honours its veterans, respects lawful immigration, demands accountability of its courts and agencies--then you must see how Zahid's case is a warning sign.
### National security & readiness
* A veteran with training and loyalty who is treated as a security threat instead of a potential asset sends a message to others in uniform: your service may still leave you vulnerable.
* When detainment is timed and manipulated not by threat‐risk analysis but by administrative snafus and apparent bias, our detention‐system becomes less about protecting America and more about bureaucratic power.
* An adversarial, opaque process undermines morale in the ranks--both military and immigrant‐serving--and weakens trust in the system.

### Rule of law & fairness
* The claim of a "final order" (from 2008) being used to thwart a timely bond appeal raises serious due‐process questions.
* When filings are rejected for improper fees, deadlines shift unfairly, and then the system uses those shifts to deny jurisdiction, you're no longer dealing with adjudication--you're dealing with administrative sanction.
* Every patriotic American who values fairness and equal protection should be troubled by the optics: this is a highly capable, fully documented, law‐abiding man being squeezed by the machinery of removal rather than evaluated on his merits.
* If the system treats Zahid this way--veteran, contributor, stable--how many others who are more vulnerable will be treated worse?

### Legacy of our nation
* The America we want our children to live in honours service, integrity, and just governance. When someone who embodies those values is sidelined, we chip away at that legacy.
* This is not just about one man. It's about whether our immigration enforcement system is aligned with the national interests of talent‐retention, loyalty‐recognition, and security.
* If we treat loyal contributors as liabilities, we weaken our own position on immigration: the message becomes "serve, abide by the rules, and still you'll be tossed aside." That undermines recruitment, trust, and our future as a nation of strength.

## Zahid's Story: America's Test
Zahid came here **legally** , fully documented, on legitimate visas he never overstayed. He built a life here with integrity and purpose, serving in uniform, raising a family, and becoming part of the civic fabric of this nation. Our children are growing up with the knowledge that their father wore this country's flag on his shoulder and now suffers for the very ideals he once defended.
His story is not abstract--it's the story of a man who did everything right, played by every rule, and still found himself trapped in a system more interested in preserving its own power than honoring service and truth. During his years in training, Zahid watched others become citizens with ease while he and a handful of Muslim soldiers were passed over again and again. He remembers the sting of being told by a colonel to "get out of my office" when his first name was revealed--a moment that still echoes across decades, through our children's bedtime questions about why their Baba isn't home.
Like Bhagat Singh Thind, the honorable Punjabi veteran a century ago who was denied citizenship for not being "white," Zahid now stands in that long, painful American tradition--proof that discrimination changes its language, not its logic. But this time, the next generation is watching. Our kids deserve to grow up in an America that keeps its promises to those who serve it, not one that breaks families apart and calls it justice.
## What We Are Doing
We're filing the habeas petition in person on Monday - on our own - determined to pay whatever fee or cost it takes to bring Zahid's case before a federal judge. Alongside it, we may file an emergency restraining order to preserve the record and prevent further harm while the courts deliberate.
Every line, every filing, every affidavit matters now. We're documenting each procedural mistake, each delay, each instance of bias that has compounded into this injustice. The Western District Court will see the full pattern--the moments where law and fairness were set aside in favor of convenience and prejudice.
We'll continue pressing forward with the Ninth Circuit appeal, where we will show that the claim of U.S. citizenship the government keeps raising has already been litigated and dismissed, and that the forensic expert confirmed Zahid wasn't the maker of the disputed mark. And we'll make clear what the record already shows: that by the end of basic training, every soldier around him was naturalized except the Muslim ones. This is not conjecture--it's history, and it's written in the files.
The cruelty here isn't random. It's a method, a slow erosion of justice through bureaucracy. But we are matching that precision with persistence--and love. We're building the record, line by line, not just for a court, but for our children, so they will see that when their father was tested, we met the test with courage and truth.
## What We Ask From You
* **Stay engaged, and subscribe:** We will update you as the case proceeds.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tZWxpc3NhNGNvbmdyZXNzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.yJndGFdeKRApMRxPPGklwuyg1NRVprmf48y48aOGT_I?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=178137384)
* **Share this story:** This isn't just Zahid's story--it's the story of how America treats those who raise their hand, serve, abide by the law and yet get cast aside.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=178137384&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4MTM3Mzg0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjIzOTIyMDEsImV4cCI6MTc2NDk4NDIwMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.VXTvy7FeDd0ha_T3d6l8ViAwXkk9D-qgE4gJaxaUUD0)
* **Send messages of support** : Morale matters. For Zahid, for his family, for every veteran, for every immigrant who still believes in this country.
[Message Melissa Chaudhry](https://open.substack.com/chat/dm/user/240671627-melissa-chaudhry)
* **Consider supporting our mounting costs** : Filing habeas, TRO, appeals--these are expensive, time‐intensive. If you are able, your support helps ensure we fight this with full force.
[Help us keep going](https://substack.com/redirect/7a60b0e6-f6ec-419c-b038-93c4e1bcbca4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Raise the standard:** Help shift the narrative among conservative, national‐security‐minded audiences: This is not "open borders" rhetoric--this is faith in American values: legality, loyalty, fairness, national strength.

* * *
In closing: We are not asking for charity. We are appealing to principle. We are appealing to the fundamental idea that if America is going to credibly demand sacrifice from its people, it must reciprocate with justice. If America is going to say "we recruit you, we train you, you'll fight for us", then it must _also_ say "we value you, we protect you, we will ensure your rights." Anything less diminishes the very cause.
We will not stop until the record is full, the truth is laid bare, and a verdict of justice is delivered.
Thank you for standing with us.
In integrity and courage,
Melissa Chaudhry
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c8ef98ef-2089-4954-afcc-d3aa79ae7cac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Corporal Muhammad Zahid Chaudhry, c. 2003, before his injuries.

clean_body: When the System Fails a Loyal, Capable Defender of This Country | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? When the System Fails a Loyal, Capable Defender of This Country | | | Nov 6 | | | | | | | | | | | | Dear friends and supporters, I write today with a heavy heart--but also with clarity and conviction--to update you on the case of my husband Zahid, an honorable, capable, peaceful, and law-abiding man who has dedicated himself to this country - yet finds himself detained under circumstances that should alarm every patriotic American. What's Happened 1. Zahid's petition for a new bond hearing (under the rules set forth in Rodriguez-Vasquez v. Bostock, which say that long term residents are entitled to bond hearings based only on "flight risk" and "danger to the community) -- was rejected by Immigration Judge T. Scala. The basis given: "no jurisdiction" because of a purported "final order of removal" from 2008. That 2008 order is stale, outdated, was pretextual even at the time, and has been actively litigated for the past 17 years. Yet the IJ is accepting it as "final" and therefore asserting that Zahid cannot obtain a new bond hearing, even under the new rules. 2. Even more troubling: The IJ told the Board of Immigration Appeals (BIA) above her head that Zahid's bond appeal on the original "no jurisdiction" finding was filed out of time. In fact, Zahid filed within the required 30-day window. The BIA originally rejected his appeal because it demanded a fee of $1,010 -- but according to their own regulations, the bond appeal should be free. Zahid hand‐wrote a five‐page submission citing those regulations, re‐filed it, and the appeal was accepted. Yet the IJ just inserted a memo in that accepted appeal claiming that he "filed out of time"--when the only reason the filing window was compromised was the BIA's own wrongful rejection. 3. Today, Zahid approached the Federal Public Defender for the Western District of Washington (Seattle FPD office) for help with a habeas petition - which would seek his release from wrongful detention, but not address the underlying legal issues. They told him: "Sorry, we can't help--you don't have a final order of removal." Zahid replied: "But just yesterday, this memo from the IJ says I do." Their response: "She's wrong about that. We only assist after you receive a negative Ninth Circuit decision and then six more months of detention. Until that, we can't represent you." 4. Meanwhile, at the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Ninth Circuit: Our Motion to Expedite Decision has been granted , but that doesn't result in an immediate ruling. Zahid's case is calendared for January --two full months away. And, even that timeframe may be compromised, because of the government shutdown - the US Attorneys are currently not working, and since the government is a party to this case, it may not be heard on time even then. Or - the Court Clerk didn't say this, but it's a reasonable extrapolation... - at all. 5. All of this is happening to a man who came to this country legally , fully documented, on visitor visas, never overstayed, never broke U.S. law, served his country in uniform, is a disabled veteran with dependents, is an absolute pillar of his communities, volunteered as a firefighter and paramedic, worked on affordable housing and suicide prevention and ecological repair, and has 25+ years of deep, documented ties to this country. Why This Matters--To the Right‐of‐Centre Patriot Let me take a moment and address Zahid's brothers-in-arms, and the military and intelligence leadership and workforce who is tasked with sustaining excellence, strengthening America, and keeping our country safe. This is not a story of open ‐borders cheerleaders. This isn't about someone who crossed the border a month ago with no documents, no skills, and no English - although even those people, once they serve in uniform, routinely become citizens. This is a story of what happens when the system designed to protect national security, honour service, and uphold rule of law turns on one of its best. If you believe in a strong America--one that defends its flag, honours its veterans, respects lawful immigration, demands accountability of its courts and agencies--then you must see how Zahid's case is a warning sign. National security & readiness A veteran with training and loyalty who is treated as a security threat instead of a potential asset sends a message to others in uniform: your service may still leave you vulnerable. When detainment is timed and manipulated not by threat‐risk analysis but by administrative snafus and apparent bias, our detention‐system becomes less about protecting America and more about bureaucratic power. An adversarial, opaque process undermines morale in the ranks--both military and immigrant‐serving--and weakens trust in the system. Rule of law & fairness The claim of a "final order" (from 2008) being used to thwart a timely bond appeal raises serious due‐process questions. When filings are rejected for improper fees, deadlines shift unfairly, and then the system uses those shifts to deny jurisdiction, you're no longer dealing with adjudication--you're dealing with administrative sanction. Every patriotic American who values fairness and equal protection should be troubled by the optics: this is a highly capable, fully documented, law‐abiding man being squeezed by the machinery of removal rather than evaluated on his merits. If the system treats Zahid this way--veteran, contributor, stable--how many others who are more vulnerable will be treated worse? Legacy of our nation The America we want our children to live in honours service, integrity, and just governance. When someone who embodies those values is sidelined, we chip away at that legacy. This is not just about one man. It's about whether our immigration enforcement system is aligned with the national interests of talent‐retention, loyalty‐recognition, and security. If we treat loyal contributors as liabilities, we weaken our own position on immigration: the message becomes "serve, abide by the rules, and still you'll be tossed aside." That undermines recruitment, trust, and our future as a nation of strength. Zahid's Story: America's Test Zahid came here legally , fully documented, on legitimate visas he never overstayed. He built a life here with integrity and purpose, serving in uniform, raising a family, and becoming part of the civic fabric of this nation. Our children are growing up with the knowledge that their father wore this country's flag on his shoulder and now suffers for the very ideals he once defended. His story is not abstract--it's the story of a man who did everything right, played by every rule, and still found himself trapped in a system more interested in preserving its own power than honoring service and truth. During his years in training, Zahid watched others become citizens with ease while he and a handful of Muslim soldiers were passed over again and again. He remembers the sting of being told by a colonel to "get out of my office" when his first name was revealed--a moment that still echoes across decades, through our children's bedtime questions about why their Baba isn't home. Like Bhagat Singh Thind, the honorable Punjabi veteran a century ago who was denied citizenship for not being "white," Zahid now stands in that long, painful American tradition--proof that discrimination changes its language, not its logic. But this time, the next generation is watching. Our kids deserve to grow up in an America that keeps its promises to those who serve it, not one that breaks families apart and calls it justice. What We Are Doing We're filing the habeas petition in person on Monday - on our own - determined to pay whatever fee or cost it takes to bring Zahid's case before a federal judge. Alongside it, we may file an emergency restraining order to preserve the record and prevent further harm while the courts deliberate. Every line, every filing, every affidavit matters now. We're documenting each procedural mistake, each delay, each instance of bias that has compounded into this injustice. The Western District Court will see the full pattern--the moments where law and fairness were set aside in favor of convenience and prejudice. We'll continue pressing forward with the Ninth Circuit appeal, where we will show that the claim of U.S. citizenship the government keeps raising has already been litigated and dismissed, and that the forensic expert confirmed Zahid wasn't the maker of the disputed mark. And we'll make clear what the record already shows: that by the end of basic training, every soldier around him was naturalized except the Muslim ones. This is not conjecture--it's history, and it's written in the files. The cruelty here isn't random. It's a method, a slow erosion of justice through bureaucracy. But we are matching that precision with persistence--and love. We're building the record, line by line, not just for a court, but for our children, so they will see that when their father was tested, we met the test with courage and truth. What We Ask From You Stay engaged, and subscribe: We will update you as the case proceeds. Share this story: This isn't just Zahid's story--it's the story of how America treats those who raise their hand, serve, abide by the law and yet get cast aside. Send messages of support : Morale matters. For Zahid, for his family, for every veteran, for every immigrant who still believes in this country. Consider supporting our mounting costs : Filing habeas, TRO, appeals--these are expensive, time‐intensive. If you are able, your support helps ensure we fight this with full force. Raise the standard: Help shift the narrative among conservative, national‐security‐minded audiences: This is not "open borders" rhetoric--this is faith in American values: legality, loyalty, fairness, national strength. In closing: We are not asking for charity. We are appealing to principle. We are appealing to the fundamental idea that if America is going to credibly demand sacrifice from its people, it must reciprocate with justice. If America is going to say "we recruit you, we train you, you'll fight for us", then it must also say "we value you, we protect you, we will ensure your rights." Anything less diminishes the very cause. We will not stop until the record is full, the truth is laid bare, and a verdict of justice is delivered. Thank you for standing with us. In integrity and courage, Melissa Chaudhry | | ---|---|--- Corporal Muhammad Zahid Chaudhry, c. 2003, before his injuries. clean_body: RED! Our records show that your 2025 State Republican State Leadership Membership remains inactive, and we're on the cusp of a catastrophe. The Radical Left is jumping at this opportunity. Our team is working tirelessly to defend our nation from the spread of socialism in the states, but we need your help to put a stop to it once and for all. We can't stress enough the gravity of this situation. | REPUBLICAN STATE LEADERSHIP MEMBERSHIP NOTICE ACCOUNT HOLDER: 2024 MEMBERSHIP: LAPSED 2025 MEMBERSHIP ENROLLMENT: PENDING You have 24 hours to reactivate your membership for 2025 and send a resounding message to the Radical Left. Your membership card is more than just a symbol of your patriotism - it's a powerful tool in our fight for the future of our nation. Don't let it lapse. Sincerely, Republican State Leadership Membership Services * By providing your mobile phone number, you are consenting to receive calls and texts and P2P messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from RSLC and its affiliated PACs.
