name: Texas Organizing Project
subject: Solidarity is the heartbeat of our organizing / La solidaridad es el motor de nuestra organización ✊🏿 ✊🏾 ✊🏽 ✊🏼
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/PNG%202023%20TOP%20Newsletter%20Header.png]
Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español]
GOV. SHUTDOWN:
A record-breaking tragedy
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Food%20stamps%20save%20lives.jpg]
This Trump government shutdown – now in its 36th day – is officially the longest in U.S. history.
The president's refusal to fund federal food assistance during his government shutdown is an immoral disaster. Forty-two million people in our country are now facing food insecurity because of his recklessness.
Even after a federal judge ruled that SNAP funds must be disbursed, Trump threatened to deny food stamp payments to recipients until the government shutdown ended [https://www.reuters.com/world/us/trump-snap-benefits-begin-only-when-us-government-opens-2025-11-04/] ( which he's not serious about ending).
In Texas alone, 3.5 million people — including 1.7 million children — rely on SNAP each month. This is a humanitarian crisis in the making, as working-class families across our state are fighting to put food on the table. Every person who calls this country home — regardless of age, race, background, or income level — deserves basic food security.
https://www.facebook.com/story.php?story_fbid=1759263088178864&id=100022855680704&mibextid=wwXIfr&rdid=kgMbBzyG3dDi9HSq [https://www.facebook.com/story.php?story_fbid=1759263088178864&id=100022855680704&mibextid=wwXIfr&rdid=kgMbBzyG3dDi9HSq]
THIS FRIDAY:
Join TOP's Dallas team for dinner and a community visioning session
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/02%20-%20Share%20your%20vision%20for%20Texas%20-%20English%20graphic.png]
Join TOP for a FREE DINNER this Friday, Nov. 7 in Dallas, where we'll brainstorm goals and the future we can build together to lift up our communities, so ALL Texans have the freedom to thrive — no matter our age, race, gender, faith, or income.
This visioning session is open to the community, so bring your friends and family!
Contact Laquita ( lgarcia@organizetexas.org [lgarcia@organizetexas.org] ) or Iman ( ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] ) for more event details and to RSVP.
LAST CALL:
Tell Gov. Abbott to provide flood survivors with long-term relief
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Fund%20Texas%20Forever.png]
THERE'S STILL TIME: With catastrophic flooding in Central Texas this summer, we saw for ourselves how emergency preparedness and access to recovery resources go hand in hand.
It's unacceptable that after this disaster, survivors across Texas were asked to raise their own property taxes to pay for recovery and relief – even though Gov. Abbott has repeatedly used his executive authority to set aside surplus funding for emergencies in the past.
Along with our allies at Fund Texas Forever, we're calling on Abbott to establish a $500 million Texas Forever Fund to support disaster-impacted Texans with immediate relief and individual assistance, public infrastructure and safety for local communities, and to get people back into their homes.
https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-ftf-petition/?source=email_1025TOP [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-ftf-petition/?source=email_1025TOP]
TOP Tip: Adjust easier after Daylight Saving Time
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Smaller%20-%20Sleepy%20woman%20alarm%20clock.jpg]
You're not alone. Daylight Saving Time throws millions of people off their game every spring and fall. It sometimes takes days (even a week or two) for us to settle into the time change. See how you can help your mind and body adjust. [https://www.cnn.com/2025/11/03/health/sleep-daylight-saving-change-melatonin-wellness]
Español
CIERRE DEL GOBIERNO:
Una tragedia sin precedentes
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Food%20stamps%20save%20lives.jpg]
Este cierre del gobierno de Trump, que ya lleva 36 días, es oficialmente el más largo en la historia de Estados Unidos.
La negativa del presidente a financiar la asistencia alimentaria federal durante este cierre gubernamental es un desastre inmoral. Cuarenta y dos millones de personas en nuestro país ahora se enfrentan con la inseguridad alimentaria debido a su imprudencia.
Incluso después de que un juez federal determinará que los fondos del programa SNAP debían ser desembolsados, Trump amenazó con negar los pagos de cupones de alimentos a los beneficiarios hasta que terminara el cierre del gobierno [https://www.reuters.com/world/us/trump-snap-benefits-begin-only-when-us-government-opens-2025-11-04/] (algo que no parece tener intención de hacer).
Solo en Texas, 3.5 millones de personas, incluyendo 1.7 millones de niños, dependen del programa SNAP cada mes. Esta es una crisis humanitaria en desarrollo, ya que las familias trabajadoras de todo nuestro estado luchan por llevar comida a la mesa. Toda persona que llama a este país su casa, independientemente de su edad, raza, origen o nivel de ingresos, merece tener seguridad alimentaria básica.
https://www.facebook.com/story.php?story_fbid=1759263088178864&id=100022855680704&mibextid=wwXIfr&rdid=XBmAnH53Px0ove5i [https://www.facebook.com/story.php?story_fbid=1759263088178864&id=100022855680704&mibextid=wwXIfr&rdid=XBmAnH53Px0ove5i]
ESTE VIERNES:
Únase al equipo de TOP en Dallas para una cena y una sesión para definir la visión de la comunidad
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/02%20-%20Share%20your%20vision%20for%20Texas%20-%20English%20graphic.png]
Únase a TOP para una CENA GRATUITA este viernes 7 de noviembre en Dallas , donde compartiremos ideas sobre nuestros objetivos y el futuro que podemos construir juntos para fortalecer nuestras comunidades, para que TODOS los texanos tengan la libertad de prosperar, sin importar nuestra edad, raza, género, religión o ingresos.
Esta sesión de planificación está abierta a toda la comunidad, ¡así que trae a tus amigos y familiares!
Para obtener más detalles sobre el evento y confirmar tu asistencia, comunícate con Laquita ( lgarcia@organizetexas.org [lgarcia@organizetexas.org] ) o Iman ( ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] ).
ÚLTIMO AVISO:
Pídale al gobernador Abbott que proporcione ayuda a largo plazo a los afectados por las inundaciones
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Fund%20Texas%20Forever.png]
AÚN ESTAMOS A TIEMPO: Con las catastróficas inundaciones en el centro de Texas este verano, vimos de primera mano cómo la preparación ante emergencias y el acceso a recursos de recuperación van de la mano.
Es inaceptable que, tras este desastre, se les pidiera a los afectados en todo Texas que aumentaran sus propios impuestos a la propiedad para financiar la recuperación y la ayuda, a pesar de que el gobernador Abbott ha utilizado repetidamente su autoridad ejecutiva para destinar fondos excedentes a emergencias en el pasado.
Junto con nuestros aliados de Fund Texas Forever, hacemos un llamado al gobernador Abbott para que establezca un Fondo Texas Forever de 500 millones de dólares para apoyar a los texanos afectados por el desastre con ayuda inmediata y asistencia individual, infraestructura pública y seguridad para las comunidades locales, y para que las personas puedan regresar a sus hogares.
https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-ftf-petition/?source=email_1025TOP [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-ftf-petition/?source=email_1025TOP]
Consejos de TOP: Adaptarse más fácilmente después del cambio al horarío de verano
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Smaller%20-%20Sleepy%20woman%20alarm%20clock.jpg]
No estás solo. El cambio al horario de verano desajusta a millones de personas cada primavera y otoño. A veces tardamos días (incluso una o dos semanas) en adaptarnos al cambio de hora. Descubre cómo puedes ayudar a tu mente y a tu cuerpo a ajustarse. [https://www.cnn.com/2025/11/03/health/sleep-daylight-saving-change-melatonin-wellness]

Texas Organizing Project
700 S. Zarzamora, Suite 212
San Antonio, TX 78207
United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=y28IqsU3uKBRimMEHFTSUl1OE8mg6LdddUVUQFdzB6G3VZR%2BwOQkJZK%2BVtDzIC4gwavLV1Y1ir5e9EHt3PHQhWQKHhDLwm1Z6dmYeNQmMVbQM%2BwSaRHRQGBHJ8Zh67sBDzQGEnqUZ1NlP2tJR%2FEcv5SIgAI0KnteikLplNwO68oBgAxg4km7UGqwYYich3fPoECSOQTVWwYNQiOISmSu50MNLdY8npyAjjY75cZOK6%2BomaMVq1Cc9dxAv7m8zVFTgdpyE88nA95ZeWXa7YZC8psCOJshRUXLK4ksBlH3qJBLA32lmsGBRXSJF%2F9Rc14h1E3LyBHF8b%2FkE3nEYO9HCa%2BT7couQQuG7fuNQhrWX0HzYtCqbisTkR23%2FZVIBAQ7KObKiu0TYiiBrkzfoB9E83XjDKDlHhHHUgfMJwiGahc%3D .

name: James Talarico
subject: Issue survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter --
We’re building a campaign of, by, and for the people.
A big part of that is focusing on the issues that our communities care about most.
We’re not outsourcing our policy agenda to DC think tanks or lobbyists.
As a state lawmaker, my biggest policy victories — from capping insulin costs, to funding our public schools, to bringing down the cost of housing and rent -- were rooted in my own experiences and the experiences of my neighbors.
So as we begin to shape our policy agenda, I want to get your input and hear your ideas.
[**Can you take two minutes to complete our issue survey to share your priorities with us? It’s important to me that we hear from as many people as possible.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/issues-survey-oct25?source=em251105-1-ak&refcode2=192.1347274.a-WXoV&t=1&akid=192%2E1347274%2Ea-WXoV)
[ TAKE OUR SURVEY ](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/issues-survey-oct25?source=em251105-1-ak&refcode2=192.1347274.a-WXoV&t=2&akid=192%2E1347274%2Ea-WXoV)
I’m going everywhere and having conversations with anyone willing to have a dialogue about what our families and communities need.
But even if you can’t make it to one of our events, I want to make sure you have a voice in this campaign.
[**If you have two minutes, take our issues survey today to make your voice heard. My team and I will review the results soon.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/issues-survey-oct25?source=em251105-1-ak&refcode2=192.1347274.a-WXoV&t=3&akid=192%2E1347274%2Ea-WXoV)
[ TAKE OUR SURVEY ](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/issues-survey-oct25?source=em251105-1-ak&refcode2=192.1347274.a-WXoV&t=4&akid=192%2E1347274%2Ea-WXoV)
James

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update your contact information, [**you can submit this form.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/update-info/?t=5&akid=192%2E1347274%2Ea-WXoV) Looking for Team Talarico merch? [**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. [**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=6&refcode2=192_1347274_a-WXoV&akid=192%2E1347274%2Ea-WXoV)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=7&akid=192%2E1347274%2Ea-WXoV).

| | Hi Peter,

**We’re less than one year out from Election Day, and I wanted to check in.**

Michigan deserves a governor with a positive vision, real solutions, and a leader who listens.

I could fill your inbox every day with reasons why— _but I won’t. _

**Instead, I want to hear from _you._**

_What’s on your mind? _

_What issues matter most to you?_

Every day, we’re ripping a page from Detroit Lions Coach Dan Campbell’s playbook —staying positive, working hard, and tackling problems, not people.

[**Tell us what matters most to you.**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/BwJJ4xw8YYlJM-KBNnNPW6pYxy-ALxa3OHr9yW9vRTvNZZjrDfzMDZEZvVe2j0DpYYgQZ2Hpeduu26CKIQfJiZfZ_I8C3PP5ERDEhHsGTjHa6l-4wFQRCAlXIMDGwUcvtFVtQqTY1rRTyuZPQ3OZqqizA-mhCyV4lRI2S78L_gyU82Ky3l9cA90K2scUH7YQAaGyyfTWwnbpVsFcqP1bgZie-WRNkdfOA28UEMz3RVATzp1WJmY97L9xJKBQfM_4kHWvnejUm52mqEbabkN8YYH2cHlR-Ok6v9ZgYja6zvpBjXhf_hJe-euQ8Ordmgn_uyIkp2dj-H7nnXvjcgChV3oojoQT0VC0TtKFBEY9jkFLSGi9v6BT10_erjJ-XViN9KPKfVUXDLwVETUF_gUc61-UUWh4sKNTdORCKR2VuVp73g5W9saLERsrFqJnkj2xKyiMcj-1xONgX40fAenKt0bzwpA-i3hSDbutLfHyyjMGLnTbPBA3kQfi51lwG2RX9GGTD8G5goSzWGx2hMkwqQ4_spOYoxEMKxEPkKA-gI1S67hybspn2WIafAOichxfQR3ERC9V7y_G2wkR5dHVwAoxCjGoG_7V6i4NEk2lEIcyA2bk5spsCZHMCr3wTwtk1SacTdSnCotXtCDDzPdL_Y0-buGp8EanwRDYo1MxZP4Dgv0rhvyVlZjD11-_uG0J0Exu-wbRcMfYWGZJrYpwALQZxX9pH4Xn-LwZh6mIl1qr75sVhDW463T-jTorjvEYSaFlODTX_z3fMsletsWNUFYN6ZVuFTABl2G3FKSpVVam1KQzpDLjyirdib0yqcZVknqdRgM/JutdxiYu0FaW7b3vNhtkmu-16T7WlyOp/14)
**Your voice will shape our battle plan for the year.**

**Without your input and your help, we risk handing the keys to Michigan to Radical Leftists who will tear this state apart and turn it into a laboratory for woke, socialist experimentation...**

name: The Democrats
subject: Good news:
body:
---
Democrats just won BIG in Virginia, New Jersey, California, and beyond, dealing a massive blow to Donald Trump and the Republican Party. Grassroots supporters like you helped make it all possible.

_Thank you._

**Next up, taking back Congress and kicking Republicans out of power.**

[**If it makes sense for you, chip in $7 today to help:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251105_5165_fr&refcode2=5165_22930333_trOavo&akid=5165%2E22930333%2EtrOavo) **[CONTRIBUTE $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251105_5165_fr&refcode2=5165_22930333_trOavo&akid=5165%2E22930333%2EtrOavo)** Derek, Trump hoped to be celebrating today. He wanted to flip the New Jersey governor’s mansion. He wanted California’s redistricting measure to fail. He wanted Democrats to lose their seats on Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court. **But thanks to you, none of that happened.** Instead, Democrats won and performed all over the country. Here’s how we did it:
* **In Virginia,** we invested $3.2 million into electing Democrats up and down the ballot.
* **In New Jersey,** we invested another $3.2 million into the Democratic coordinated campaign, more than double the DNC’s prior investments.
* **In Pennsylvania,** we invested six figures into electing Democrats up and down the ballot and were heavily involved in the Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention races.
* **In California,** we launched a bilingual volunteer recruitment campaign to direct Spanish-speaking volunteers to knock on doors and call voters in support of Proposition 50, the Election Rigging Response Act.
* **And even in traditionally red states like Mississippi,** we invested six figures into winning legislative seats.

The DNC is the organization best positioned to strategically distribute resources where and when they’re needed most to help elect Democrats at all levels. Last night, we saw the impact of that work. Now, our focus turns to taking back Congress in the midterms. But to do that, we have to get to work _now_. [**If you’re ready to keep fighting and building on this momentum, we’re asking for your help. Can you chip in $7 now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251105_5165_fr&refcode2=5165_22930333_trOavo&akid=5165%2E22930333%2EtrOavo) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251105_5165_fr&refcode2=5165_22930333_trOavo&akid=5165%2E22930333%2EtrOavo)**
---
****

clean_body: Democrats just won BIG in Virginia, New Jersey, California, and beyond, dealing a massive blow to Donald Trump and the Republican Party. Grassroots supporters like you helped make it all possible. Thank you. Next up, taking back Congress and kicking Republicans out of power. Derek, Trump hoped to be celebrating today. He wanted to flip the New Jersey governor’s mansion. He wanted California’s redistricting measure to fail. He wanted Democrats to lose their seats on Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court. But thanks to you, none of that happened. Instead, Democrats won and performed all over the country. Here’s how we did it: In Virginia, we invested $3.2 million into electing Democrats up and down the ballot. In New Jersey, we invested another $3.2 million into the Democratic coordinated campaign, more than double the DNC’s prior investments. In Pennsylvania, we invested six figures into electing Democrats up and down the ballot and were heavily involved in the Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention races. In California, we launched a bilingual volunteer recruitment campaign to direct Spanish-speaking volunteers to knock on doors and call voters in support of Proposition 50, the Election Rigging Response Act. And even in traditionally red states like Mississippi, we invested six figures into winning legislative seats. The DNC is the organization best positioned to strategically distribute resources where and when they’re needed most to help elect Democrats at all levels. Last night, we saw the impact of that work. Now, our focus turns to taking back Congress in the midterms. But to do that, we have to get to work now. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | ** Thank you, The Democrats If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support.

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Zohran Kwame Mamdani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We have a future to fight for.
#
Zohran Mamdani’s victory speaks to the absolutely heroic effort that not just Zohran put together, but so many people who were brought together by his campaign.
Because they were not just tasked with defeating a Republican — **they were also tasked with defeating the old guard of the Democratic Party that led us to many of the perils of this moment.**
So he had a two front war to win, which is what makes his victory so deeply impressive.
There are a lot of people who are willing to talk about party unity when it serves _them_ , but not party unity when it serves everybody.
This victory puts those folks on notice, and I think it also puts folks on notice that **we have a future to plan for.** We have a future to fight for.
And we're either gonna do that together, or you're going to be left behind.
This is not a partisan issue.
It's not about progressive. It's not moderate. It's not liberal.
This is about: do you understand the assignment of fighting fascism right now, and the assignment to come together across differences, no matter what?
Good things can still happen. This is still a place of possibility.
Together, we will continue to fight for issues like Medicare for All, a living wage, and so much more. And it’s working class champions like Zohran Mamdani — and the movement of everyday people that he inspired to believe a better world is possible — who will help us win it.
[ Please split a $5 donation between our campaign and Zohran Mamdani — $2.50 for each of our teams — today to help us celebrate his resounding victory and continue the fight for progress.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251105-zm.S6EtA9&refcode=em20251105-10154-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10154%2E2526796%2ESHMgOE)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251105-zm.S6EtA9&refcode=em20251105-10154-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=10154%2E2526796%2ESHMgOE)**
With gratitude,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251105-zm?refcode=em20251105-10154-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=21&refcode2=10154_2526796_SHMgOE&akid=10154%2E2526796%2ESHMgOE)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251105-10154-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=22&akid=10154%2E2526796%2ESHMgOE)**
---|---

---|---|---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: INGOP
subject: Statement from Chairwoman Keesling on Democrat Gerrymandering
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
Enough is enough. No images? [Click here](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-e-qkktjty-hhlljjcji-h/) **For Immediate Release: **November 5, 2025**Contact:** Gage Hoekstra, Press Secretary, **_[ghoekstra@indiana.gop](mailto:ghoekstra@indiana.gop)_** Statement from Chairwoman Keesling on Democrat Gerrymandering**Indianapolis, IN** - Indiana Republican Party Chairwoman Lana Keesling released the following statement following yesterday's elections:**"****Yesterday 's election results prove that AOC and Bernie Sanders' long march through the Democrat Party is now complete. They have dragged their party so far left that they elected an avowed communist as Mayor of New York, two far-left governors who openly campaigned on shredding parental rights, and an attorney general who apparently fantasizes about the children of political opponents dying in their arms. ****The real story of yesterday is Gavin Newsom 's Prop 50, clearing the path for Democrats to continue to gerrymander their way back into power. This comes on the heels of the Virginia legislature amending their state constitution to redraw their own congressional maps just last week. Communism and gerrymandering were on ballots yesterday, and Democrat voters in blue states overwhelmingly voted for both.****Let 's be clear: Republicans did not start this fight. For decades, Democrats have wrung as many blue congressional seats out of their maps as the numbers would allow-counting illegals as citizens and gaming the census in their favor. Democrats may put a polite face on their gerrymandering every ten years, but that does not change the fact that they have systematically rigged the process at the expense of states like Indiana. ****Enough is enough. This fight has been brought to our doorstep, and I am proud of our Republican Leaders in the General Assembly who have answered the call from Governor Braun to convene a special session in December. I stand firmly behind President Trump, Vice President Vance, Governor Braun, our Hoosier delegation, and members of the legislature to pass fair maps that will protect the voice of Hoosiers in Congress. "**### [](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qkktjty-hhlljjcji-r/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qkktjty-hhlljjcji-y/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qkktjty-hhlljjcji-j/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qkktjty-hhlljjcji-t/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qkktjty-hhlljjcji-i/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qkktjty-hhlljjcji-d/) ** PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. ****NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. ****WWW.INDIANA.GOP.** | Indiana Republican State Committee 101 W. OHIO ST., SUITE 2200 INDIANAPOLIS, IN 46204 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com [Preferences](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.updatemyprofile.com/y-qkktjty-293A8D27-hhlljjcji-k) | [Unsubscribe](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-u-qkktjty-hhlljjcji-u/)

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: The Longest Shutdown in American History
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
A dark milestone |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118743421/580788666/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzMwYjg2YS1jMGJhLWYwMTEtOGU2MS0wMDIyNDgyNGUwOGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yjj99BGBK5N-WD8z8NWP9H3Vl7d9Z_gfo0evut9grno=&emci=a997accf-b6b9-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=7730b86a-c0ba-f011-8e61-00224824e08d&ceid=7878003)
Yesterday marked the longest government shutdown in American history – breaking a record also set under President Donald Trump. The second-longest shutdown? Yep, that was under Trump, too.

What does this say? It shows how little Trump and Republicans actually care about the American people.

Hundreds of thousands of federal workers remain furloughed or unpaid as airports face delays going into the busiest season, vital services stall, and families wait for benefits that never arrive.

**As usual, Republican leaders would rather play politics and refuse to extend subsidies that keep Americans from paying thousands more on healthcare than actually keep this country running.**

Myself and my Democratic colleagues will not stop fighting every day to end this shutdown. But make no mistake: Republicans have repeatedly shown their priorities aren’t with you.

We can’t let this stand.

clean_body: A dark milestone | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. Yesterday marked the longest government shutdown in American history – breaking a record also set under President Donald Trump. The second-longest shutdown? Yep, that was under Trump, too. What does this say? It shows how little Trump and Republicans actually care about the American people. Hundreds of thousands of federal workers remain furloughed or unpaid as airports face delays going into the busiest season, vital services stall, and families wait for benefits that never arrive. As usual, Republican leaders would rather play politics and refuse to extend subsidies that keep Americans from paying thousands more on healthcare than actually keep this country running. Myself and my Democratic colleagues will not stop fighting every day to end this shutdown. But make no mistake: Republicans have repeatedly shown their priorities aren’t with you. We can’t let this stand. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = In solidarity, Eric Swalwell | = Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy. = Eric runs a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you, and if he's going to win re-election, he's going to need your help. name: Nancy Dahlstrom
subject: We need to reevaluate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom For Governor
body:
People are angry. Let's have a frank discussion.| | | Dear, Peter, we need to have a frank conversation. What happened last night across the country was an emergency warning to all Republicans. And if we're not careful here in Alaska, we will go the way of New York, New Jersey, and Virginia. **The Left is angry.** And they're mobilizing like we've never seen before. That's evident here in Alaska after Republicans lost Anchorage last year, Fairbanks this year, and more to come if we don't look in the mirror. They are going to erode our state from the inside out, and I have something to say about that:**EXPERIENCED
&
INCORRUPTIBLE
LEADERSHIP MATTERS!** Alaskans need to feel confident that their leadership is level-headed, knows how to navigate difficult issues, won't be bought and paid for, and has the temperament to work with all sides of the political spectrum. **Republican policies and ideals can solve our most pressing issues, but only if we can find common ground. _NOT "my way or the highway."_** Enough political games. Enough bickering. I'm ready to get to work. I'm ready to be the adult in the room. If you want this kind of leadership, please [_join_](http://links.mail.nancyforalaska.com/u/click?_t=070db738c7d848a188c7a9e8a29f1bde&_m=1baafbd81470434d92498cfc4cfb2d0b&_e=8C7bHkEbQ5ayx1Waf72GMifyf6K2UDXn9MB_jTVZxrfOIurtafkI3oKo1ny9hyMoHcuQ9uriI44Ybjyvq0YnRhKo0aLUQ1ntFUdm8SLYzpe5OK2gEEULQg1sxoCyB5d5E_qjTz_3iNy1A2C4B2c3De_7DSap_WLXkDYKD2l7ChFcD09TT8SvsaQd4jsqt8n731Xz52RIvlyOZ_KzdWpDyDanmrXNK-3j8Vxx15JVonwec_YsG6S5zNaNqAi1MW9JeDxcQWR7AlbU1lnGQCKv9vMK4iIvxbi12Tz0FIaugn8FVfymGYO8YpP4G6Y3RUl3BI5AdFuX3y_F22p2Yfw6SqQHT_V7Dbqw6mDTakQNILXE9SK7KjrqbYiwtnPjU8NVrorhXpsZrdcGylp_PSoXV96LNK5fLVoasDn1Xfv7FguKC9AN8kr7_AofC9f8NFUOnZUrD99aJJzHlygH9dxmpqEer-YPYRVZ04yap2vHgyX0P9-05zU0ibSqThPjoiB-j3yOyJOyicusOEa_50uUkMMcT_Hinl83oLy4orSftbYgoUMNaxSxVU57OPqyAFCjn2YRUk9agNVJ0s5uBik7g5qGiYqpILdQi_pSomILFXBdldhMpiY7CzR0y5rqmHbPanvyfJ7AbP7fKSwqCDthCw%3D%3D)[ _my campaign_](http://links.mail.nancyforalaska.com/u/click?_t=070db738c7d848a188c7a9e8a29f1bde&_m=1baafbd81470434d92498cfc4cfb2d0b&_e=8C7bHkEbQ5ayx1Waf72GMifyf6K2UDXn9MB_jTVZxrfOIurtafkI3oKo1ny9hyMoHcuQ9uriI44Ybjyvq0YnRhKo0aLUQ1ntFUdm8SLYzpe5OK2gEEULQg1sxoCyB5d5E_qjTz_3iNy1A2C4B2c3De_7DSap_WLXkDYKD2l7ChFcD09TT8SvsaQd4jsqt8n731Xz52RIvlyOZ_KzdWpDyHxS4r2r8cTxSMrwzB8mEXbecfFaEkflr3vSW0JDPURSiu6ew3UV-wmzsK5m32NlNg_OUKZgmiwo7aJLf27uVtUtgpK85DY_LvScwFSa-6Q3kIwbPyXo9G5A696DRmMLGSVbbfsXvgOjDthxJeITESZlomCCRzv0xubRG2gzeOXOiP0VBJrDBUlUemzvJ9Oo1egWr9S5W6U1bDvJTxf1LE0k0zzaokyFZrUySyb5VsjnRlQ77twKU59iFDRwYuHJMg6kcUWXgUGRkV6bItm7oscSKi7A6HzqgSbP0Qu74_IxWShS9R9x4IS5Jq4MrytKmmUQa_tJimS8jBt_Y9ZgrDidPDCGKdm4y6wxmtuUNuS6JkxhSrhFcMvfz4NPlDiAu1vofsqA1B3rt5B1aiMoAf1eB3Dm0einl0EY-Q3ghmrLCC5JMQrewWwuGTzxrzahEg%3D%3D) to help me strengthen Alaska and prove that experience will lead us into the _Golden Age_.

clean_body: People are angry. Let's have a frank discussion.| | | Dear, Peter, we need to have a frank conversation. What happened last night across the country was an emergency warning to all Republicans. And if we're not careful here in Alaska, we will go the way of New York, New Jersey, and Virginia. The Left is angry. And they're mobilizing like we've never seen before. That's evident here in Alaska after Republicans lost Anchorage last year, Fairbanks this year, and more to come if we don't look in the mirror. They are going to erode our state from the inside out, and I have something to say about that:EXPERIENCED & INCORRUPTIBLE LEADERSHIP MATTERS! Alaskans need to feel confident that their leadership is level-headed, knows how to navigate difficult issues, won't be bought and paid for, and has the temperament to work with all sides of the political spectrum. Republican policies and ideals can solve our most pressing issues, but only if we can find common ground. NOT "my way or the highway." Enough political games. Enough bickering. I'm ready to get to work. I'm ready to be the adult in the room. If you want this kind of leadership, please to help me strengthen Alaska and prove that experience will lead us into the Golden Age. mailto:info@nancyforalaska.com?subject=I'd like to host an event!&body= mailto:info@nancyforalaska.com?subject=Question for Nancy Let's do this together, Nancy Dahlstrom Alaska's Lt. Governor & 2026 Republican Candidate for Governor | | | | | ---|---|---

name: Andrea
subject: Community Kickback this Sunday
body:
Make your voice heard to build stronger communities and schools | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/andreahunley/events-for-democracy-october-november-18253232?e=d9ebccf591)
---
| |
---
| |
# COMMUNITY KICKBACK
Dear Friends,
In my time working as an educator and in the legislator, I have seen that real power does not come from above, it comes from organizing in our neighborhoods and schools. If we want to build power for meaningful change, we need to build strong communities that can fight for that power. That's why IPS Commissioner Nicole Carey and I are hosting an event **this Sunday, 11/9 from 2-5 pm at Crispus Attucks High School** where we can talk about how to support our neighborhoods and schools.

In these difficult times, I also realize that we all need to support each other. That's why the event will also have food, giveaways and resources for those who need them. Together, we can provide the necessary tools for all of us to advocate for the communities we live in. Please join us to make this possible!

I hope to see you there, sharing your voice, building connections, getting resources, and building a stronger Indianapolis.

Andrea
---

---

name: California Dems
subject: Trump’s “perfect plan” foiled last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Last night the people of California sent a powerful message: Elections will be decided by voters, not MAGA politicians.
A few months ago, Donald Trump called Texas Governor Greg Abbott and told him that Republicans were “entitled” to five more Republican U.S. House seats in Texas. MAGA cronies in Texas immediately schemed to redraw their maps in an unprecedented move to eliminate five Democratic districts and color them red.
It could’ve been the perfect plan. Even as Trump’s chaos drove up prices, made healthcare unaffordable, and stripped away our rights, Republicans thought they could cling to their U.S. House Majority by rigging the system.
One thing Donald Trump never counted on, however, was the state of California standing up and fighting back.
He never counted on you.
Instead of agonizing over this blatant power grab, we organized and we mobilized. Together, we embarked on a historic 90-day sprint to take action here in California to neutralize Trump’s election-rigging scheme.
And last night we won in a blowout that shocked the pundits and talking heads. Donald Trump poked the bear, and we roared back.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-nov25-redistricting?refcode=&amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-nov25-redistricting?refcode=&amount=]Thank you for staying with us through this fight.
We wish we could say that this incredible landslide victory is the end of the story. That we can pack up and rest with democracy secured.
But now comes the next test: Whether we can take our new Congressional maps and flip the seats needed to take back control of the U.S. House.
So, even as we celebrate this incredible win, we’re also asking you to stay in the fight. Can you make a founding contribution to our 2026 House Majority Fund today? Your renewed support will power our next chapter — building the grassroots organizing we’ll need to take back the U.S. House. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-nov25-redistricting?refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-nov25-redistricting?&refcode=&amount=]Thank you for everything you’ve done to make this victory possible, and for everything you’ll continue to do to defend democracy and move our country forward.
Gratefully,
- The California Democratic Party

DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=&amount=20.24]
Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.
If this email was forwarded to you, please sign up for our email list here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zWMh-KAhmUiJYxMzOxKADQ2]
We rely on email to communicate with supporters like you and conduct the business of the California Democratic Party, but if you wish to receive only our most important emails, let us know here to sign up for fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/60txJAHUg0OznGGaWVwO_A2]
And if you no longer wish to receive emails from the California Democratic Party, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.cadem.org/p/BZcF64X0Zkie6fv4FEU9PQ2?unsubscribedata=Q0kFEh4ONKu2mPcZfzcF%2B3DG6yCBcu0Ltm6utyZYSj1bR7G7xAdnjBmni9fA5RoVqI9QIH%2Fcs8LI1FYPDLKyAT1pGngsKQlZoTeR9Q5uJf7vy9cZ7OKxR4MMyHR5GcNietfju4IvLrjm3NlqZrIhVY05fXH6BBKprduc5jxT33pDj50rD7u96ZaBxx%2FbR61GeK6Dys%2Fnkw2lnLx5pxbgT0HLp5msYnftB7YINYGnatplE9SU1PuAkwPoQnxDWunOV6rtVmE1uG5rkfiZbEa1ySTgUuKs1IMWcUuN6f4AmWS4V7MRZbp5dojds%2FNjbx6ULvsXlmm26UECvMWWowDjAVSCr7dew0yhUQvOpjrLyi%2FjHD3AMAZO9%2F03SHmTz6WnZyDsiXhbIgmdjnfNSb6Yrj13iEZf5HNLgJlFUMXqgS8%3D .

Trust — in government, in the dollar, in the markets — is disappearing.
We’re not just watching a crisis of confidence... _we’re living through it_.
In fact, I believe, we’ve entered a _Low-Trust Economy_... where promises mean less, and tangible assets mean everything.
You won’t hear this story on the news (not yet). But this is your window of opportunity to protect yourself and your family before confidence completely collapses.
From my experience, when trust disappears, one asset always rises.

body:
Seize ALL CCP Assets NOW

Go to China and try to buy land.
__See how that works out for you.__
Now, try buying land near their military bases.
**__You’d vanish without a trace.__**
But here in America?
**__China continues to buy land dangerously close to U.S. military facilities.__**
Whoever allowed this has betrayed our country.
It’s time to **SEIZE that land** and shut this down, permanently.

# **[Democratic socialist Zohran Mamdani wins New York City mayoral race](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Democratic Mayor-Elect Zohran Mamdani speaks to members of the media during a press conference after voting on Nov. 4, 2025. / Credit: Alexi J. Rosenfeld/Getty Images Washington, D.C. Newsroom, Nov 4, 2025 / 22:25 pm (CNA). Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani, a Democratic socialist who promotes gender ideology and abortion access, won his bid for mayor of New York City on Nov. 4, decisively defeating his two main opponents: former Gov. Andrew Cuomo and talk show host Curtis Sliwa.Mamdani, a 34-year-old member of the New York State Assembly and the Democratic Party’s nominee for mayor, took 50.4% of the vote on Tuesday. As of 9:42 p.m. ET, 75% of the vote had been tallied.Cuomo, who served as governor as a Democrat and ran as an independent for mayor, received 41.3% of the vote. Sliwa, the Republican nominee, finished third with 7.5% of the vote.

Best,

Dear Peter,
# Do Our Elections Represent the Will of the People?
The story appears to be the same over three federal election cycles—2020, 2022 and 2024—Unite4Freedom’s deep analysis of over 30 states’ official data has shown that millions of votes, certified as accurate by election officials, originate from records in which voters’ identities and eligibility are in violation of _defined criminal law_. Additionally, our Phantom Voter Studies show that anywhere from 8% to 18% of voters DON’T EXIST!
## Click the button below to dig into our newsletter to explore our research and reports, and join fellow patriots as we transform knowledge into action, defending the validity of our elections.

## **This is _our moment_ to get loud, stay loud, and make sure the truth can’t be ignored.**

subject: Tom Brady's Cloned Dog, American Dream, and the Oldest Couple
body:
Retired NFL quarterback Tom Brady revealed that his family's [new dog, Junie, is a clone](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MGupCAQBdCvwR0GClBmwWKSibue7SwNUoUyQekgadN__2K_T3irWlRyc8_995gfPuV0rH_9Tq7FMh90nZlaozq3si_V4_sMuRyEWFa_U03BzyDAcCm5GGb0Kb9n3aGLRECqIyfHATSMwqhucxbRqiF6G61VONgYLJpBxoBoAOBXl9ydJqUYpBRayl6DJRutWDBA0DowLQhTK7X_X9LRNor5XV5U-1D2LruttefJ1G8GE4Ppuq7-Cke4nwwmX1sKmRhMt-s-vqVy8KvUjAymVnb-MfJvI8eyMpiMGLkFQcYaxUFb5NogcG9QcQjS-jFKLxfL1NSWSpGpP9uzqw6fV8o5ncPItFh3n_KnZPvRsi8HXwEAAP__P9uJ-A) of his late pet Lua, created using technology from Dallas-based Colossal Biosciences, a firm in which he is an investor.

## Trump Responds to Democratic Wins
President Trump on Wednesday called the [off-year election results a setback](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L3unDAQBPCnMR3INj6gcZGG7tKmRGa9PjbyB7L3Dt3bR-QV_t1II_1Gmj_P7ekoUn79dgkth7JlvFpEZqwbl7RX578NYsnofXm5hJXAbVrqR69UL6fNO4rfzXTeBkSNY4dWzZM2epaPsTusnHF8TNPiwri4afTgR1hCcAH9AhpdR_bWlJKTUtIoNRi94BIWuXvQYAwII9ETlzr8LZT5wBC_5YN1gJK6aA_ms4nxl9Cr0Ot1XQPkHe5S6PWmhV6VEnqVd-L6TmePEYGp5NZ7TAWq49ZXPN97JHC59YEi7e_GWIeDU-yq9edFMVKbZmHkKzmK_-f5R599rP4XAAD__3YygZU) for Republicans, pointing to the government shutdown and his absence from the ballot as key factors. Democrats secured [several high-profile victories](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGOpCAURb8GdxhAxNqwcDJxV5Oa9KKX5gkPpYNigCpSf9-xf6F3Lzl5N_eez_t8Bx_8sf6DHXVxcT6w5oClYJpL3JcE9p1NiAdaG1fYMXkDs2Cip5xTpmYLPrxn2VjtEAV2DWo-KCHFwPqu2XTnhOG8tw7UIrF3ijlUauntMAAMcmi8vtI4Z4pzJjlvpbjhzd3YYo0wUhoiGVpfYmq_oj_Khi684wtTa-LeBL2VcmbSjURMREy11nbPx8WImPCgz0zEdI0iYjpj8MWb6wS6-JUu4Ym0wgupi4la3KNJUDKFw9JSIz2hbPliFZK9vhIdR_74P_IH6aZovCXd3z-XPqz5A9PZJG3P6kPwWQ1EsnUHH36Kll_ZfWnxHQAA__992498) Tuesday in an electoral sweep that held or flipped offices in Virginia, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, California, and New York City. Democrats Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill won governor's races in Virginia and New Jersey respectively, while Democratic Socialist Zohran Mamdani defeated former Gov. Andrew Cuomo to become mayor of New York City. Trump again urged GOP leaders to [eliminate the Senate filibuster](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L3uozAQBPCnMR2RvRhIChfX0OXaK5HxrsOe_BGZTaK8_Yl7hX89o5808-e-3j0nLo_fPpOTWNdCnyORCLVVat6ax-8RUi2EWB8-U-PgV9Aw9sb0elrRc_qutkMXiYCGjpyZJ7Aw63HododkfESIG5pB42CnOY6Ekx5goxA337E7NWP0ZIy2xlwsXOkar3rDAMHaoKwmZKnt8rdykZ1i-tY3tUuouUtuF3keavilYFGwyE47p3RmCpa9ZjoHKVg8Zi58SPPCtShYxvGm7Xzrpb3ysz_2l2D9lJ4ShbPRb8lnUrB0zeHzwynxMc3K6kf2_N_v5EeHvR38CwAA___HVIEy) to move legislation and end the shutdown. He criticized Mamdani's politics but said he hopes the city succeeds and may work with the new mayor.
## Tom Brady Clones Family Dog
Retired NFL quarterback Tom Brady revealed that his family's [new dog, Junie, is a clone](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MGupCAQBdCvwR0GClBmwWKSibue7SwNUoUyQekgadN__2K_T3irWlRyc8_995gfPuV0rH_9Tq7FMh90nZlaozq3si_V4_sMuRyEWFa_U03BzyDAcCm5GGb0Kb9n3aGLRECqIyfHATSMwqhucxbRqiF6G61VONgYLJpBxoBoAOBXl9ydJqUYpBRayl6DJRutWDBA0DowLQhTK7X_X9LRNor5XV5U-1D2LruttefJ1G8GE4Ppuq7-Cke4nwwmX1sKmRhMt-s-vqVy8KvUjAymVnb-MfJvI8eyMpiMGLkFQcYaxUFb5NogcG9QcQjS-jFKLxfL1NSWSpGpP9uzqw6fV8o5ncPItFh3n_KnZPvRsi8HXwEAAP__P9uJ-A) of his late pet Lua, created using technology from Dallas-based Colossal Biosciences, a firm in which he is an investor. Brady used a blood sample collected before Lua's death to leverage the non-invasive cloning technology, saying it gave his family "a second chance" with their beloved dog. [See a picture of the dog here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu6yAUgOGnwVssOMaOMzBcKfKWW3Wq1AVhn4NzKjARRqF5-8p9he6_vuH_uNmb48Db-t9FMsUnu1HdA5VC2ZYU5-zwtS8hbYSYVhcp8-IsSOhPSp3kYNFxeFndoPFEQF1DRp0H0HCWfdfcDcJ88drNvlfSo4YeaLyQmvUwj33fUcPm0JSSg1JSK9VqGGn0o5xxgUXrRWhJyCXl9ivxVu7kwys9KbdLik0w91Ieu-j-CZgETLXWlre9uDW7eBQCpoeA6fqeJda39XPQR9hNHFfLG9K36K6qyQYflUPgfTgLLdfoOPz65U9TngZ-AgAA__-3XnTE). The U.S. commercial pet cloning industry is dominated by Viagen Pets & Equine, a subsidiary of Colossal, the biotech company best known for its efforts to [revive extinct animals,](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2y3CAMhZ8Gd94BGf_cgiIN3U2b0iNA9iqDYQPsevz2GecVUqnRfOec79f3-o0cOe0_8SDTtrwmOmuk1qisLR-uYLiqjzlRCHnHgwp7XEHC2CvVy2kNyPFadRfMRgQ0dGTUPIGGWY5D9zTSwQJEDrdhU6N2BHMg7YZRzm4GiR2bm6aUnJSSWqmHhoWWbZEuePBae6ElBW65PH5nTu1JW7zyh8rD56OL5tnaq4rhhwArwJ7n-XhXbDngdT8IsLXlcgmw97L7YOOcBNg7VoBVSoCVWoD1OeZaMfaOc_VMyVPt0f95c6Ha3xI47b3PxwvT1X8Yd7o5y_S1LF-TlnIWYLtiwuvkGLlOs9ByP5Djv6rtv_x-DPwNAAD__3Vijfs) such as the woolly mammoth and thylacine. Cloning a cat or dog is an expensive procedure, typically [costing $50,000](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGu5CAQRE-DM0ZNG7A3INjE2Wy6oYVNY_cKw8iwM_Ltv_yv8JNSSSVVqd7f5_z0nDhvf_xBrsUyZ_rURK3RObdyLKcPV11TyRRC2fxBJ69-RkAjlZJg5-A5XbPugotESH1HTg0WNQ5g-m53YfBojTeayPxa4uKNHXuINmpvo7WmY3e3KQVWKdBKPTSONMYRlrDiqvUqNFDgVs7Hv8K57RTTVd50PtZydMntrb2q6H8LnARO-XqV2u5I4ISAWuCk1C23SxyptiuRwKntJA0AgAxlk_dFzptc_lfOVKvkKpdSDs6bwKk7XXh9OCWudhAatsNz-t5vP4L2dvgVAAD__ypDfto), with horses costing $85,000. The company is using the same technology that created Dolly the Sheep in the 1990s.
## American Dream Now Costs Over $5M
New analysis determined that achieving the American Dream now carries a lifetime [price tag of over $5 million](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1u6zAQhE9DdRTIFfXjgsVr1Pm1KQWau7I2oESD3Fjw7QMHuUH6wcx838d1uQZOfNz_h528rHk56KyJRKgskvdbCfiqMeWDEPM97FQ4hgUM9NpabYYFA6fX4hr0KxFQ15C34wAORtN3zeYng3bEaKAzI8F4wXjpLxS7yXQrWtM37N9t1prBWuOsbR1MNK2TuWGE6FxUzhCy5NJ-Zj5kozW98pNKG_PeJL-JPKrq_imYFcznebZPrl8hxfBgCYmrvIMK5pir6Lxq2Uj_ghwaC4Vd86HfJxTMTfH4ODklrsOonLnvgdPPkvxJz9PDdwAAAP__nlF5Ow) per household. Retirement savings top the list at $1.6 million, followed by big-ticket staples such as homeownership, raising two children, and car ownership. The staggering price tag is pushing key life milestones out of reach for many, fueling record-low birth rates and a rising median age for first-time homebuyers. The total cost represents the combined lifetime expenses for key milestones that most Americans associate with a comfortable life. [See data visualization here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1u6zAQhE9DdRTIFfXjgsVr1Pm1KQWau7I2oESD3Fjw7QMHuUH6wcx838d1uQZOfNz_h528rHk56KyJRKgskvdbCfiqMeWDEPM97FQ4hgUM9NpabYYFA6fX4hr0KxFQ15C34wAORtN3zeYng3bEaKAzI8F4wXjpLxS7yXQrWtM37N9t1prBWuOsbR1MNK2TuWGE6FxUzhCy5NJ-Zj5kozW98pNKG_PeJL-JPKrq_imYFcznebZPrl8hxfBgCYmrvIMK5pir6Lxq2Uj_ghwaC4Vd86HfJxTMTfH4ODklrsOonLnvgdPPkvxJz9PDdwAAAP__nlF5Ow).

Democrats secured Tuesday in an electoral sweep that held or flipped offices in Virginia, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, California, and New York City. Democrats Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill won governor's races in Virginia and New Jersey respectively, while Democratic Socialist Zohran Mamdani defeated former Gov. Andrew Cuomo to become mayor of New York City. Trump again urged GOP leaders to to move legislation and end the shutdown. He criticized Mamdani's politics but said he hopes the city succeeds and may work with the new mayor. Tom Brady Clones Family Dog Retired NFL quarterback Tom Brady revealed that his family's of his late pet Lua, created using technology from Dallas-based Colossal Biosciences, a firm in which he is an investor. Brady used a blood sample collected before Lua's death to leverage the non-invasive cloning technology, saying it gave his family "a second chance" with their beloved dog. . The U.S. commercial pet cloning industry is dominated by Viagen Pets & Equine, a subsidiary of Colossal, the biotech company best known for its efforts to such as the woolly mammoth and thylacine. Cloning a cat or dog is an expensive procedure, typically , with horses costing $85,000. The company is using the same technology that created Dolly the Sheep in the 1990s. American Dream Now Costs Over $5M New analysis determined that achieving the American Dream now carries a lifetime per household. Retirement savings top the list at $1.6 million, followed by big-ticket staples such as homeownership, raising two children, and car ownership. The staggering price tag is pushing key life milestones out of reach for many, fueling record-low birth rates and a rising median age for first-time homebuyers. The total cost represents the combined lifetime expenses for key milestones that most Americans associate with a comfortable life. . name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Never expected to get the cold shoulder from YOU
body:
Peter, is everything OK?

| | | | Peter, why have you been giving us the cold shoulder?
I know I’ve reached out this week about this issue.My team tells me they’ve texted and emailed at least twice too!
Is everything ok? Should we take the hint and assume you aren’t interested in these messages?
That would be truly shocking to me since you’ve always been such a steadfast supporter of mine and President Trump’s mission to save America, so I’m giving you one more chance!
[My ONLY request right now is that you complete the Official Trump Voter Profile before the end of the week.](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._PKcWX00nvXgQKA) Really, that’s it! I just need your feedback, nothing more! | [ SUBMIT MY TRUMP VOTER PROFILE ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)

THANK YOU,

subject: Wedding Dilemma, Scooters Recovered, and Tom Brady's Cloned Dog
body:
ESPN's _College GameDay_ is coming to Lubbock this Saturday for the first time in 17 years as No. 8 Texas Tech faces No. 7 BYU. The announcement [created a dilemma](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAQRL_GdKDdxUBSuLiGLtdeiRa8BksGR7YVkr8_Jbo_uH70Zub93KYb--CP9Zt3MeXp4nTImYOUImk6xVp_rNYH2XfOS4xFUk6yTATU1Yg19JNlH16TrqyZwV6xEoNDT7oFfW2rzcxIjB3Moge-XJyljhAGGtzMDvQFKm_eMETokQBbaNwsPGheWgKcO2yVBrG-xNSUTYo8Obvwig9JzRL3KpitlHtW7ZeiUdF4nmezCacS-LBLDEFWyfeYSn7HFY3vNkUjoqIRSNH4QdZFlq12fNR_p-uVd7H8qh8-cVA0VsnY--lD8LkflIZ1Zx8-E8r_xD0M_QYAAP__XtCB_Q) for one Tech fan whose wedding is scheduled to take place in Dallas the night before.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkM1qMyEYRq9Gdxl81Whm4eKDMB8U0lJaaMlm8OedROrMBLUxufuS3kJ3z-I5Z3E-DuPBxhSX07Od0dTbtI4LtpKwVsxjwxDicgox4Tzb4te1Yi4Z_cgZ324ANkyNwcZ0HyUNxrHQA0UDWnEpmOwFPZvQKye1nECBt35yk95q7GGndr0GpjyN5iEDYAo4A8G6yaHV0nrBGbgtCCIZhljX3NUzVrzZMqX7esXc-XWmyZxrvRQi_hE-ED601rqW_VdcXEqPB-ED_w87gFeuCB_ejsf90-GxiBjKtwMi9u-fwwvNJlxaTCkWpYlkp9nGX57Wv3W5Gv4TAAD__4LxdEQ) | |
# Thursday, November 6, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1957, actress [Lori Singer](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1y6yAQQOGnQZ01y4IluaC4jarrNClSMvys5J0g4QHGst8-47xCytN8xfm62qvjxPv64TYy7blku9NRE7VGxR4UI-9r5ETb5mrIuVGphYJFwPNJyhMMNjpOL6u7aDzEi-zIyHFArUBfVHczl-BxgAH15KfFK01BwhRHPzkKQAE7Nm9MShgkglTQL57cqF1QCNKfpRIaKHLLpW83avR0dUmv_KDSh7x1ydxau1eh_gmcBc609wd_850iuz6XVeD8boHz_1zYfvK-UumKifeDU-I6jELDujlOv1z724SHwZ8AAAD__8XtcYY) was born in Corpus Christi. She is best known for starring as Ariel Moore in the 1984 musical film _Footloose_. A devoted Texas Tech fan who's getting married this weekend faced a dilemma when he learned ESPN's _College GameDay_ is coming to Lubbock for the Red Raiders' matchup against BYU. Find out what he and his fiancee [decided to do](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAUhJ_GdEb-i9kULrahy7ZbomOfA1hrMLK9IXn7K67yBrcbaaRPM9_fx_SAmOK-_IGNXHvNedrprIlaozKdhBj3BWOibYMacm5UaqEwKaFuXEou7IQQ03syHTov8C47cnKwymhh7rpbndFo_TCjCUYoixa09wTKgKUBf2nbRXfBpBRWKiG16GdPMBgIWgnpb1IzIwhjy6VvKzV6QZ3TOz-p9CFvXXJra0dl-jdTI1PjeZ79v-DxKpkaLzZTo5RMjeJKreT_PhE_oADGSrwQ8gIRqfAZdj5DoMo_lznVY6885JRoIb7ARghvHvI-pxha5WdsK_9oYmrsisPjjCnFagdmxLJBTN8z28_kPp36CgAA___tiI-m) in today's _Roundup_. Is there anything you'd reschedule a wedding for? Hit reply to let us know. What happens when a government shutdown collides with the busiest travel season of the year? On today's episode of _[The Flyover Podcast](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykz0uKKyEUANDV6CyFv1jPgYMHoaAH6WkPRb23EsGKQW8-tfumewu9gQPn6xzOsdRyu3zGDT291xZu-BoVibCHFwKU2wVKxW2LI7dG2EfHHJRQx4OUB2EDxFL3YDj4JMBJjl7OVhktjNP86p1bs3Uxzym5f7BCNOhMAlAmWxut5sX_YFIKK5WQWkxrwjibmLUSMh2lZkYgFGp9oisSvuNY696e2KfcNl79leg-mP7P1MLUsrcHPaaETC1vOMmPZvbUBtMLMX3SR8O7h_ur1FqGnZkRly2W-ivR3_5Pr74DAAD__2w7bqU)_ , host Ayla Brown explains how the shutdown is putting holiday air travel at risk--and why Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy says he might "shut the whole airspace down." Click here to watch _[The Flyover Podcast](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykz0uKKyEUANDV6CyFv1jPgYMHoaAH6WkPRb23EsGKQW8-tfumewu9gQPn6xzOsdRyu3zGDT291xZu-BoVibCHFwKU2wVKxW2LI7dG2EfHHJRQx4OUB2EDxFL3YDj4JMBJjl7OVhktjNP86p1bs3Uxzym5f7BCNOhMAlAmWxut5sX_YFIKK5WQWkxrwjibmLUSMh2lZkYgFGp9oisSvuNY696e2KfcNl79leg-mP7P1MLUsrcHPaaETC1vOMmPZvbUBtMLMX3SR8O7h_ur1FqGnZkRly2W-ivR3_5Pr74DAAD__2w7bqU)_. Heads-up, _Flyover _readers: Our CEO, Cole, is sending a quick note later today about a few Amazon Prime perks you might be missing--plus how a new baby in the house has him on the lookout for deals. Thanks to our friends at [Brad's Deals](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkc2upCAQhZ8Gd3T4a20XLibpuLuznSUpoFQyIA7g9TpPP7HTLzC5Sz4q51S--vWhP8AHv84_IeJQv6akVzxKwFox6wOd8-vsfMAYodiUKuaS0WrBxJ1yTlmrHfhwatW4wTDX8wYH3rVCSaZ62SxDy6V63E0PXTf16t6bHnvr-CTMA5VqH40frjDOWcsF45LdJoPQKbBSMG7uXBLF0Pma8q0uWPELyhTO9In5ZlNswrDUuhUifxAxEjEex3EzGVxxCKFcI0SMJqSZiJEzChH-ppVu2UekBlecfC30TDuNcNI1Vfp7TQcFk_ZK5LjXqEvas0Uin3XBdzN1FYhor9-Izu-RyKfzZQtwvrGFuIGfVyKf_9l6ae3o5YSI1mrvXhH96wn2j47JQbi2yTu-0QLZzVDxTZs8uO3wIfjSdkSxOYIPL1n1eyf-HMS_AAAA__-68L4I). If you're ready to finally take control of your weight and your health, today's sponsor, [DirectMeds](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkM1qMyEYRq9Gdxl81Whm4eKDMB8U0lJaaMlm8OedROrMBLUxufuS3kJ3z-I5Z3E-DuPBxhSX07Od0dTbtI4LtpKwVsxjwxDicgox4Tzb4te1Yi4Z_cgZ324ANkyNwcZ0HyUNxrHQA0UDWnEpmOwFPZvQKye1nECBt35yk95q7GGndr0GpjyN5iEDYAo4A8G6yaHV0nrBGbgtCCIZhljX3NUzVrzZMqX7esXc-XWmyZxrvRQi_hE-ED601rqW_VdcXEqPB-ED_w87gFeuCB_ejsf90-GxiBjKtwMi9u-fwwvNJlxaTCkWpYlkp9nGX57Wv3W5Gv4TAAD__4LxdEQ), makes it simple to start--with trusted GLP-1 treatments prescribed online and delivered straight to your door.

## Texans Vote in Bond, Tax Rate Elections

## Houston Police Invite NYC Cops to Relocate
Some of Texas's most powerful politicians denounced the election of 34-year-old Democratic socialist Zohran Mamdani as mayor of New York City on Tuesday. At least one Texas police union [made an appeal](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvOozAQhZ8GOiPfgFC42CZdtt0SGWaA0doY4UmcvP0v8gp_dZqjc_n-PcaHp0D7-tdHdPxe0rhjyQGZ8RwLAtC-AgWM0ec5JcYznziPWupWKCVkN4Kn8BltDW6SMKganeo7bY20g6k3p7TRfevbeYEO7XJDM5jeTtDqaUB9UzW5K0wp2SktlZHNMqHvrZ-NlmpqlamsRCBOZ8MbMr59XsInvfBs5hTr4DbmI1fmT6Xvlb6XUprrQkH8fxkqfd_SM3PaxZyOLBhDEPvnAAGU12dmBFGINxF9BL-T4CRieuGl3zKh5DD00rb16eAoFALlrq-sXKOn8N3AvyP3cvonAAD__ylXhFY) to NYC's more than 30,000 cops to relocate. Prior to the election, Gov. Greg Abbott [joked](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OpDAQBeDTmMzINgaWwMEmZL3phsg_ZdqSf1p2DTS3H9FzhMnrK733_j-2hw4x5P2fTqDw7cuW4WwREKFuJzgX8u5ChJR0s6Ug1FbBboKJkXJO2bQ5HeK1yc4pw9zCO1B8noQcmFyG7qn0Ipkb_4C3AMDNOMnRzsaO0gujF2-7oO5nnLOJC8YH1nsDepbaDoJxM_KBSAYuYKk9PgHhrZuPVzmg9rakLqon4quR4S8RKxHreZ69L-9ZfzUM-T4hYr07EbF-MN3LQbUxBZGeIUYa0qs0oJwxiroG76nOV8lAUzlC3umP8rUkmi_bVeVetwttmolke9IhfpLg7_Y7lPgOAAD__4MPiCM) that he would "impose a 100% tariff on anyone moving to Texas from NYC." After the race was called, he asked his followers to "join me for a moment of silence for NYC." U.S. Sens. Ted Cruz and John Cornyn were much more direct in their comments. Cruz [said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0Dtu6zAQQNHVUJ2NmeFHYsHiNer82pQCJY5sApRlkONfVh84W0h7i1Pcr9N0irnk6_l_3DjIa92nKz9bYRGu05NTytdzyoW3LbZl34Vrq7xMBGQPiAdwU4q5vCfTpTBD8thxwN6R0WC87i5B92AGQ4bQuyWRm411qx3QAq8Oh77L4YMhgkMC1HBcZ469iYsmwNmiVgY4ZdnrUS4s_IptLe_9wfW47FtXwkXk1pT-p2hUNL4-VdEonJZ6_1Y0Nolyb4pG9IND69yg0Q_eet9TV0O6PXMpubleGThvMZdfV_524xHoJwAA__8nlG_-), "_New York City is a Crown Jewel of America. Having it governed by a communist jihadist is incredibly distressing_." Cornyn [called](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9u6yAUgPGnwVuiwwHzZ2C4upKHSuna0SJwHCNhEwFN4rev0lfo-g2_4fu6zBefctpvn34j119LmXd6tky9U52fFGPabzFl2jbfQimdaqsUZgQcT5yfQM3Rp3zMcojuCtHygRzXCqUAacWwOglobIDFRxOktVJpa0AjoFbBcPRDcm-Mc1AcgQs4L1fyWvogEPh15IJJoJh6qee-UqeXb0s-yoPqOZRtyG7t_d6Y-MdwYji93pXh9FHW_X-p-7EznFr3_bsxnLg1CgQ3QoAeR2kQxVBdvD9TzqkpzSTcNp_yL93_NuTh8CcAAP__pG1xFg) Mamdani's election a "disgrace." The Houston Police Officers' Union, meanwhile, [invited](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozwQRp_GdI7sscGhoPgbuvu3W6LBM4TRGjsyzuXm7VfZV9j6kz6dc359LV8oSfLjfzx4aj9bWTJfZ-LWuC4XE0l-kCQ-DjxjKY3rWTkuYKDX1mozLISS3ovvaFoNjbbjyYYBvDN-dN0-bYFicOj6vsd7gDDE-zqSiZGIwrpiJ9PnzFozWDDWmdu2MgaP0YGxa2-d8oZJWqm3tnPjHzy39C7fXG-xHF2a9taep3L_KZgVzNd13X7v5fUZFcxYm8TECuaPl4I5lYhJwbyX19lK1s-SJLJ-ZSlZV471JU3yQ-f3k_SBB2EWzYljk5IVzHDvdWQY-9Ftmsiv2m-b1aN3g3Z39MGiGx1AVyd6XpKSnENQ3jwOlPSXuP1b5-8J_gQAAP__ovKRvA) New York City police officers "disgusted with the election of Zohran Mamdani" to "join us." The social media post highlighted officers' 36.5% pay raise over five years, a "supportive mayor and city council," and a police chief who’s "a retired Texas Ranger, not a politician."
## GameDay a Dilemma for Tech Fan
ESPN's _College GameDay_ is coming to Lubbock this Saturday for the first time in 17 years as No. 8 Texas Tech faces No. 7 BYU. The announcement [created a dilemma](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAQRL_GdKDdxUBSuLiGLtdeiRa8BksGR7YVkr8_Jbo_uH70Zub93KYb--CP9Zt3MeXp4nTImYOUImk6xVp_rNYH2XfOS4xFUk6yTATU1Yg19JNlH16TrqyZwV6xEoNDT7oFfW2rzcxIjB3Moge-XJyljhAGGtzMDvQFKm_eMETokQBbaNwsPGheWgKcO2yVBrG-xNSUTYo8Obvwig9JzRL3KpitlHtW7ZeiUdF4nmezCacS-LBLDEFWyfeYSn7HFY3vNkUjoqIRSNH4QdZFlq12fNR_p-uVd7H8qh8-cVA0VsnY--lD8LkflIZ1Zx8-E8r_xD0M_QYAAP__XtCB_Q) for one Tech fan whose wedding is scheduled to take place in Dallas the night before. Taylor Karrh, an apparent [Texas Tech alum](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0Dtu6zAQQNHVUJ2N-VCiVLB4eICawGlTCrQ4sglQoiFO_Nl94Gwh7S1Ocb9O0ymknLbLZ1jF63Mp0yaPmkVV9ukhMabtElOWdQ11LkVlr7vMEwG1B8QDdFMMKb8m20R_hjhgIx5dR5bBDtxcveWeWrAdh7ZbZKEIDDK7AZ2w6yk2yb8xROiQABmOy1mCs2FmAjy3yMaCxKRlP-pVVJ6hLvlV7rIf57I22V9Vb9XwP0OjofH5robG0_yRti3V_zm8tGyGxqpBv6uhEYe-xXawPfdMrbPIrtl9vD1Szql2zli4rCHlX1__duXu6ScAAP__UWxzag), posted about his situation shortly after the news broke: "_365 days in a year and my fiancé schedules our wedding on the same weekend as_ Gameday." name: Team Freedom Va
subject: Freedom Virginia Congratulates Endorsed Candidates
body:
Friends-- After a landslide victory for affordability in this week’s statewide and House elections, Freedom Virginia today congratulates all its endorsed candidates. At a time of econ
| | |
---
| |
---
| Freedom Virginia Congratulates Endorsed Candidates
---
| Friends--
After a landslide victory for affordability in this week's statewide and House elections, Freedom Virginia today congratulates all its endorsed candidates. At a time of economic turbulence nationally, and especially in Virginia, these candidates campaigned and won on lowering costs immediately, prioritizing hardworking families as the engine of the economy, and rejecting corrupt corporate interests. From the House of Delegates to the Governor's Office, Virginians chose to elect candidates who will ensure the middle class can get ahead.
Freedom Virginia co-Executive Directors Rhena Hicks and Ryan O'Toole released the following statement:
"We're energized by the outcome of yesterday's election and what it means for affordability in Virginia. Hardworking families are struggling to keep up with rising costs, and this election was a clear mandate that Virginians want pro-middle-class candidates who will put them first. Each of these candidates has shown they will fight for hardworking families. They will reject the priorities of corporations and the ultra-wealthy and stand up to President Trump and Congressional Republican pressure, which has been wreaking havoc on Virginia's economy through cuts to Medicaid and SNAP, and the longest federal government shutdown in history.
Virginians have made their feelings clear: it's about time we have leaders who will fight for a more fair and affordable Commonwealth. We're excited to work alongside the General Assembly, the Governor-elect, the Lieutenant Governor-elect, and the Attorney General-elect to turn voters' demands into reality in the 2026 legislative session by lowering the cost of prescription drugs, ensuring workers can take time off to care for themselves and their families, creating a more fair tax system, and expanding access to affordable housing."
In the 2025 elections, Freedom Virginia endorsed the following winning candidates in statewide and battleground House districts:
Statewide:

* Governor-elect: Abigail Spanberger
* Lieutenant Governor-elect: Ghazala Hashmi
* Attorney General-elect: Jay Jones

House of Delegates:
---
|
* Del. Josh Thomas (HD-21)
* Del.-elect Elizabeth Guzman (HD-22)
* Del.-elect John McAuliff (HD-30)
* Del.-elect Lily Franklin (HD-41)
* Del.-elect May Nivar (HD-57)
* Del. Rodney Willett (HD-58)
* Del.-elect Stacey Carroll (HD-64)
* Del. Joshua Cole (HD-65)
* Del.-elect Mark Downey (HD-69)

---
|
* Del.-elect Jessica Anderson (HD-71)
* Del.-elect Leslie Mehta (HD-73)
* Del.-elect Lindsey Dougherty (HD-75)
* Del.-elect Kimberly Pope Adams (HD-82)
* Del. Nadarius Clark (HD-84)
* Del.-elect Virgil Thornton (HD-86)
* Del.-elect Kacey Carnegie (HD-89)
* Del. Michael Feggans (HD-97)

---
| Freedom Virginia | P.O. Box 10102 | Norfolk, VA 23513 US
---
---

------------------------------------------------------------
By Seamus Othot on Nov 06, 2025 06:17 am
Rep. Jared Golden (D-Maine) will not seek re-election in the upcoming 2026 midterm elections, he announced on Wednesday, citing increased political polarization and rising political violence, including the assassination of Charlie Kirk, as reasons for his decision. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I wanted you to hear this directly from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
It’s Sherrod. I wanted to reach out personally and share some incredible news:
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3add78d6-8e6d-47f0-8c0e-bd00e16089ac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Hi, Peter, it’s Sherrod. I wanted to reach out personally and share some incredible news: A brand-new poll shows me leading my opponent Jon Husted – 49% to 48%. First, I want to say thank you. I got back in the fight to take on a rigged system that benefits the wealthy and well-connected, while working people pay the price. And this early momentum is a strong sign that our people-powered campaign is resonating with Ohioans. But here's the problem: The wealthy donors, the corporate special interests – they’re all panicking after seeing this poll. Last cycle, they spent more than $250 million against me, and they're gearing up to spend millions more to crush our momentum. We can't let that happen, Peter. They know as well as we do that we have what it takes to flip this seat, but it could all come down to resources. That’s why we set a goal to raise $50,000 before midnight to keep up our momentum, and I'm personally asking you to help us reach it. [Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can, split with Blue Amp Action, to help us fight back against the corporate special interests and win this race?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td120ca10-a5a5-44a9-8e9a-a81d2c30d4bf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’m so proud to have you on this team, Peter. In solidarity, Sherrod

[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2d303e97-41cd-4f6f-acdf-7cf464284b70/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| **Blue Amp Action**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208

| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T030ab66b-02a3-497c-9b62-f4105069a706/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

clean_body: It’s Sherrod. I wanted to reach out personally and share some incredible news: | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | Hi, Peter, it’s Sherrod. I wanted to reach out personally and share some incredible news: A brand-new poll shows me leading my opponent Jon Husted – 49% to 48%. First, I want to say thank you. I got back in the fight to take on a rigged system that benefits the wealthy and well-connected, while working people pay the price. And this early momentum is a strong sign that our people-powered campaign is resonating with Ohioans. But here's the problem: The wealthy donors, the corporate special interests – they’re all panicking after seeing this poll. Last cycle, they spent more than $250 million against me, and they're gearing up to spend millions more to crush our momentum. We can't let that happen, Peter. They know as well as we do that we have what it takes to flip this seat, but it could all come down to resources. That’s why we set a goal to raise $50,000 before midnight to keep up our momentum, and I'm personally asking you to help us reach it. I’m so proud to have you on this team, Peter. In solidarity, Sherrod | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | | Blue Amp Action PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | Paid for by Blue Amp Action | | or

This is Donald J. Trump. I just stepped out of a meeting with my top political team, and I'll tell you straight: what I heard is not good.

The Radical Left is pouring money and resources into these midterms. They want to take back control and destroy everything we've accomplished.

name: Ernest Lineberger
subject: Update from Ernest Lineberger, November 5, 2025 ​
body:
[image: image.png]

Hi Friends of Lineberger for US Congress!

*One year away from Election Day 2026, and what did we learn from last
night’s election?*

*Nationally, we did very well*. We elected a Democratic Mayor of New York
City, a Democratic Governor of New Jersey, a Democratic Governor of
Virginia, and maintained a Democratic majority on the Pennsylvania Supreme
Court. Mississippi voters even broke the Republican super-majority in the
state senate, flipping two deeply-red seats. California passed Prop 50 in
effort to offset the recent Texas re-gerrymandering of congressional
districts. Most importantly, exit polls in these states showed voters
considered the economy the most important issue facing the country, and
they voted accordingly.

*In Texas, it may be harder to say*. All 17 constitutional amendments
passed with strong margins. Texas Democrat groups mostly supported 8 of
those 17, but opposed 9. Half-full or half empty? Confusion or just big
Republican support? In LISD, we lost an experienced and effective school
board member to one propped up by a ridiculous fear and hate campaign that
was way off base. In Denton ISD, we passed a supported Prop A to better
fund schools. In Congressional District 18, if I understand it correctly,
we will have a run-off between two Dems? Still delaying filling this
congressional seat.

*What does this mean for TX-26*? In TX-26, some are feeling the economic
pinch and some aren’t. Some understand and care about the issues and some
don’t. Some are just tied to, or intimidated by, the Republican power
machine, such that we are not getting the natural alignment of Democratic
support across the board. Or it may be that midterms will bring the kind of
results we see in other states when we have candidates on the ballot, and
not just constitutional amendments (I certainly hope this is the case!).

Regardless, our messaging has to include: (1) What policies aren't working
in our day-to-day lives, (2) How our lives are affected, (3) What is our
plan to fix these broken policies, and (4) How will our lives improve. Too
often, we stop at (1) and don’t explain the (2)-(3)-(4). Meanwhile,
Republican Leaders continuously blame Dems for everything. Our windows of
opportunity to get our message across are few and far between. Not only do
we have to shatter the notion that we are evil, but we have to give the
full 1-2-3-4 and answer questions.

Overall, I’m more optimistic than ever. The American people stood-up to
tyranny in a powerful way yesterday, and we will do the same!

*What’s Next?*

The Primary election is March 3, 2026 with early voting starting February
17, 2026 (103 days away). We are going to push hard in primary season to
take every opportunity to get our message out.

*We have signs*.
If you have one, get it ready. 90 days prior to election day is
December 3, 2025. That’s when they can officially go up.
If you have extra, let people know. Find them a good home or make
a plan to put them in an allowed location.
If you need one, find me at an event or check with your County
Democratic Party office.

*We will be attending events*.
And it’s often useful to have extra hands to staff a table or show
increased support for the candidate. So, plan to come when you can.

*We will be Block Walking*.
This is more fun than it sounds. Front lines getting our message
out to the many who are unaware, making new friends and allies. Come join
us.

*We will be making calls*.
From the comfort of your own favorite spot, you can be the way our
message reaches others. You help them know and care enough to be part of
the difference.

*How To Get Involved - Volunteer! *

Thanks to those of you who have signed up already. Remember, there is no
obligation on your part. We will put your contact info on our volunteer
list.

>From time to time, when we have emerging needs for volunteers, we will send
out an email to the list saying what we need. If you can help with that,
you reply directly to the email. If not, no action needed on your part.
No need to apologize or send a doctor’s note.

To get on or make sure you are on the volunteer list, just reply to this
email with your preferred contact info.

We have a few champion volunteers now in continuing campaign roles. They
are helping to make events happen and finding more ways to reach more
voters. We always need help with schedule planning, social media coverage,
and more. It’s all part of being part of the solution.

*Donations!*

We are doing all we can to get donations to make sure we have the funds to
defeat Brandon Gill in November. Many of you have already donated. Thank
you! To donate again or to help someone else donate, use my main campaign
website: https://www.linebergerforuscongress.com/

*Upcoming Events: *

*Attorney General Debate & interview with US Senate Candidate Colin Allred *

- Sunday, November 9, 2-4 PM
- UNT Lyceum Theater, inside the Student Union, 1155 Union Circle,
Denton, TX 76201 - paid parking available in the Union lot by using the
Park Mobile app.
- https://www.mobilize.us/dentondemocrats/event/860877/
- *TBD on more events*
- Probably more on Veterans Day, nothing solid yet or it’s a private
event
- My Church is supporting LovePacs by doing 1600 boxes, and I’ve
signed up for various shifts with this effort Nov 14th – 18th.
- My Church has started a new food pantry operation with parking lot
pick-up on Wednesday, Nov 19th.
- Carrollton Dems, Nov 19th, evening, possibly at Nico’s?
- Block Walking with Lineberger for US Congress, Nov 22nd, probably
in Lewisville, details to come.
- Lineberger for US Congress signs start to go up, Dec 3rd
- Gainesville Christmas Parade, Dec 4th, TBD
- Ramp Project with Argyle UMC, Dec 5th
- Roanoke Hometown Holiday Street Festival, Dec 6th, TBD
- Cooke County Town Hall, Dec 10th, Gainesville, TBD
- Another food pantry operation with parking lot pick-up on
Wednesday, Dec 17th
- *Early November: A Decision on Redistricting in Texas*
- We should hear the court’s decision about redistricting.
- Will we be using the 2024 district boundaries or the newer and more
gerrymandered ones from the recent Texas special session?

*Holidays are approaching*

Whether you have big plans or not. Keep it safe. Take care of yourself in
travels and at home. Remember to reflect on our many blessings and be a
blessing to others.

Thank you so much for your continued support! We are building to make the
2026 election fall in the favor of the people.

Putting People’s Needs First,

Ernest Lineberger

Democratic Candidate for US House of Representatives (Texas CD26)

LinebergerforUScongress.com <http://linebergerforuscongress.com/>

name: Steve Scalise
subject: Words escape me Bombshell From Pam Bondi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is an UNPRECEDENTED breach of public trust

Words are escaping me right now, Friend...
Attorney General Pam Bondi found that the Biden Administration handed over President Trump's government-issued phone to the Special Counsel Jack Smith.
On top of that, Jack Smith subpoenaed all of President Trump's PERSONAL phone records.[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zccko94mg54psap4vtpekmmf6q864sijhamt3b00_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c5imaor1c9h2bs)This is an UNPRECEDENTED breach of public trust. This shows the SHOCKING extent of the Biden White House's weaponization of the federal government.**
**I 'll be perfectly clear with you: **
**The ONLY reason we know about any of this is because Republicans won the last election. **
**If we lost, the Democrats would have kept everything under lock and key. And if they take power again, the case will go cold and accountability will never come. **
**[That 's why I'm rushing to you in the wake of this breaking news. We urgently need your help to stop the Democrats from winning again and sweeping all of this under the rug.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6c2aflj8hvsm67lp627e114ac5t4d31dhv9ktao_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c5imaor1c9h2bs)**
**Ignoring this abuse of power only empowers those who perpetrated it in the first place! **
**I am personally asking for your donation because the next election is less than a year away and the Democrats are already hammering enough battleground states to win them control of Congress. And if they prevail:**
**They 'll take full control of Congressional committees...They'll refuse to subpoena witnesses... They'll stonewall our investigation... **
**The Biden Administration handed over the private data of your President - the odds Democrats will do ANYTHING about it are practically zero. **
**[So if you want REAL accountability for corrupt partisans spying on your President, I encourage you to donate now to elect Republicans in every swing race.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7d28t5cprfi1gcr6gkruua700i1ncs8revspt10_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c5imaor1c9h2bs)**
**Without your support, the Democrat Fundraising Machine will steamroll us. **
**No one would be happier than Jack Smith. No one. **
**For America, - Steve **
**STEVE SCALISE House Majority Leader
* * *
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zml0as4cv5ts9j538v2vfv50e090m1hdsu4br27g_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c5imaor1c9h2bs)We have spent weeks vetting and verifying the most committed MAGA Patriots from every corner of America.
The MAGA Roster is nearly full, don't miss your chance to have your name on it![CLAIM YOUR SPOT
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl69ocod4jfmst7boa5m05o1oogkuafeotugrh6o_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c5imaor1c9h2bs)In just 30 minutes, this portal will be locked and shared with President Trump's team.
This roster is reserved for the fiercest defenders of the MAGA movement. Those who are ready to help President Trump and Republicans ring in the Golden Age of America.| | |
