Fox News' Harris Faulkner **[took on an entire panel of Democrats](https://substack.com/redirect/5f995fd9-4e72-4e6d-8e3d-8256b6e178b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** blaming Republicans and Trump for the unending government shutdown affecting Americans' access to entitlement programs.
_" Can you defend starving people out?! Go ahead, defend that!!" _
**[Watch the clash here:](https://substack.com/redirect/5f995fd9-4e72-4e6d-8e3d-8256b6e178b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5f995fd9-4e72-4e6d-8e3d-8256b6e178b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/5f995fd9-4e72-4e6d-8e3d-8256b6e178b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Mamdani declares "mandate" for socialist agenda**
Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani told The New York Times **[he plans to take aggressive action](https://substack.com/redirect/2eb7093c-a4ee-49da-aeaa-4feb589005e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on his progressive platform, including taxing the rich, declaring "it is a mandate to deliver on the agenda that we ran on" after his election victory over former Gov. Andrew Cuomo.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2eb7093c-a4ee-49da-aeaa-4feb589005e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Democratic Socialists of America claim credit for win:** The DSA's NYC chapter co-chair Gustavo Gordillo called the victory "a clear mandate for a democratic socialist agenda," boasting that "MAGA billionaires spent millions to prop up Andrew Cuomo and try to stop this movement, but we've proved once again: they have money, but we have power."
* **Critics note dramatic shift in tone:** Critics raised alarm about Mamdani's post-election rhetoric, noting his "rage-filled" victory speech represented a "character switch" and was a "far-cry from the appeasing demeanor he tried to exude on the campaign trail," as the 34-year-old repeatedly insisted his win was a "mandate for change."
* **DSA members expected to infiltrate City Hall:** While Mamdani announced a transition team largely made up of veterans from Bloomberg, de Blasio, and Adams administrations without naming any DSA members, sources told The Post that the lefty group's card-carrying members were "crowing behind the scenes about soon infiltrating City Hall," with Mamdani saying his coalition will be "part of our transition."

* * *
**[Together with Logical Health Alternatives](https://substack.com/redirect/888da84b-4c04-4eef-8e9d-9970c8fd5db0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# A terrible secret was hidden in this Manhattan Project lab for 80 years...
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/888da84b-4c04-4eef-8e9d-9970c8fd5db0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Take a look at this circled window at Los Alamos Laboratory...
A stunning document commissioned by Robert Oppenheimer, father of the atomic bomb, was hidden here in 1945.
The US government denied its existence for 80 years...
**[But now, you can finally view the stunning truth for yourself right here.](https://substack.com/redirect/888da84b-4c04-4eef-8e9d-9970c8fd5db0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/888da84b-4c04-4eef-8e9d-9970c8fd5db0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Sen. Kennedy introduces bills to withhold Congressional pay during shutdown**
Louisiana Senator John Kennedy **[announced two bills](https://substack.com/redirect/202326ed-0511-4765-8dc1-d8e1c9830403?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on the Senate floor Wednesday to withhold paychecks from members of Congress during the government shutdown--one cutting pay with no back pay, and another placing salaries in escrow until the government reopens--saying "if we can't do our jobs and fund the government, we don't deserve a paycheck."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f11eeedf-7cac-4e56-9c33-a456895bd2a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Believes shutdown will continue "a while longer":** Despite "hearing a lot of rumors" about being close to an agreement, Kennedy said he doesn't believe they are close and expects to be "in shut down a while longer" as the shutdown enters Day 37 on Thursday, citing a 2013 precedent under President Obama when similar legislation prompted members to "find religion" and reopen the government.
* **Criticizes Democrats for using suffering as "leverage":** Kennedy said federal workers have borrowed $365 million during the 36-day shutdown just to pay rent, and unlike Democratic colleagues, he doesn't see "missing paychecks or empty dinner plates as leverage," referring to House Minority Whip Katherine Clark's admission that "families that are going to suffer" provide "one of the few leverage times we have" in shutdown negotiations.

* * *
# **Erika Kirk recounts the moments she discovered her husband had been shot**
Charlie Kirk's widow revealed in an emotional Fox News interview with Jesse Watters that **[she has never watched and never will watch video of her husband's assassination](https://substack.com/redirect/4c866465-d870-48d0-9862-8b3029beff8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, saying "there are certain things you see in your life that mark your soul forever" and she doesn't want her children to ever see it either.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/bb590293-20f7-41f4-831c-c36e16429ff8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Final morning together before tragic shooting:** The night before Charlie was killed, Erika and their daughter slept in the couple's bed while Charlie slept in their daughter's room to get a "good night's sleep" before his speaking engagement, with their final interaction being him grabbing his wedding ring and necklace before leaving without getting a goodbye kiss.
* **Learned of shooting while at doctor 's office:** While at a medical appointment with her mother in Arizona, Erika watched a video of Charlie tossing hats to the crowd at Utah Valley University moments before receiving a call from Mikey McCoy saying "Charlie's been shot," causing her to sprint out and "collapse in the middle of the parking lot" as Charlie was fatally struck in the neck by a single rifle round.
* **Insisted on seeing his body immediately:** Despite a police officer advising her to wait for the mortuary, Erika refused and said "I want to see what they did to my husband and I want to give him a kiss because I didn't get to give him a kiss this morning," finding him still warm with "a smirk on his face" that she interprets as saying "you thought you could stop what I've built...you got my body, you didn't get my soul."

* * *
# Nancy Pelosi announces retirement
Former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, D-Calif., announced **[she will not seek reelection](https://substack.com/redirect/b5f6100b-be78-4d4d-a0d9-59702a5d2352?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at the end of her current term Thursday, ending a nearly 40-year congressional career in which she became the first woman to serve as speaker.
Pelosi, 85, who represented San Francisco, served as the chamber's top Democrat from 2002 to 2022 and held the speaker's gavel from 2007-2011 and 2019-2023.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b5f6100b-be78-4d4d-a0d9-59702a5d2352?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

Pelosi, 85, who represented San Francisco, served as the chamber's top Democrat from 2002 to 2022 and held the speaker's gavel from 2007-2011 and 2019-2023. | | ---|---|--- Must Watch: Asking Wall Street traders if any of them beat Nancy Pelosi's portfolio " No one beat her, she's a crook!!" You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Politibrawl 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118783250/580876854/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjA4NWJhOS0yOWJiLWYwMTEtODE5NC02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qjg0QGPkh5OPWl3_B7rZdzh1GdPPRlV5F9eAGk0cHn8=)
**Friend — this is getting out of control.** The Trump administration has posted yet another partisan banner on a government website, this time on the official USDA page blaming Democrats for the government shutdown, cutting off SNAP benefits, and using dangerously dehumanizing language. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118783251/580876858/-1001495969?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjA4NWJhOS0yOWJiLWYwMTEtODE5NC02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qjg0QGPkh5OPWl3_B7rZdzh1GdPPRlV5F9eAGk0cHn8=&emci=60f92043-58ba-f011-8e61-00224824e08d&emdi=82085ba9-29bb-f011-8194-6045bda9d96b&ceid=26828920) They are lying to the public on taxpayer-funded websites. And it’s a **clear violation of the Hatch Act** , which prohibits partisan political activity by federal agencies. This is part of a disturbing pattern:

name: Defend our Courts
subject: Thanks to you, we had a massive impact in PA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V9brujZXY6DMwn_oB96nRwtOFDfORfImWEBUI4kYUiiqfs_rLIjvHcjZ52DevWlZy-b64LkyE41kTV531bfTqJqFck91Q0km3eSxNmBWOjuPLcUbbicT9BgemT2huVEzRyu-ntX4rxZCekc37fFZCFjE6fXmAeLq0t2VMwTURccFIFtQ4U4rL8vVQgguFaTUhhjBr6bpNN4IXy_RgRiHO3j79Ld1yoHxB5oroTQeUF0=&c=QC0leYGsoV-2IOx0AuNnXT84P8Fu8zfekDb41x9bFNAcWk6z7Nsnsg==&ch=kM_q9t7oPotAe1eP4qXLX9IIOKe23mdmK9qwldHGcIJoDXlVMiMXIw==)
---
| Peter,
For months, Defend Our Courts worked non-stop to rally Democrats to come to Pennsylvania's aid in this past Tuesday's Supreme Court retention election. Because of supporters like you, we grew to become one of the largest Democratic organizations involved in that race.
All of that hard work and contributions from our nearly 100,000 donors paid off--the three Democrats on PA's supreme court won massive victories, with each receiving a staggering 60% of the vote.
Because of you Defend our Courts was able to:

* Place six figure TV buys that ran non-stop in the run up to E-day
* Counteract GOP disinformation with direct mail to over 200k voters and 1.2 million texts
* Make over 13 million digital ads impressions encouraging voters to vote yes
* Knock over 100,000 doors across Philadelphia

And a closer look at the numbers today show the impact we had:
---
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V9brujZXY6DMwn_oB96nRwtOFDfORfImWEBUI4kYUiiqfs_rLIjvHcjZ52DevWlZy-b64LkyE41kTV531bfTqJqFck91Q0km3eSxNmBWOjuPLcUbbicT9BgemT2huVEzRyu-ntX4rxZCekc37fFZCFjE6fXmAeLq0t2VMwTURccFIFtQ4U4rL8vVQgguFaTUhhjBr6bpNN4IXy_RgRiHO91giAOXNHVKn7LovvfsjCE=&c=QC0leYGsoV-2IOx0AuNnXT84P8Fu8zfekDb41x9bFNAcWk6z7Nsnsg==&ch=kM_q9t7oPotAe1eP4qXLX9IIOKe23mdmK9qwldHGcIJoDXlVMiMXIw==)
---
|
In Philadelphia, where we concentrated a majority of our turnout efforts via canvassing, hyper-targeted digital ads, and TV cable buys, the Democrats won with an astronomical 86% share of the vote--by far the largest margin of any county in the state.
This margin alone erased any hope Trump and MAGA billionaires had of buying this court, and sent a statement across the country that the Democrats are back.
And we spent every last penny we had to make this possible.
After seeing the success we had, we want to carry this winning formula forward. With upcoming Supreme Court elections in other key swing states like Michigan, Arizona, and Georgia in 2026, there are still courts that need defending and the stakes will be just as high as PA's retention election.
With an expanded map and three elections at play on the same exact day, we have little time to soak in this victory--we're getting back to work.
But to be frank, we first need to pay off the remaining debt we owe and make our staff whole before we can start building for 2026.
We know we've asked a lot of you, but it's really important we start off our next fight on the right footing. [Will you pitch in whatever you can spare to help Defend Our Courts close the books on this race and expand our winning formula to even more states in 2026?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V9brujZXY6DMwn_oB96nRwtOFDfORfImWEBUI4kYUiiqfs_rLIjvHcjZ52DevWlZy-b64LkyE41kTV531bfTqJqFck91Q0km3eSxNmBWOjuPLcUbbicT9BgemT2huVEzRyu-ntX4rxZCekc37fFZCFjE6fXmAeLq0t2VMwTURccFIFtQ4U4rL8vVQgguFaTUhhjBr6bpNN4IXy_RgRiHO0ysH4mz1K_B-ONxN-j0bNw=&c=QC0leYGsoV-2IOx0AuNnXT84P8Fu8zfekDb41x9bFNAcWk6z7Nsnsg==&ch=kM_q9t7oPotAe1eP4qXLX9IIOKe23mdmK9qwldHGcIJoDXlVMiMXIw==)
---

With upcoming Supreme Court elections in other key swing states like Michigan, Arizona, and Georgia in 2026, there are still courts that need defending and the stakes will be just as high as PA's retention election. With an expanded map and three elections at play on the same exact day, we have little time to soak in this victory--we're getting back to work. But to be frank, we first need to pay off the remaining debt we owe and make our staff whole before we can start building for 2026. We know we've asked a lot of you, but it's really important we start off our next fight on the right footing. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == If you ask me, Peter we make a good team. PA's election results are proof of that. We would love to have you aboard for the next chapter. Team Defend our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE.

name: Sean Feucht
subject: Read my latest on Substack: The Right is arguing about Israel, so who should we listen to? Scripture.
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | We are at a critical moment. The conservative right—the loudest and last defenders of Israel—is fragmenting and devolving into contentious infighting. Division over whether to support Israel is crippling the movement and pushing conservatism into dangerous waters—waters unprotected by the favor of God, which He promises to those who bless Israel.

Just as Israel’s war against Hamas has wrapped up, a new front has opened. And the main combatants are right-wing thought leaders and podcasters.

This new attack Israel faces is much more dangerous than any attack from Hamas. There is a perceivable dark shift in the conversation about Israel. We have come to expect antisemitism from the godless left. But Republicans who put “God, Family, Country” on coffee cups, bumper stickers, and t-shirts are turning on Israel. Why? You are the Hope of America!

Dear Moms for America Family,

If you missed the first Hands of Heaven session on Monday — don’t worry! You can still join us for this powerful, one-time-only
4-week course with Kimberly Fletcher, Founder and President of Moms for America®.

In this first class, “The Powerful Influence of Mothers,” Kimberly shared stories and truths that remind us that a nation is but a
magnified home. From Noah Webster and Winston Churchill to modern voices of faith, we learned that:

* The future of America truly rests in the hands of her mothers.

* Every home is a seedbed of virtue, liberty, and hope.

* God has always used ordinary moms to change the course of history.

✨ The good news: If you register now, you’ll receive access to all the past recordings — so you can watch last week’s session and
join us live for the rest!

***

In this inspiring series, Kimberly shares stories, principles, and real-life examples that reveal how mothers have always been
God’s way of bringing healing and change to the world. You’ll discover:

* The powerful influence mothers have on the heart of a nation

* The true epic story of America and our divine heritage of liberty

* How today’s culture is reshaping our children—and what we can do about it

* How to raise patriots who will carry the torch of freedom forward

Each 60-minute session will uplift, educate, and empower you to make a difference right where you are—at your kitchen table, in
your community, and in your country.

DATES & DETAILS

* When: Every Monday in November, beginning November 4th

* Time: 5 p.m. Pacific, 6 p.m. Mountain, 7 p.m. Central, 8 p.m. Eastern

* Where: Online via live Zoom webinar—link provided upon registration.

THIS IS A ONE-TIME-ONLY EVENT

This special series will not be available on our website or in the MFA library.
The only way to experience Hands of Heaven is to register for the series before it ends on November 24th.

Don’t miss your opportunity to be part of this exclusive gathering of mothers standing together to heal America from the inside
out.

clean_body: Join hands with Kimberly Fletcher as she discusses our American history and heritage as we work to preserve freedom for ourselves and our children. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] You are the Hope of America! Dear Moms for America Family, If you missed the first Hands of Heaven session on Monday — don’t worry! You can still join us for this powerful, one-time-only 4-week course with Kimberly Fletcher, Founder and President of Moms for America®. In this first class, “The Powerful Influence of Mothers,” Kimberly shared stories and truths that remind us that a nation is but a magnified home. From Noah Webster and Winston Churchill to modern voices of faith, we learned that: The future of America truly rests in the hands of her mothers. Every home is a seedbed of virtue, liberty, and hope. God has always used ordinary moms to change the course of history. ✨ The good news: If you register now, you’ll receive access to all the past recordings — so you can watch last week’s session and join us live for the rest! In this inspiring series, Kimberly shares stories, principles, and real-life examples that reveal how mothers have always been God’s way of bringing healing and change to the world. You’ll discover: The powerful influence mothers have on the heart of a nation The true epic story of America and our divine heritage of liberty How today’s culture is reshaping our children—and what we can do about it How to raise patriots who will carry the torch of freedom forward Each 60-minute session will uplift, educate, and empower you to make a difference right where you are—at your kitchen table, in your community, and in your country. DATES & DETAILS When: Every Monday in November, beginning November 4th Time: 5 p.m. Pacific, 6 p.m. Mountain, 7 p.m. Central, 8 p.m. Eastern Where: Online via live Zoom webinar—link provided upon registration. THIS IS A ONE-TIME-ONLY EVENT This special series will not be available on our website or in the MFA library. The only way to experience Hands of Heaven is to register for the series before it ends on November 24th. Don’t miss your opportunity to be part of this exclusive gathering of mothers standing together to heal America from the inside out. Reserve your spot today! [] Whether you join from home or with friends, Hands of Heaven will remind you that your hands—the hands that serve, teach, and nurture—are the very hands God uses to heal nations. REGISTER [] LIKE WHAT WE DO? Your tax-deductible gift to Moms for America® will help support us in our mission to Empower Moms, Promote Liberty, and Raise Patriots! DONATE TODAY [] Moms for America® Empowering Moms, Promoting Liberty and Raising Patriots! PLEASE CHECK OUT MOMS FOR AMERICA'S UPCOMING EVENTS! [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. name: Defend our Courts
subject: Thanks to you, we had a massive impact in PA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jpSreZGBQh3EMI10bkNdXpw2Bibpi6ARb7je8z-nztikovN_Q4mLChq48fypui3AbcUW7DJ1VisEcnsESEwA4ZE6gZ6i3fElRUeDUDip_kL01QGqOIu630sketdHOebhwSKWP5RuwwPIic7m7qd4VDgJpXCAu8nz1aVnbT-ldjpIaAP1i-h_N53Jhd4rojKC9paYdLQfsXq5Sr8iLX6d-GRXsa3TlRPaJiKEHLwSPxA=&c=mnKXichgwjsJyLMphi4i0mspqzqDfV--uUCfmGgaQVpAlZvPXEt-OA==&ch=PKCz6lLOG0lp2JbDx8xnDZwBINorJ9xQH_rs4edhlAQF29DqKQOFyg==)
---
| Peter,
For months, Defend Our Courts worked non-stop to rally Democrats to come to Pennsylvania's aid in this past Tuesday's Supreme Court retention election. Because of supporters like you, we grew to become one of the largest Democratic organizations involved in that race.
All of that hard work and contributions from our nearly 100,000 donors paid off--the three Democrats on PA's supreme court won massive victories, with each receiving a staggering 60% of the vote.
Because of you Defend our Courts was able to:

* Place six figure TV buys that ran non-stop in the run up to E-day
* Counteract GOP disinformation with direct mail to over 200k voters and 1.2 million texts
* Make over 13 million digital ads impressions encouraging voters to vote yes
* Knock over 100,000 doors across Philadelphia

And a closer look at the numbers today show the impact we had:
---
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jpSreZGBQh3EMI10bkNdXpw2Bibpi6ARb7je8z-nztikovN_Q4mLChq48fypui3AbcUW7DJ1VisEcnsESEwA4ZE6gZ6i3fElRUeDUDip_kL01QGqOIu630sketdHOebhwSKWP5RuwwPIic7m7qd4VDgJpXCAu8nz1aVnbT-ldjpIaAP1i-h_N53Jhd4rojKC9paYdLQfsXq5Sr8iLX6d-OtykIZgn1ZBu0W1bVSE5-c=&c=mnKXichgwjsJyLMphi4i0mspqzqDfV--uUCfmGgaQVpAlZvPXEt-OA==&ch=PKCz6lLOG0lp2JbDx8xnDZwBINorJ9xQH_rs4edhlAQF29DqKQOFyg==)
---
|
In Philadelphia, where we concentrated a majority of our turnout efforts via canvassing, hyper-targeted digital ads, and TV cable buys, the Democrats won with an astronomical 86% share of the vote--by far the largest margin of any county in the state.
This margin alone erased any hope Trump and MAGA billionaires had of buying this court, and sent a statement across the country that the Democrats are back.
And we spent every last penny we had to make this possible.
After seeing the success we had, we want to carry this winning formula forward. With upcoming Supreme Court elections in other key swing states like Michigan, Arizona, and Georgia in 2026, there are still courts that need defending and the stakes will be just as high as PA's retention election.
With an expanded map and three elections at play on the same exact day, we have little time to soak in this victory--we're getting back to work.
But to be frank, we first need to pay off the remaining debt we owe and make our staff whole before we can start building for 2026.
We know we've asked a lot of you, but it's really important we start off our next fight on the right footing. [Will you pitch in whatever you can spare to help Defend Our Courts close the books on this race and expand our winning formula to even more states in 2026?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jpSreZGBQh3EMI10bkNdXpw2Bibpi6ARb7je8z-nztikovN_Q4mLChq48fypui3AbcUW7DJ1VisEcnsESEwA4ZE6gZ6i3fElRUeDUDip_kL01QGqOIu630sketdHOebhwSKWP5RuwwPIic7m7qd4VDgJpXCAu8nz1aVnbT-ldjpIaAP1i-h_N53Jhd4rojKC9paYdLQfsXq5Sr8iLX6d-ElPGGy8Jlkt45qklO54DSM=&c=mnKXichgwjsJyLMphi4i0mspqzqDfV--uUCfmGgaQVpAlZvPXEt-OA==&ch=PKCz6lLOG0lp2JbDx8xnDZwBINorJ9xQH_rs4edhlAQF29DqKQOFyg==)

name: Haley Stevens
subject: Tuesday night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
what Tuesday night means for our race in MI

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1302%2E49239%2E3wZWWW)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8095?t=2&akid=1302%2E49239%2E3wZWWW)
---
null,

Tuesday night was historic. Across the country, voters turned out in record numbers for an off-year election – **and they _overwhelmingly_ rejected Donald Trump’s chaos. **
This is big. It sends a clear message to Trump: Americans are sick of the rising costs. And Democrats are fighting back.

Tuesday night proved what I already knew – we can take back the Senate in 2026. And it all starts right here in Michigan.
null, we can win this battleground race. But I need you with me.

Right now, I’m statistically tied with Trump’s handpicked MAGA candidate, Mike Rogers. He’s already raised $5 million from GOP megadonors and dark-money super PACs.
I don’t have – or want – a bunch of billionaire pals. I’ve got you. And that’s exactly how I want to win.

But here’s the hard truth: To reach voters across Michigan with our winning message, our campaign needs resources.
I’m asking, personally, null: **[Will you chip in $5 now to help power this grassroots campaign, reject Trump’s chaos, and keep Michigan blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8060?t=3&akid=1302%2E49239%2E3wZWWW)**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8052?t=4&akid=1302%2E49239%2E3wZWWW)
---
With grit and gratitude,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8097?email=&zip=&t=5&akid=1302%2E49239%2E3wZWWW) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8095?t=6&akid=1302%2E49239%2E3wZWWW)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=7&akid=1302%2E49239%2E3wZWWW)

33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: The Turning Point USA Team
subject: His words are now our mission
body:
Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on.

| | |
---
Friend,Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1kvg0khljbu0bghj4l1tvas876d9pn3thdl74ao_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c5hmcpr2cdh2bs)
---
Today, Turning Point USA wants to send it to you for FREE when you make a gift of any amount to carry Charlie's mission forward.
---
[ **Make My Gift &**
**Claim My FREE Book**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9hivhgkfgjr00n9vcqqnlu9injd46bhp05v2vt0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c5hmcpr2cdh2bs)
---
Friend, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcb0b4j3b0rgb1pp3k5b407sj8n3u9vqtu1i4c0o_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c5hmcpr2cdh2bs)
---
Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. [**Make your gift to join Turning Point USA today, and we'll send you your FREE copy of ****_How We Win_**** today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo8h9vc35gjtm2f93g60o2tosltthg62149ul928_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c5hmcpr2cdh2bs)

---
Together, we can make sure his mission doesn't just survive... But that it multiplies. Let's keep the fire going. Let's honor Charlie's legacy. Let's win. **For Charlie,** **The Turning Point USA Team**

#### _**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio. Paid subscribers make it all possible--just $8/month if you're down to support 👇](https://substack.com/redirect/0021f379-a5f5-4624-98c0-92d2c0080dfc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/0021f379-a5f5-4624-98c0-92d2c0080dfc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
I went live this morning with my friend **Simon Rosenberg** from _Hopium Chronicles_ , and we got personal, political, and real about what this moment means. Pelosi's retirement. A generational handoff. And a not-so-subtle "blue tsunami" sweeping across the country.
* [**00:01:07**] Simon on Pelosi's legacy--first female Speaker, and why her orderly handoff to Hakeem Jeffries is the model for generational change.
* [**00:05:22**] Abigail Spanberger, Mikie Sherrill, Maine, Pennsylvania, California--why those results matter and what they reveal about Trump's collapsing agenda.
* [**00:10:15**] Youth and Hispanic voters snapping back toward Democrats--and how that reshapes the map in TX, AZ, NV, GA, and NC.
* [**00:15:40**] Governing from strength: tariffs, ACA subsidies, ICE funding--why Schumer and Jeffries need to press the advantage and make the harms of Trump's agenda the center of the fight.
* [**00:20:55**] Strength vs. weakness: voters need to _see_ us fight. No complacency, no cave-ins--just discipline, wins, and momentum through 2026.

_**[If this conversation speaks to you, become a paid subscriber. It's $8/month and it helps us keep building something that breaks through the noise -- a studio built for impact, not vibes -- so we can keep having real talks about strength, leadership, and the future we're building together.](https://substack.com/redirect/0021f379-a5f5-4624-98c0-92d2c0080dfc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
With urgency,
--Mike

name: Hickenlooper, John
subject: Sagebrush Stout, anyone?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
I couldn’t miss this opportunity to talk about Colorado beer:

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118786900/580888332/1435897075?refcode=email_110625_stout&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmFlY2NmNy0yZGJiLWYwMTEtODE5NC02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6yfWVGKdQU4EeYbvJlVsZ_-7HczuiaBRtI9JMz6MX1I=&emci=167b778d-28bb-f011-8194-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6baeccf7-2dbb-f011-8194-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7280715) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118786901/580888335/910623595?amount=15&refcode=email_110625_stout&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmFlY2NmNy0yZGJiLWYwMTEtODE5NC02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6yfWVGKdQU4EeYbvJlVsZ_-7HczuiaBRtI9JMz6MX1I=) Howdy, It’s **International Stout Day** , and I couldn’t miss my opportunity to tell you a little bit more about something near and dear to my heart: Colorado beer. Can I tell you a quick story? Many of you now know me as one of Colorado’s U.S. Senators, some of you know me as your former governor, and some of you might even remember me as Denver’s mayor – but before I ever ran for public office, we opened Colorado’s first brewpub in downtown Denver: Wynkoop Brewing Company. At Wynkoop, we were known for our unique beers like the Sagebrush Stout, (“with just the faintest hint of a prairie bouquet”), or Timberline Pale Ale, (“where the work of man leaves off and that of God begins”). We offered each for just $2.25 per pint. But Wynkoop was more than just a business for me. It was a place where people from all backgrounds and opinions could come together and discuss issues facing our community. We often seemed to get deeper into an issue over a pint of fresh Colorado beer. That’s the very same reason I ran for office - to find consensus and make things happen. And in the Senate, I’ve been focused on exactly that, so we could deliver real, impactful change for all Americans. **We have so much more work to do to protect our democracy, preserve our public lands, and save our country from the serious threats we’re facing.[_So today, I’m asking you to contribute $5 to our cause – the tab of two Wynkoop beers back in the day – to help me win reelection and keep up the good fight in the Senate._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118786902/580888337/910623595?amount=5&refcode=email_110625_stout&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmFlY2NmNy0yZGJiLWYwMTEtODE5NC02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6yfWVGKdQU4EeYbvJlVsZ_-7HczuiaBRtI9JMz6MX1I=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118786903/580888338/910623595?express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&refcode=email_110625_stout&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmFlY2NmNy0yZGJiLWYwMTEtODE5NC02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6yfWVGKdQU4EeYbvJlVsZ_-7HczuiaBRtI9JMz6MX1I=)
---
Raise a glass, and here’s to making a difference together!
Thanks,
John
| **_A note from John Hickenlooper:_**

I’m fighting every day to deliver for Colorado — to protect our public lands, strengthen our economy, and stand up to MAGA extremists who want to roll back our progress.

**We can’t afford to let them win.** We don't take a dime of corporate PAC money, so your grassroots support keeps this campaign strong and independent. | [CHIP IN → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118786904/580888339/-1031542050?refcode=footer&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmFlY2NmNy0yZGJiLWYwMTEtODE5NC02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6yfWVGKdQU4EeYbvJlVsZ_-7HczuiaBRtI9JMz6MX1I=)

name: Team Walz
subject: She’s already seeking Trump’s endorsement
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
We have to be ready to act fast and keep Tim’s campaign strong.
#
Peter, in case you missed it, MAGA extremist and Minnesota House Speaker Lisa Demuth announced her campaign for governor this week.
[](https://act.timwalz.com/go/134?t=1&akid=54%2E34582%2EmtspWA)
**[Will you rush a donation now to make sure we have the resources to stop her?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251106.jQL_ln&amount=5&refcode=em20251106-54&t=2&akid=54%2E34582%2EmtspWA)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251106.jQL_ln&amount=5&refcode=20251106-54&t=3&akid=54%2E34582%2EmtspWA)**
If Demuth becomes the Republican nominee and wins this race, it would devastate so much of the progress we’ve made under Tim’s leadership.
**Her far-right agenda would raise costs, underfund our schools, and ban abortion — and she already said she’ll seek the endorsement of Donald Trump.**
This isn’t some random candidate out of left field, Peter: she’s the highest-ranking Republican in our state legislature. Republicans could consolidate support around her and spend big money to help her unseat Tim.
If we’re going to keep the MAGA agenda out of the governor’s office and keep putting Minnesota values first, we have to be ready to act fast and keep our campaign strong over the course of this next year, no matter what comes our way.
**[We’re counting on grassroots support to be the difference maker in this race. If you have Tim’s back, chip in $5 today to help us reach the voters we’ll need to win next November.](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251106.jQL_ln&amount=5&refcode=em20251106-54&t=4&akid=54%2E34582%2EmtspWA)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251106.jQL_ln&amount=5&refcode=20251106-54&t=23&akid=54%2E34582%2EmtspWA)**
Thank you,
Team Walz

Under Governor Walz’s leadership, Minnesota is showing the world what’s possible when we come together with grit, compassion, and a shared sense of purpose.
We secured free school meals for every student, cut child poverty, passed Paid Family Leave, delivered record investments in education, and more.
**[Now we need your help to stop MAGA Republicans from dragging us backward. Pitch in $5 today to help us win this race and keep moving forward — together.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251106-54&t=24&refcode2=54_34582_mtspWA&akid=54%2E34582%2EmtspWA)**
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251106-54&t=25&refcode2=54_34582_mtspWA&akid=54%2E34582%2EmtspWA)**
Email us: [info@walzforgovernor.org](mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

subject: Thank you, Nancy!
body:

---

# [Thank you, Nancy Pelosi!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5176ca60-5fa1-4953-ad57-b126d8adb5e6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | After decades of service, and after making history on many fronts, Representative **Nancy Pelosi announced she will retire from Congress after the current term.** Please join us in thanking her, and wishing her the best as she moves on to new chapters in her incredible life story. name: Shontel Brown
subject: How are we feeling today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118787417/580890155/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_251105Results_SB_6_90DO_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2JhYmJlZC0yZmJiLWYwMTEtODE5NC02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R8Ei_u8BnGMak670xepRL6UAmWwbvJT2df-hLeX_Vq8=) Peter,

How does that BLUE WAVE feel? 🌊🌊🌊🌊🌊🌊 On Tuesday, voters turned out to make their voices heard against the Trump regime by electing Democrats up and down the ballot and across the nation. From Virginia and New Jersey to New York, California, Michigan, and beyond, the people voted for a future that works for everyone, not just a select few.

Democrats saw historic wins everywhere because of people like you.

**Trump thinks America can be bought and paid for, but our message is clear: The people are ready to stand up for healthcare, food security, affordability, and more, and AGAINST tyranny.**

[**In 2026, we must be prepared to demonstrate the same determination at the ballot box to secure a Democratic majority in Congress. Will you rush $5 to keep up the progress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118787419/580890159/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_251105Results_SB_6_90DO_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2JhYmJlZC0yZmJiLWYwMTEtODE5NC02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R8Ei_u8BnGMak670xepRL6UAmWwbvJT2df-hLeX_Vq8=)

To progress,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?

Peter, We're less than 1 year out from the most important Senate race of the 2026 elections, and the stakes could not be clearer: **_We must defend Georgia’s blue Senate seat._** National Republicans see an opening here in the Peach State to maintain their iron grip on power. That’s why they’re gearing up to spend millions of dark-money dollars to confuse Georgians and suppress our votes. We can’t afford two more years of Republicans controlling both chambers of Congress and acting as a rubber-stamp for Donald Trump’s authoritarian agenda. We’re working around the clock to build the infrastructure to fight back: recruiting volunteers, engaging people at the doors, and mobilizing Georgia Democrats to the polls. But Peter, this race will be close and expensive. We need all the help we can get, and we need it now. [Can we count on you to rush $10 to build our war chest and power our win in 2026?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118787535/580890655/-2004472022?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_110625_1YEAR_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjg2YWMzNy0zMGJiLWYwMTEtODE5NC02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f2p9Hf4wOuydYwTkMXwJ8o6y_2GY88HOpp2xFEL1Q2Y=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Republican super PACs are already __spending tens of millions__ to keep control of the Senate. Recent reports show that Donald Trump has “secretly been spending” in races across the U.S. The GOP is targeting our most vulnerable Democrats — and if we don’t match their spending with grassroots power, we risk losing everything we’ve fought for.
We have less than 60 days left to close the year strong. Less than 60 days to show the GOP that Democrats are ready to fight — and ready to win.
We know your inbox is going to be flooded over the next two months, but it isn’t just noise. Every email, every call to action and every dollar counts in this fight.
**As Chair of the DSCC, Kirsten’s leading the charge to protect vulnerable seats, recruit strong candidates and give Democrats the tools to win – but she can’t do it on her own.**
Every dollar you give today helps fund the grassroots organizing, digital ads and rapid response efforts that will determine whether we win or lose the Senate in 2026.
_If we fall behind now, the consequences could be devastating._
**But if we step up, we can build the foundation for a Democratic Senate majority — one that will protect reproductive freedom, defend democracy and deliver real results for working families.**
[**_So please, dig deep and chip in whatever you can to help Democrats fight back and flip the Senate blue:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118787690/580890865/-510661250?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.06_Sixty-Days_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDY4NzY1Ni0zMGJiLWYwMTEtODE5NC02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SKXF8sShxtB47ruab-zP6Ff-iv1qnWb8s7AcSlliu98=)

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: Americans made their voices heard
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
the momentum is on our side

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118787812/580891428/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjJmYmRlNTUtMzFiYi1mMDExLTgxOTQtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VuQaparEDuA4wW4n8gn_u7lwDGxut70DtZ9zQBjbcpk=) On Tuesday, Americans across the country showed up and made their voices heard. From New Jersey to Pennsylvania to Virginia, voters delivered big wins for Democrats, and chose to reject the disastrous leadership of Trump and National Republicans. Americans proved that they’re ready for a new path forward: one that puts hardworking people first and delivers meaningful change for our families and our communities. The results show that the momentum is on our side. With less than a year to go until the midterm elections, we have to keep building on this moment. Together, we have the power to defend OR-05, do our part to help Democrats flip the House, and get to work fighting for a better, brighter future for our state and our country in Washington. [_**But Republicans are going to double down on their efforts to defeat me and keep control of the House. In order to win this critical race, I’m counting on the support of this grassroots team. name: Crow HQ
subject: The longest shutdown in American history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Team — Republicans’ government shutdown is officially the longest federal shutdown in American history. This is how the GOP “governs.”

Government employees haven’t received their paychecks in weeks.

Everyday Americans who rely on SNAP and WIC benefits are struggling to put food on the table without them.

And health care premiums will be through the roof because the GOP majority refused to extend the subsidies in the Affordable Care Act.

While his Republican colleagues in Congress are taking a 47-day (and counting) vacation, Jason is working to put your voice front and center and bring Colorado values to Washington.

Jason wants to hear directly from you about how you've been impacted. Will you take our November Survey today? [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/112025-survey]

TAKE THE SURVEY [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/112025-survey]

Together we can build an agenda that works for working people.

Thanks for your support,

Team Crow

Greenwood Village, CO 80112

In my life, I've been a combat pilot and an astronaut. I'm a father, a husband, a grandfather, and a senator. And now, I'm honored to be one of your DSCC Vice Chairs, working to win back a Democratic Senate majority.

**Through it all, I've learned the importance of asking for help when it's needed — _especially_ when faced with a difficult situation.**

**[So I'll be blunt with you:_Your country_ needs your help right now to flip the Senate blue >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251106-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251106-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&akid=21676%2E9716520%2EwaoMAb)**

| [DONATE $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=13&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251106-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251106-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&akid=21676%2E9716520%2EwaoMAb)
---

Falling short of that mission is _not an option_ if we want to stop Donald Trump's chaotic and illegal acts. **But Democrats are facing two serious challenges that could keep us out of the majority:**

1. National Republicans just spent over $500 million to take back the Senate, and now they're saying they'll spend at _least_ that much on just TWO of their top target races.

2. Trump now controls _all_ the power of the American presidency, and he's using it to attack and intimidate people into silence — making our job as Democrats even harder.

**We need an _immediate_ surge of resources to fight back and win.** But right now, we're falling short of our critical $50,000 fundraising goal. And at this crucial early stage in the fight, failure to launch would spell disaster.

**[So I'm humbly asking you: Will you chip in $5 today to help us flip the Senate? Your contribution before midnight would mean the world to me>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=14&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251106-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251106-MarkKelly-KellyFlagVCRF-Pros-sl1&akid=21676%2E9716520%2EwaoMAb)**

name: House GOP War Room
subject: Peter, we need to have a very serious discussion.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
You’re our last hope for victory, Peter.

name: Michael Bennet
subject: re: Donald Trump's shutdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
As 1 in 5 children go hungry, he's throwing Great Gatsby-themed parties.
| | |
---
We're now in the sixth week of the GOP's shutdown, friend – but I don't think President Trump cares about reopening the government at all.
**Because he's throwing Great Gatsby-themed parties** _... as troops and civil servants who protect the American people and our vital programs go unpaid._
**He's flooding U.S. markets with 80,000 metric tons of beef from Argentina, on top of a promised $40 billion bailout to the foreign nation** _... as ranchers in Colorado and across the country struggle to stay afloat._
**He's demanding the Justice Dept. fork over $230 million for daring to investigate** him****_... as the average Colorado consumer comes to grips with the price tag on their health premiums doubling (or worse) in the new year**.**_
**And he's bulldozing the East Wing to build a $300 million (and growing) golden ballroom in its place** _... as tens of millions of America's poorest kids and families are needlessly deprived of food for his party's political games._
**Now more than ever, it seems like the only thing President Trump cares about is himself.**
And the more he treats the executive mansion like his personal Palace of Versailles, the less working Coloradans can afford to wait for the solutions to our biggest problems to come from Washington.
**As governor, protecting the well-being of every person who calls our state home will be my _only_ priority:** Because with a wannabe king in the White House who's entirely detached from reality, the solutions we actually need will only start here, with us, in Colorado.
But unlike the Oval Office's current occupant, I don't have billions of dollars to buy this race. That means I can't win without folks like _you_ fighting alongside me.
**_[So friend, can I please count on you to pitch in $5, $25 or anything you can spare to my campaign today? Together, I know we can make Colorado the beacon of hope against Trump's chaos that our nation desperately needs and make it the best state to live, work and raise a family.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118789800/580898073/43140476?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk974-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTUyYzViYi0zMmJiLWYwMTEtODE5NC02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rd519XOHkc7iCV3A4hfMMiP0iBstASMTWXDGIrm0Hoo=)_**

He's demanding the Justice Dept. fork over $230 million for daring to investigate him**... as the average Colorado consumer comes to grips with the price tag on their health premiums doubling (or worse) in the new year. And he's bulldozing the East Wing to build a $300 million (and growing) golden ballroom in its place ... as tens of millions of America's poorest kids and families are needlessly deprived of food for his party's political games. Now more than ever, it seems like the only thing President Trump cares about is himself. And the more he treats the executive mansion like his personal Palace of Versailles, the less working Coloradans can afford to wait for the solutions to our biggest problems to come from Washington. As governor, protecting the well-being of every person who calls our state home will be my only priority: Because with a wannabe king in the White House who's entirely detached from reality, the solutions we actually need will only start here, with us, in Colorado. But unlike the Oval Office's current occupant, I don't have billions of dollars to buy this race. That means I can't win without folks like you fighting alongside me. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for everything, Michael | Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States Paid for by Bennet for Governor. Registered Agent: Tracie Moore.** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution. name: Ashley from Team Taylor
subject: Looking ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
Every conversation, every headline, and every ounce of attention in Wisconsin will soon turn to our Supreme Court election in April.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251106-790&t=1&akid=791%2E294397%2EJF0JJk)
Hey team,
Now that Election Day is behind us, it’s time to look ahead.
**Every conversation, every headline, and every ounce of attention in Wisconsin will soon turn to our Supreme Court election in April.**
We have just five months to reach voters across the state and make sure they understand what’s at stake — from reproductive freedom to workers’ rights.
Judge Chris Taylor has the experience and perspective to serve Wisconsinites from our state’s highest court. She’s spent her career standing up for fairness, protecting people’s rights, and making sure everyone gets a fair shot in our legal system.
All that stands in the way of electing her next April is our extreme opponent, Maria Lazar, and the far-right special interests backing her.
By pitching in today, you’re helping us defeat the dark money coming from the other side and elect Judge Chris Taylor. Can we count on your support?
[**Click here to start a monthly recurring contribution.**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/189?c0=em_ms_jct_20251106_1_ak.lRIwzz&amount=10&refcode=em20251106-790&t=3&akid=791%2E294397%2EJF0JJk) Recurring gifts help us plan ahead and make sure we have the resources to meet every challenge between now and April.
[**Or, click here to give a one-time donation to support Judge Chris Taylor.**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251106_1_ak.QdDgd1&amount=10&refcode=em20251106-790&t=4&akid=791%2E294397%2EJF0JJk) Every bit of support goes a long way in a race this competitive.
Thank you,
Ashley
Campaign Manager
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251106-790&t=5&refcode2=791_294397_JF0JJk&akid=791%2E294397%2EJF0JJk)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Email us: [info@chrisforjustice.com](info@chrisforjustice.com)

PO Box 1921
Madison, WI 53701

name: EMILYs List
subject: We won on Tuesday. And we have the blueprint to win in 2026.
body:
Democrats' path to winning back power is built on a foundation of EMILYs List women. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118790604/580901170/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEK17_20251106_BlueprintRollout_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1057307&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2U4Y2VmNi0zMmJiLWYwMTEtODE5NC02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nx4_M_Mk8xfz9MqTny9KI5ivPiTeQedCUrRUBF3nfjs=) 🚀 LAUNCHING: Blueprint to Win EMILYs List's **Blueprint to Win** is a data-driven, strategic plan, rooted in the fundamentals of winning campaigns. It will leverage the lessons from our 2025 election wins into taking back the U.S. House and securing crucial state centers of power in 2026 and beyond.

[**Donate to help execute our blueprint to take back power:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118790607/580901173/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEK17_20251106_BlueprintRollout_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1057307&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2U4Y2VmNi0zMmJiLWYwMTEtODE5NC02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nx4_M_Mk8xfz9MqTny9KI5ivPiTeQedCUrRUBF3nfjs=) | [TAKE BACK POWER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118790610/580901177/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEK17_20251106_BlueprintRollout_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1057307&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2U4Y2VmNi0zMmJiLWYwMTEtODE5NC02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nx4_M_Mk8xfz9MqTny9KI5ivPiTeQedCUrRUBF3nfjs=)
---
Peter,

The results of the 2025 elections confirmed what we've always known: **When Democratic pro-choice women lead, we win**. From school boards to governors' offices, voters responded to candidates who are rooted in their communities and focused on the issues that matter most.

That's why today, we're launching **EMILYs List's Blueprint to Win** — a data-driven, strategic plan to turn the momentum from our 2025 victories into major wins up and down the ballot in 2026 and beyond.

This Blueprint is built on the fundamentals that have powered our hardest-fought wins:
* **Community-based recruitment:** The strongest leaders come from the communities they represent. We are actively recruiting and endorsing bold candidates who are deeply connected to the challenges their communities face — and are ready to lead.

* **Research-driven strategy:** In the aftermath of the 2024 election, EMILYs List Action conducted a comprehensive national research project to understand the real economic pressures voters are experiencing — and what they want from Democratic leadership. This research shapes how we recruit, message, and mobilize to win.

* **Campaign support from day one:** No campaign is one-size-fits-all. Our staff partners directly with candidates and their teams — often from the day they launch to the moment polls close — helping build operations, sharpen messaging, and drive turnout. We don't just endorse. We build winning campaigns.

This is how we take back the U.S. House.
This is how we secure state power.
This is how we win in 2026 — and beyond.

But we must scale this work now, because the path to victory runs directly through the organizing and candidate support we build over the next 365 days.

clean_body: Democrats' path to winning back power is built on a foundation of EMILYs List women. | = 🚀 LAUNCHING: Blueprint to Win EMILYs List's Blueprint to Win is a data-driven, strategic plan, rooted in the fundamentals of winning campaigns. It will leverage the lessons from our 2025 election wins into taking back the U.S. House and securing crucial state centers of power in 2026 and beyond. = | = Peter, The results of the 2025 elections confirmed what we've always known: When Democratic pro-choice women lead, we win. From school boards to governors' offices, voters responded to candidates who are rooted in their communities and focused on the issues that matter most. That's why today, we're launching EMILYs List's Blueprint to Win — a data-driven, strategic plan to turn the momentum from our 2025 victories into major wins up and down the ballot in 2026 and beyond. This Blueprint is built on the fundamentals that have powered our hardest-fought wins: Community-based recruitment: The strongest leaders come from the communities they represent. We are actively recruiting and endorsing bold candidates who are deeply connected to the challenges their communities face — and are ready to lead. Research-driven strategy: In the aftermath of the 2024 election, EMILYs List Action conducted a comprehensive national research project to understand the real economic pressures voters are experiencing — and what they want from Democratic leadership. This research shapes how we recruit, message, and mobilize to win. Campaign support from day one: No campaign is one-size-fits-all. Our staff partners directly with candidates and their teams — often from the day they launch to the moment polls close — helping build operations, sharpen messaging, and drive turnout. We don't just endorse. We build winning campaigns. This is how we take back the U.S. House. This is how we secure state power. This is how we win in 2026 — and beyond. But we must scale this work now, because the path to victory runs directly through the organizing and candidate support we build over the next 365 days. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you for standing with us. There is much more to come. – the EMILYs List Campaigns Team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Kamala Harris
subject: So what do we do, Peter?
body:
One year ago, I got the call that I was not going to win the election.
I walked down the stairs to my family in shock. All I could do was repeat, over and over, _“What will happen to our country?”_
As I have heard these last few months from people across our nation and around the world, many of you felt the same way.
Over the past year, we have seen Donald Trump use the presidency to line his own pockets and enrich billionaires; target SNAP, Medicaid, and programs for our veterans; terrorize our immigrant communities; deteriorate our national security; and put our economy at risk of recession. I could go on. And I fear it may get worse before it gets better.
I predicted all of it. I warned of it. What I did not predict: the capitulation. The number of people who have bent the knee at the foot of a tyrant has been profound.
**So what do we do, Peter?**
**The answer for how to move forward will not come out of Washington, D.C.. The change that we want and the improvement that we need must come from the people.**
And the people are already speaking. Millions of Americans have taken to the streets in protest out of love of our country and belief in its promise. Millions more headed to the polls on Tuesday to resoundingly elect local Democratic leaders who will fight for progress in their communities.
We must harness that power to come up with a blueprint for our government that truly works for the American people. We must continue speaking out and listening when the people say, "This is how I want my government to work for me."
My work now is focused on amplifying those voices and uplifting the next generation of leaders as we continue this fight. We have some serious work to do to reimagine our vision for our country, and I need you with me, Peter.
[**So I am humbly asking: Will you mark one year into this next chapter by making a donation to support my work today? Every donation sends a powerful message that the people will not give up on our country.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ftp-em?refcode=em251106&refcode2=784_2563979_k-8VL3&akid=784%2E2563979%2Ek-8VL3)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ftp-em?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em251106&refcode2=784_2563979_k-8VL3&akid=784%2E2563979%2Ek-8VL3)**
---
****
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ftp-em?refcode=em251106&refcode2=784_2563979_k-8VL3&akid=784%2E2563979%2Ek-8VL3)**
---
****
We will not retreat from this fight. It may take a while, but the fight for our country is always worth it. And we _will_ win.
Thank you and care,
Kamala
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ftp-em?refcode=em251106&refcode2=784_2563979_k-8VL3&akid=784%2E2563979%2Ek-8VL3)

The mission of KDH For The People Inc. is to strengthen communities across America through the promotion of economic opportunity, justice, and protection of fundamental freedoms.
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. Thank you so much for being a supporter. But we don't want to bother you. If you’d like to unsubscribe, you can **[click here.](https://harris.actionkit.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=784%2E2563979%2Ek-8VL3)**
clean_body: One year ago, I got the call that I was not going to win the election. I walked down the stairs to my family in shock. All I could do was repeat, over and over, “What will happen to our country?” As I have heard these last few months from people across our nation and around the world, many of you felt the same way. Over the past year, we have seen Donald Trump use the presidency to line his own pockets and enrich billionaires; target SNAP, Medicaid, and programs for our veterans; terrorize our immigrant communities; deteriorate our national security; and put our economy at risk of recession. I could go on. And I fear it may get worse before it gets better. I predicted all of it. I warned of it. What I did not predict: the capitulation. The number of people who have bent the knee at the foot of a tyrant has been profound. So what do we do, Peter? The answer for how to move forward will not come out of Washington, D.C.. The change that we want and the improvement that we need must come from the people. And the people are already speaking. Millions of Americans have taken to the streets in protest out of love of our country and belief in its promise. Millions more headed to the polls on Tuesday to resoundingly elect local Democratic leaders who will fight for progress in their communities. We must harness that power to come up with a blueprint for our government that truly works for the American people. We must continue speaking out and listening when the people say, "This is how I want my government to work for me." My work now is focused on amplifying those voices and uplifting the next generation of leaders as we continue this fight. We have some serious work to do to reimagine our vision for our country, and I need you with me, Peter. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | We will not retreat from this fight. It may take a while, but the fight for our country is always worth it. And we will win. Thank you and care, Kamala KDH For The People Inc. is a nonprofit social welfare organization that is exempt from federal income tax under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Please note that contributions to this organization are not generally tax-deductible. The mission of KDH For The People Inc. is to strengthen communities across America through the promotion of economic opportunity, justice, and protection of fundamental freedoms.

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: Voters deserve to know who’s really making the decisions
body:
| | Let’s be honest, Peter – If you showed up to work and couldn’t do your job, someone would notice. But in Congress, there’s no process, no transparency, and no accountability when that happens.

That is why I introduced an amendment to strengthen ethics standards related to Members’ cognitive ability. Voters deserve to know their elected representative is actually doing the job they were sent to do – not their staff.

[I need to know where you stand on this issue, Peter. Take this short survey and share your thoughts about making Congress more transparent and accountable:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118791594/580904738/-922442932?refcode=MGP_EM_SV_180DO_251106_1_1&refcode2=c6c947d4-34bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmM5NDdkNC0zNGJiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xVIfbvQMSHQIy6_ke9TV84wxyFgb7ePTY3aRVTRV9kk=&emci=86f7fc4a-8fba-f011-8e61-00224824e08d&emdi=c6c947d4-34bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&ceid=31138575)
| **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118791596/580904740/-922442932?refcode=MGP_EM_SV_180DO_251106_1_1&refcode2=c6c947d4-34bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmM5NDdkNC0zNGJiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xVIfbvQMSHQIy6_ke9TV84wxyFgb7ePTY3aRVTRV9kk=&emci=86f7fc4a-8fba-f011-8e61-00224824e08d&emdi=c6c947d4-34bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&ceid=31138575)**
---

This isn’t about age or partisanship. It’s about trust and good governance, and making sure the people you elect are the ones actually making decisions.

I hear it from neighbors and constituents all the time: they’re worried that some offices are being run by unelected staff instead of the representative voters chose. That’s a real problem.

My amendment would create a clear, bipartisan process for the Ethics Committee to review cases where a Member’s mental fitness seriously affects their ability to serve. It gives voters clarity, not chaos. [Take our quick survey and let me know what you think:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118791598/580904741/-922442932?refcode=MGP_EM_SV_180DO_251106_1_1&refcode2=c6c947d4-34bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmM5NDdkNC0zNGJiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xVIfbvQMSHQIy6_ke9TV84wxyFgb7ePTY3aRVTRV9kk=&emci=86f7fc4a-8fba-f011-8e61-00224824e08d&emdi=c6c947d4-34bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&ceid=31138575)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118791599/580904743/-922442932?refcode=MGP_EM_SV_180DO_251106_1_1&refcode2=c6c947d4-34bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmM5NDdkNC0zNGJiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xVIfbvQMSHQIy6_ke9TV84wxyFgb7ePTY3aRVTRV9kk=&emci=86f7fc4a-8fba-f011-8e61-00224824e08d&emdi=c6c947d4-34bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&ceid=31138575)**
---

Whether it’s cutting through bureaucracy or calling out dysfunction, I’ll keep fighting for transparency, accountability, and a Congress that looks like the people it represents – working parents, people from the trades, and small business owners who understand what real life looks like.

– Marie

name: Pennsylvania Working Families Party Team
subject: 🌟 WOW! We just made history in Pennsylvania— and across the country!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Working Families Party
body:
| | | Peter, **WOW. What. A. Night.** On Tuesday, working families across Pennsylvania — and across the country — rose up and won. **This wasn’t just another Election Day. It was a grassroots earthquake, and Pennsylvania was right at the center of it.** Together, we proved that when our communities organize, we can take on billionaire money, corporate power, and right-wing extremism — and win.
* * *
**Here’s what you made happen:** 🏛 We protected our courts from billionaire takeover. Voters said no to corporate power and yes to fair courts that put people before profits. 🗳 Lehigh Valley went worker-strong. Rep. Josh Siegel won Lehigh County Executive — proving that bold, pro-worker politics can win in the heart of a swing county. 🙌 Erie flipped! First-time candidate Christina Vogel unseated a right-wing incumbent to become County Executive — a grassroots victory that shows what people power can do. ⚖️ Philadelphia chose justice. Voters re-elected Larry Krasner, keeping fairness and reform at the forefront in our largest city. 🌟 Communities won power. Dozens of PA WFP candidates won up and down the ballot, proving that people-powered politics is winning all across Pennsylvania. And as if that wasn’t enough, WFP candidates won big nationwide — with massive wins for progressive voices in every corner of the country. We’re proud to be part of this movement — and to see Pennsylvania help power a national wave of wins.
* * *
**The power behind the win:** These victories didn’t come from billionaires or big PACs. They came from you and from the movement we’ve built across Pennsylvania. In 18 counties, WFP organizers and local leaders worked side by side with their neighbors: knocking doors, making hundreds of thousands of calls, and running the biggest grassroots effort in the state. That’s how this happened — because no one gave up on what mattered most.
* * *
**Keep the momentum going:** We’ve seen what’s possible when we organize, but the work doesn’t stop here. To keep winning for working families, we have to stay in the fight all year long. Dues-paying members make that possible — fueling voter outreach in swing counties, helping elect local champions who share our values, and training the next generation of election captains ready to lead their communities forward. **[If you can, become a dues-paying member of the Pennsylvania Working Families Party today with a recurring contribution of $10 or more a month, and help us keep building.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt1KgGElNLHWwWbO_pXXNSCZf33XK6BQV0cLfl1l-6hfN2mdn9LEw_OoIVo-19VERxkvbvc06PCP3Z14ZdhDpJbhL-TUX08yp2fSj9aJtaclMi22nrbyYFFhosM5ze_J1288Ady73mNefkVIQg37oOYoECn2JvgkrkbEttERvba8sNA2FRyOGzrgvS6ynXxrM8w3XffI8P53d_NbcaBOXida5mB_UyqfEH-7eB8gAwWXcFU_M89EyANI2N_-q7HeUvJDEFRvqw6EdAQUdPjNeeKLzvpVLwF9eBJnKdyEVD0mWCL1ej4znY-7IXAcuVqsI0o02Ovxesdf3JQ6gsFoTTmNSZW5D5JDg0xIfdFPTWm7_8fKT6cs65FYUx0tTK5b3UzZ1jGhpZ4SmfUeDAaagdRZs040ZRL-owEwcrRcMY0bw5ELRm_wtMyrncHDz-fTsEw5bFh4-FFr_5eC9WxLmqR/4ld/gRfynSZXQyOaBo04JbuQ3Q/h0/h001.73gIkwsBQQvLMgiyRYsHfBWSJ7gNCdqJgXhhJSd3xcM)** **[Become a dues-paying PAWFP member](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt1KgGElNLHWwWbO_pXXNSCZf33XK6BQV0cLfl1l-6hfN2mdn9LEw_OoIVo-19VERxkvbvc06PCP3Z14ZdhDpJbhL-TUX08yp2fSj9aJtaclPJ4Z9z-XtL1m01gJoAk0neowWfhhbOPd0MKxWbcZvfcHkcOVII46b5ZhTBi5Hw6vwvTAMVT38zIcA_7oD7IJsaSOy6OWc1S9IlXJInrmFp1r6OQSj0FUgGeJG9CPSTwndCimB8_Fths7zf7Cth0xVEJC0OkzjZwBkWYNoJGT5VJbbdDO2J0opocsbiDCubK3U06Dkj_H6ZIl6os-WSYNmloWAsRaKl2lkMZDB_8Nka29CqvUH6U9LkM-OCkwoiYKjehn0FYllG8Sbr7515zUC0FzbVq9-nd0Co-qXPGC5HMS6JOjacbGan3kixPcg12dtHkg5VIoXh07-EcuoRG0etIYPm1kD-ExoQMUvZnqn1A/4ld/gRfynSZXQyOaBo04JbuQ3Q/h1/h001.UIyYk3IgWTAB_92zWsirdErWtSpUlKOfCG7AViqajb8)** And whether you give today or have already shared your time, heart, or energy — thank you. ❤️ Let’s celebrate this win, and keep building a Pennsylvania that works for all of us. name: Mark, NRCC HQ
subject: The Last of Us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I thought we had something special.

Dearest Friend,**
**I'm sitting here in the darkness, surrounded by the shadows of what could have been. **
**The weight of disappointment is crushing me, and I'm struggling to find the words to express the pain I'm feeling.**
**Your House GOP membership... it's expiring. **
**And I'm left wondering... what went wrong?**
**You were a dedicated House GOP Member for 4 years. Please tell me that this isn 't the end. **
**We thought we had something special. We thought we were fighting for the same values, the same ideals. But now, it seems like you're just... gone.**
**Time is running out. Please, I beg of you... don't let our House Majority fade away. Renew your membership now, and let's rekindle the flame that once burned so brightly.
**[Please, renew your House GOP Membership today!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2upgpuqvhcqcp57in26jiti2eodcq0jeebqfur0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2c5hmepj2chh2bs) It's the last time I'll ask. **[RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP >>
