name: Tom Fitton
subject: I think I know why
body:
Your Judicial Watch just filed a major new FOIA lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice to expose yet another Deep State scheme to bring down President Trump.

| [ | |
---
|
--- ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77607&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2) |
---
| Dear Fellow American,

As a follower of Judicial Watch’s work, I know you care deeply about honest elections and the rule of law. And I truly appreciate you reading my updates on the impact our donors create.
_But my records (if they’re correct) show you have never taken the step to make a financial contribution yourself._
I think I know why...
Because you may believe one of the two big misconceptions people often have about Judicial Watch:

1. **You may think Judicial Watch is funded by legal settlements, or that our clients pay us.

**
2. **Or you may have doubts on whether your gifts actually made a difference.**

The truth is, _we don 't charge our clients a dime_. _And your gifts DO make an impact_. We rely almost entirely on voluntary gifts from citizens like you. Those gifts are what fuel our investigations and lawsuits.

And it’s why I’m writing today: to ask you to become a financial supporter of Judicial Watch yourself.
The threat to fair elections is growing.
"Dirty" voter rolls -- filled with names of people who've died or moved -- are rampant in states across the nation and are an open invitation to voter fraud. (Oregon, for example, has more names on its voter rolls than living eligible voters -- another Judicial Watch case.)
And Leftists are still pushing to expand reckless "Covid-era" policies like mass mail-in ballots and the elimination of ID and residency rules -- making it easier to commit fraud and harder to detect it.
**But your Judicial Watch is fighting back in court. And we 're winning**:

* In Pennsylvania, officials admitted they removed 178,258 ineligible registrations after our lawsuit.
* In Los Angeles County, we forced the removal of over 1.2 million ineligible names; the largest voter roll cleanup in U.S. history.
* These are just two of several states. All told, our legal efforts have helped remove more than **5 million** outdated registrations across multiple states.

And we're not stopping.
We're now even before the U.S. Supreme Court, challenging illegal attempts to extend Election Day in the highest court in the land.
We're uncovering evidence of non-citizen voting and election mismanagement.
We've defended voter ID laws, gained access to corrupted voter rolls, and broken through legal resistance in some of the worst-run election systems in the country.
**You see, while others talk, Judicial Watch acts**.
Thanks to your past support, we've built one of the most effective legal operations in the conservative movement, _and we 're the only organization consistently using the courts to force real reform_.
But we can’t expand any of this work as much as it deserves without you.
_[Please join Judicial Watch as a financial supporter by making your most generous tax-deductible gift today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77607&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)_.
| [ Make a Gift Now to Keep Judicial Watch Fighting in Court for Your Rights and Freedoms ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77607&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---
The gifts of citizens like you mean everything. Literally. Donors are the reason Judicial Watch has been able to assemble the strongest election integrity legal team in the country.

_[Your gift will help us continue our lawsuits to defend election](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77607&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)_ integrity and force government transparency.

I don't know if I'm right about why you haven't given in the last 12 months. But if I am, I hope this message has helped answer your questions.

_[Your financial support really does matter](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77607&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)_ and with all that's at stake it's vital.

Either way, I hope you'll consider rejoining our cause and standing with us as we battle the lawless Left and the corruption they're unleashing across the country.

Because with you back on our team, I know we can keep winning.

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President, Judicial Watch

P.S. Your renewed support now will fuel Judicial Watch's continued fight for honest elections and the rule of law! _[Please join the fight](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77607&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)_!

clean_body: Your Judicial Watch just filed a major new FOIA lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice to expose yet another Deep State scheme to bring down President Trump. | | | Dear Fellow American, As a follower of Judicial Watch’s work, I know you care deeply about honest elections and the rule of law. And I truly appreciate you reading my updates on the impact our donors create. But my records (if they’re correct) show you have never taken the step to make a financial contribution yourself. I think I know why... Because you may believe one of the two big misconceptions people often have about Judicial Watch: 1. You may think Judicial Watch is funded by legal settlements, or that our clients pay us. 2. Or you may have doubts on whether your gifts actually made a difference. The truth is, we don 't charge our clients a dime. And your gifts DO make an impact. We rely almost entirely on voluntary gifts from citizens like you. Those gifts are what fuel our investigations and lawsuits. And it’s why I’m writing today: to ask you to become a financial supporter of Judicial Watch yourself. The threat to fair elections is growing. "Dirty" voter rolls -- filled with names of people who've died or moved -- are rampant in states across the nation and are an open invitation to voter fraud. (Oregon, for example, has more names on its voter rolls than living eligible voters -- another Judicial Watch case.) And Leftists are still pushing to expand reckless "Covid-era" policies like mass mail-in ballots and the elimination of ID and residency rules -- making it easier to commit fraud and harder to detect it. But your Judicial Watch is fighting back in court. And we 're winning: In Pennsylvania, officials admitted they removed 178,258 ineligible registrations after our lawsuit. In Los Angeles County, we forced the removal of over 1.2 million ineligible names; the largest voter roll cleanup in U.S. history. These are just two of several states. All told, our legal efforts have helped remove more than 5 million outdated registrations across multiple states. And we're not stopping. We're now even before the U.S. Supreme Court, challenging illegal attempts to extend Election Day in the highest court in the land. We're uncovering evidence of non-citizen voting and election mismanagement. We've defended voter ID laws, gained access to corrupted voter rolls, and broken through legal resistance in some of the worst-run election systems in the country. You see, while others talk, Judicial Watch acts**. Thanks to your past support, we've built one of the most effective legal operations in the conservative movement, and we 're the only organization consistently using the courts to force real reform. But we can’t expand any of this work as much as it deserves without you. . | The gifts of citizens like you mean everything. Literally. Donors are the reason Judicial Watch has been able to assemble the strongest election integrity legal team in the country. integrity and force government transparency. I don't know if I'm right about why you haven't given in the last 12 months. But if I am, I hope this message has helped answer your questions. and with all that's at stake it's vital. Either way, I hope you'll consider rejoining our cause and standing with us as we battle the lawless Left and the corruption they're unleashing across the country. Because with you back on our team, I know we can keep winning. Sincerely, Tom Fitton President, Judicial Watch P.S. Your renewed support now will fuel Judicial Watch's continued fight for honest elections and the rule of law! ! | | Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 Third Street SW, Suite 800 Washington, DC 20024 ©2025, All Rights Reserved Judicial Watch is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. subject: Covid Lies Exposed, the Silent Epidemic of Lung Cancer Killing Women, and Much More at This Week’s MAHA Media Hub
body:
We only have until November 7th to fight back. Make your voice heard NOW.

| | | [ ](https://www.mahaaction.com/?e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_hub_recap_251106_engage3&n=1)

### MAHA Warriors,
We usually start these recaps with a win for the movement, but this week, **we need your help**. Big Chem is lobbying the EPA to rewrite a critical rule that would let them flood our environment with dangerous, barely tested chemicals. **We only have until November 7th** to fight back. Make your voice heard NOW.
---

---
This week’s MAHA Media Hub brought passionate voices, big revelations, and critical next steps for our movement — and if you couldn’t join live, we’ve got you covered.
* **Sen. Rand Pau** l made it clear he and his team are still investigating the true origins of COVID and won’t stop until those who lied to the American people are held accountable.
* **Shira Boehler** shared a personal story about being perfectly healthy before being diagnosed with lung cancer — a silent epidemic among women that few are talking about.
* **Kevin McKernan** discussed his shocking discovery that the COVID vaccines given to the public were not the same as the ones tested in trials.
* **Dr. Robert Malone** talked about how the recent elections prove just how powerful and influential the MAHA movement has become across the country.

And we also heard from **Dr. Oz** , **Dr. Eric Berg** , **Calley Means** , **Russell Brand** , and many others on the everyday MAHA issues and updates you’ll only find on our Media Hub call.
### 🎥 Watch the full Media Hub 👇

[ ](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=1AJnCcoGtHYftrUTYBwtFCx8DyQCP1kqjikxsNlK4eedNGaYNbzL7jcZ0BFhT05S&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_hub_recap_251106_engage3&n=3)
---
## Action Items
### Keep MAHA’s Message Growing Online
Mainstream media wants to silence us, but MAHA supporters reach millions every week. We need your help to keep that momentum going. Every post, like, and comment pushes our message further and shows that the people control the narrative now.
---
| [](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=42XIdAn1v5Cn5XbOMM8DvykVJRHNHHJGnYoE097Oz01oCQIATIKJDJc7OHgiKKD8mV1bMyBHNRl_JdBISnlC-jDZYZHL8_kyaeFHk3MSsqZ4F5S3k9CtBKgR1iYFm5631_MT9L_p_rHM1gj1xql00w&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_hub_recap_251106_engage3&n=4 "DOWNLOAD THE TOOLKIT") [DOWNLOAD THE TOOLKIT](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=42XIdAn1v5Cn5XbOMM8DvykVJRHNHHJGnYoE097Oz01oCQIATIKJDJc7OHgiKKD8mV1bMyBHNRl_JdBISnlC-jDZYZHL8_kyaeFHk3MSsqZ4F5S3k9CtBKgR1iYFm5631_MT9L_p_rHM1gj1xql00w&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_hub_recap_251106_engage3&n=4)

### Track MAHA Policy and Take Action
Stay up to date on key MAHA-related bills across the country. The MAHA Legislative Tracker shows what is happening, where it is happening, and how you can make a difference. [Open the Tracker →](https://www.mahaaction.com/lawmakers?e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_hub_recap_251106_engage3&n=5)
### Read the MAHA Report on Substack
For in-depth MAHA coverage and breaking updates from some of the best writers in the medical freedom space, The MAHA Report is your trusted source. [Subscribe to the MAHA Report →](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=CjIPhRT4CzYYH7usCPIijxK54GDZUZAqQjCCk5hNXuc&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_hub_recap_251106_engage3&n=6)
### **Stop Playing God with the Sun**
Taxpayer money is being used to fund Solar Radiation Modification, a reckless experiment that sprays chemicals into the atmosphere. Join Senator Doug Mastriano and Stand for Health Freedom in demanding that President Trump end this program and protect our skies. [Take Action →](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=gYUPsZlV8vQD3dzXxGaMj-SUMeW-TJmJOB-9bPZ2kaA-Owj3C41WCminNG1It-Ok&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_hub_recap_251106_engage3&n=7)
### CHD Conference: “Moment of Truth” (Nov 7–9, Austin, TX)
The live event is sold out, but you can still join online. This is the biggest medical freedom event of the year, featuring top speakers, panels, and in-depth conversations about health, freedom, and reform. [Register to Attend Online →](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=BsTYGKGf-NTU8je-toJfMy_A4yDvnZRudn00QkiebyDSqcWRJicP8QqXBxeIhmbaifAt0sttGU-Mt4lGdtAFxfAbOJvx9Z_QO9NouRfssA4&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_hub_recap_251106_engage3&n=8) A lot of political movements come and go, but MAHA has proven it is here to stay. It might seem like progress is slow, but the small changes we are making today will make our country unrecognizable in just a few years and save countless present and future lives. See you next week,
**The MAHA Action Team**

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY
body:
We rested on our laurels after our big victories in 2024, and now we're paying the consequences. |
Enough with the premature obituaries.
** The Democratic Party is back.**

- Hakeem Jeffries
This is what the Left is saying after Tuesday night's victories.

And, they are right, Fellow American. _We came up short._

We rested on our laurels after our big victories in 2024, and now we're paying the consequences.

_But here's the good news, Fellow American..._

**...we still have time to build our grassroots efforts before the mid-term elections. And I know we won't let the Left catch us flat-footed again.**

There's just under one year until Election Day 2026, and I know that we have what it takes to win a historic election for President Trump and our America First agenda.

I am determined to keep Texas RED and keep the Attorney General's office in the hands of conservatives.

But here's the reality: Democrats are going to be emboldened by these wins. They are already pouring millions into Texas. **That's where you come in, Fellow American.**

We cannot wake up on November 4, 2026, with these same headlines, wishing we had done more. We need to start TODAY.

clean_body: We rested on our laurels after our big victories in 2024, and now we're paying the consequences. | Enough with the premature obituaries. The Democratic Party is back. - Hakeem Jeffries This is what the Left is saying after Tuesday night's victories. And, they are right, Fellow American. We came up short. We rested on our laurels after our big victories in 2024, and now we're paying the consequences. But here's the good news, Fellow American... ...we still have time to build our grassroots efforts before the mid-term elections. And I know we won't let the Left catch us flat-footed again. There's just under one year until Election Day 2026, and I know that we have what it takes to win a historic election for President Trump and our America First agenda. I am determined to keep Texas RED and keep the Attorney General's office in the hands of conservatives. But here's the reality: Democrats are going to be emboldened by these wins. They are already pouring millions into Texas. That's where you come in, Fellow American. We cannot wake up on November 4, 2026, with these same headlines, wishing we had done more. We need to start TODAY. I know a lot is asked of you, but I need your help. Let's make sure we have the funds to win next November. Thank you, Chip Roy Member of Congress Republican for Texas Attorney General P.S. Tuesday night was rough. But it's time to move on and look to November 2026. We must lay the groundwork TODAY. | | PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

body:
Zohran is a bold democratic socialist like me, and he overcame billionaire interference to become NYC’s next mayor. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW8OBSpHJC1W-Hp9Yknqm1HWzLbEHRk2We9jECrHosDDFzqBcENXWxG9QF93t67fkQG-ChqQ14-cX1Advbjr-tjKsuYWZtz3X3mbu6GQ2rnYOmDxA_SYLLS9Jk8oAdG2VNI9yprs1hS5eGN315Bzh5ZigTP_ygGTvvMKL3fTLMPmB8KOmh0kjKg13MqwaRO3U0/4ld/YmTmgFHzR867A97xOzmxhw/h0/h001.O3tdYoR79SQSvtwZucSLEihZdJhwbvYlH5XIod7RLZA)
---
Friend, I’m so pleased to share that we had a progressive sweep yesterday: Democratic governors won, Californians voted to counter Republican redistricting in Texas, Colorado residents voted to raise taxes on wealthy households to fund free breakfast and lunch for public school students, and **Zohran Mamdani won his race for New York City’s mayor**! In NYC’s biggest election turnout in more than 30 years, more young residents under the age of 30 voted than ever before—even though this is an off-year election. Some of the local candidates I endorsed also won by large margins, including democratic socialists Denzel McCampbell and Gabriela Santiago-Romero, who ran against corporate Democrats for Detroit City Council. **These victories show that when we energize our base and focus on direct conversations with potential voters, we can defeat the billionaire and corporate interests that too often control our politics.** Over 100,00 volunteers for Mamdani’s campaign knocked on over 1 million doors. Folks are fired up! And because the mayor of NYC represents more people than most senators, Zohran will set precedents nationwide. Zohran is a bold democratic socialist like me, and for years we’ve been standing up together for human rights in the U.S. and abroad. **His win opens the door for more candidates like us to run and win across the country.** In late 2023, I was proud to join Zohran as he led a hunger strike in front of the White House demanding a ceasefire in Gaza (photo below). Since January 2024, I’ve sent emails fundraising for Zohran—and YOU responded, supporting his campaign from early on. Thank you! Neither of us take money from corporate PACs, so every grassroots donation makes a difference. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt6HU2GGd4HxcKZcvLVaIzK3sbcwX9_YxcEdF5mYMD-QIN5KvB0wBbSLJOYp1V3JR2PIG9_PP-kalO6Pe5PMukyWioBDLcHP40I7Vu1_gwLbq1KLPJtfUAhC1foMHdZJwe5Wdsdf6qOziPAizbW6hiVwlPbPcfKAm8_CJumiUhcY1vPp7Vni4fURRql94LW-D1mTYD80_xNIIdrUYc4M1YZ3EAbJLGfLcw0IUQWBiLKNot9fU4aGzJ8yTPVcVgtPSYoX_zob_ARTKComOefprkDFKGY4cTH5ZYcXfMRAkRrd3o8TEDqF9EVHY2uaDgcxL8x60KIhVVlm4N3rLC8GDRIic-bfPE9N1nRT8Qv9Ylmkw/4ld/YmTmgFHzR867A97xOzmxhw/h1/h001.qX9cevMusKkpJHcbPjqIIkNWR-PH6RDF9rPRGpytGp0) [**Can you chip in to my re-election campaign today to show that our democratic socialist and progressive power is growing? Together, we can build the government that we deserve.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt6HU2GGd4HxcKZcvLVaIzK3sbcwX9_YxcEdF5mYMD-QAtL0iXmgwFazGLifenLlkOj53rjid9ur5SBMwA2yXLGYyG8hbjSAnXHsAE-1ujlxXK4AbIDfTsD0kfQcTr7fZXGptjGpsxkTxz1KZM8CU6dBO5ml_n1wBUNG9hCZpSKk_NGbNEMaulnUN752PwoLCLy6asbKJGh0nrV8YU3cWE4RzYQPRmkG4mfLUMRdFUsgJ4nsZo10_0Kmr-I6GoZcpaIi4no6whJE_W65gI-P8FCTcyJhM0qWRAaNgI3IreYJuPU1fj3G7Yac3ZrGnROnUXkC_GaP8sLOGWSlsBJDcpzJj4MLCDhiENsaR7lMbAsVA/4ld/YmTmgFHzR867A97xOzmxhw/h2/h001.AXRHhCA-p0bi-aapReFPhFJ3chGVqdUzRd82Zk2nt1w) | [CHIP IN TODAY](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt6HU2GGd4HxcKZcvLVaIzK3sbcwX9_YxcEdF5mYMD-QE2EZnJA4yueyCehqjftrWgr7AFX_Li57L_UH3XI_YSvkZaWnBXazcnG2qhejuFCmYuFItr4ji7Y10ZiUuDoq-lYNdXJtj_aQ0WaVjNS2DCSdyFvxhPyhE4AGElj-y-1RqA9LVEmAU32tHYgobSs8GhErk_suNbdUlZQZa-C2DEqC-GpsI1Z7t3ksilXafJUwMTRoVvq1BU_lLkOcJeGrdF0eF7_6dhfVGAZpFfkp8ILRSXyM_qPCq9gs99CmdIA8oWsKZ0QP76x5-EnTKvwzrpA3NOXWCSMKQt1Sah2KPevcsV_wmgyeHs2WUXTdoNOrQ/4ld/YmTmgFHzR867A97xOzmxhw/h3/h001.WZi28_gh2p0S7RHSQ9xFcP1LV5dR7SGOD6PG5GbFszs)

This summer, I joined my Muslim colleagues in Congress to speak out against the hateful, anti-Muslim, and racist smears from our colleagues on both sides of the aisle who’ve attacked Zohran. Those attacks have grown in recent months, as media outlets like the _New York Times_ and billionaire-funded attack ads spread Islamophobic fearmongering.
But the people saw through these tropes and saw a candidate who’s going to support _every single one_ of his constituents, no matter their backgrounds. They saw someone who will actually fight for the working class, who will address our affordability crisis, and who will push for the bold policy changes our communities need.
Zohran has proven his effective leadership as a state representative, including making bus routes free throughout the city and leading a 15-day hunger strike with NYC taxi drivers to secure more than $450 million in transformative debt relief.
**Unlike many elected officials, Zohran understands how urgently people need change.** He—and the movement supporting him—are working toward a city and a world where everyone can live a dignified life, regardless of background, identity, or zip code.
**Zohran’s win affirms that we can build multi-racial, multi-faith, and cross-class solidarity to overcome the growing billionaire interference in our elections.** Muslims, immigrants, and people of all backgrounds belong here, including in the halls of power. This sends a message to Democratic leaders that they must pay attention to and work hard for everyday Americans of all backgrounds, rather than corporate donors.
Even though Zohran won the Democratic primary election by more votes than any prior mayoral candidate in the city, **AIPAC-funded corporate Democrats in national leadership refused to endorse him.** They decided they could overlook Cuomo’s racism and track record of sexual harassment because they wanted to maintain the unjust status quo. _One ended up endorsing him but said that he’s “not the future of the Democratic party.”_
They’re out of touch. **We need to transform the Democratic Party to win against fascists and to be the party of the people—and candidates like Zohran are an essential part of making that happen.**
[**Can you chip in today to build on this momentum and ramp up our push for a party and a government that serves**** _all_****Americans—not just billionaires?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt6HU2GGd4HxcKZcvLVaIzK3sbcwX9_YxcEdF5mYMD-QIDXH4mXXuTNrjgYIMAp3EtFRcfi-P2atkGcV85yrz56-U7q4dvBkdsZzgcCN1TtAgTu6-1aw_P4e7wHv8cGOvvq2_DaXNbMWnjhl1T7oIzIzmgv0n1WKwg6IREhzdV_2r88NlqAK53s-_SS1AwZt9y8vXyXz0kx9EagUG2u_lU3AWFNMXjxaIgbuUxMxSyzdXuRE6Mzs3AIndljCv9SxMyl99Hfbz8gjgIOd7unea9fF0uSzWbRYJ4ocYDYoBUNuYE3pQ2Iear2ge1ircMEC0hXMt1Sl7F6fxAZSdG9vBgZotopb2-4eAxANOwsyKABIg/4ld/YmTmgFHzR867A97xOzmxhw/h4/h001.PxqxQMrJFupDM0q_K25gTYqVI6Vl9tQ30pB1XiYPeN8)

For years, establishment Democrats have tried to move farther right, alienating our base more and more. This is a losing strategy, and it endangers and abandons the most vulnerable Americans.
Instead, Democratic candidates and leaders must listen to our base and make the changes that people need.
For example, Democratic voters (and people across political parties) overwhelmingly want to end U.S. support for Israel’s human rights abuses—unlike Zohran’s Trump-endorsed opponent, who’s on the legal defense team for Israel’s war criminal prime minister.
Most Democratic voters agree that Israel is committing genocide against Palestinians in Gaza, and they don’t want our tax dollars funding it. While our movement’s power is growing, most members of Congress are ignoring their constituents on this issue—taking money from AIPAC and continually voting to send more U.S. taxpayer dollars to fund war crimes.
**We need courageous leaders who represent the people, stand up to fascism and dehumanization, and see**** _everyone_****as worthy of life and dignity.** Struggling Americans also deserve leaders who take meaningful steps toward an equitable society where everyone can thrive.
Zohran has said, _“The job of city government isn’t to tinker around the edges while one in four children across our city go hungry... the government's job is to actually make our lives better.”_ I agree.
[**If you can, please make a contribution toward my re-election campaign today to keep fighting for a government that works for the people, not billionaires.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt6HU2GGd4HxcKZcvLVaIzK3sbcwX9_YxcEdF5mYMD-QGDvsrRYbmGcSfG5OadLUgx6bMt883Ksk8py3jrdguM0AhX4cWCmI3LnsFaENd2Zx9gr3h0GCEDk35HpwER1usPfWW2TfLIfEeOawXrUjutsD3jNKQTyjAoXH_iyvUyLwYzgM6I_TsIdZBfSFxhNQXBi8hycOzCLMdYRIZWioV80CYwb9NaGojmm4xrnqVe_EXARbnSXTYuZCcdyL5SaKkRNny3eMDFxOcZm50lQo7_Z_JCzxwi-d2sLgIv3G-1h-24RDq_uH2_oTJg9iFnCBbSbN1jmGbhH1cjiv9RVQ2twNY9Leeci5J_XWum4OEPdKw/4ld/YmTmgFHzR867A97xOzmxhw/h11/h001.iaoHVbY9RE7ZLfs3onVbHJkLOuynzbg0VdgndLBRQ_A)
Thank you for imagining and working for a better future, where everyone has what they need. Together, we’ll keep demanding better and fighting for human rights, including the right to food, housing, healthcare, clean air and water, and childcare.
With you in the fight,
Rashida

clean_body: Zohran is a bold democratic socialist like me, and he overcame billionaire interference to become NYC’s next mayor. | | | Friend, I’m so pleased to share that we had a progressive sweep yesterday: Democratic governors won, Californians voted to counter Republican redistricting in Texas, Colorado residents voted to raise taxes on wealthy households to fund free breakfast and lunch for public school students, and Zohran Mamdani won his race for New York City’s mayor! In NYC’s biggest election turnout in more than 30 years, more young residents under the age of 30 voted than ever before—even though this is an off-year election. Some of the local candidates I endorsed also won by large margins, including democratic socialists Denzel McCampbell and Gabriela Santiago-Romero, who ran against corporate Democrats for Detroit City Council. These victories show that when we energize our base and focus on direct conversations with potential voters, we can defeat the billionaire and corporate interests that too often control our politics. Over 100,00 volunteers for Mamdani’s campaign knocked on over 1 million doors. Folks are fired up! And because the mayor of NYC represents more people than most senators, Zohran will set precedents nationwide. Zohran is a bold democratic socialist like me, and for years we’ve been standing up together for human rights in the U.S. and abroad. His win opens the door for more candidates like us to run and win across the country. In late 2023, I was proud to join Zohran as he led a hunger strike in front of the White House demanding a ceasefire in Gaza (photo below). Since January 2024, I’ve sent emails fundraising for Zohran—and YOU responded, supporting his campaign from early on. Thank you! Neither of us take money from corporate PACs, so every grassroots donation makes a difference. | This summer, I joined my Muslim colleagues in Congress to speak out against the hateful, anti-Muslim, and racist smears from our colleagues on both sides of the aisle who’ve attacked Zohran. Those attacks have grown in recent months, as media outlets like the New York Times and billionaire-funded attack ads spread Islamophobic fearmongering. But the people saw through these tropes and saw a candidate who’s going to support every single one of his constituents, no matter their backgrounds. They saw someone who will actually fight for the working class, who will address our affordability crisis, and who will push for the bold policy changes our communities need. Zohran has proven his effective leadership as a state representative, including making bus routes free throughout the city and leading a 15-day hunger strike with NYC taxi drivers to secure more than $450 million in transformative debt relief. Unlike many elected officials, Zohran understands how urgently people need change. He—and the movement supporting him—are working toward a city and a world where everyone can live a dignified life, regardless of background, identity, or zip code. Zohran’s win affirms that we can build multi-racial, multi-faith, and cross-class solidarity to overcome the growing billionaire interference in our elections. Muslims, immigrants, and people of all backgrounds belong here, including in the halls of power. This sends a message to Democratic leaders that they must pay attention to and work hard for everyday Americans of all backgrounds, rather than corporate donors. Even though Zohran won the Democratic primary election by more votes than any prior mayoral candidate in the city, AIPAC-funded corporate Democrats in national leadership refused to endorse him. They decided they could overlook Cuomo’s racism and track record of sexual harassment because they wanted to maintain the unjust status quo. One ended up endorsing him but said that he’s “not the future of the Democratic party.” They’re out of touch. We need to transform the Democratic Party to win against fascists and to be the party of the people—and candidates like Zohran are an essential part of making that happen. This is a losing strategy, and it endangers and abandons the most vulnerable Americans. Instead, Democratic candidates and leaders must listen to our base and make the changes that people need. For example, Democratic voters (and people across political parties) overwhelmingly want to end U.S. support for Israel’s human rights abuses—unlike Zohran’s Trump-endorsed opponent, who’s on the legal defense team for Israel’s war criminal prime minister. Most Democratic voters agree that Israel is committing genocide against Palestinians in Gaza, and they don’t want our tax dollars funding it. While our movement’s power is growing, most members of Congress are ignoring their constituents on this issue—taking money from AIPAC and continually voting to send more U.S. taxpayer dollars to fund war crimes. We need courageous leaders who represent the people, stand up to fascism and dehumanization, and see everyoneas worthy of life and dignity. Struggling Americans also deserve leaders who take meaningful steps toward an equitable society where everyone can thrive. Zohran has said, “The job of city government isn’t to tinker around the edges while one in four children across our city go hungry... the government's job is to actually make our lives better.” I agree. Thank you for imagining and working for a better future, where everyone has what they need. Together, we’ll keep demanding better and fighting for human rights, including the right to food, housing, healthcare, clean air and water, and childcare. name: Sharice Davids
subject: We just won Round One. But Round Two is just around the corner.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I wanted you to hear it from me first
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97381?refcode=em20251106-9677&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9677%2E614464%2E794kb0)
Peter, this is Congresswoman Sharice Davids, Democrat from Kansas — and I wanted you to hear it from me first: **We just won the first round in this gerrymandering fight. But round two is just around the corner.**
After weeks of secret partisan maneuvering and shady backroom deals, Kansas Republicans failed to gather the necessary signatures to force a special legislative session on redistricting.
Our grassroots campaign is having an impact.
**However, it’s likely they’ll make another attempt to gerrymander Kansas during the regular legislative session that begins in January.** The Kansas House Speaker even made an explicit promise: Republicans will continue the “conversation about redistricting.”
Look, this is a big victory for the people of Kansas, and our democracy as a whole. But it could turn into a _temporary_ victory if we don’t spend every second between now and January keeping up the hard work.
**[Their plan to cheat the system isn’t over — so we can’t slow down either. Please, can you chip in a split donation between Heartland Patriots and my campaign to help us keep up the pressure campaign all the way through the new year? We need every ounce of grassroots support we can get if we want to spook Kansas Republicans off once again.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97381?refcode=em20251106-9677&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9677%2E614464%2E794kb0)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97381?refcode=em20251106-9677&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9677%2E614464%2E794kb0)**
For weeks, Republican legislators were circulating a petition to call for a special session. The sole purpose of that special session? Gerrymandering Kansas’ maps by splitting up Johnson County — something Republicans promised to _never_ do during their last gerrymandering push in 2021.
After that gerrymander, which was designed to make Kansas’ 3rd as Republican-friendly as possible, Republicans thought they had my number. The former Senate Majority Leader even said at the time: _“I guarantee you we can draw four Republican congressional maps.”_
**But they were wrong. In the next election, I won by even more.**
Kansas Republicans have made it clear they’ll do anything to hold onto power — even silencing their own constituents at the ballot box. But I’ve been just as clear: **Voters should choose their representatives, not the other way around.**
**[Stopping this special session is a moment for celebration — but that’s all it is: A moment. We can’t lose our focus now, not when we’re so close to ending this gerrymandering push for good. Please, chip in a split donation right away to keep our campaign prepared for everything that comes our way.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97381?refcode=em20251106-9677&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9677%2E614464%2E794kb0)**

[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97382?refcode=em20251106-9677&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=9677%2E614464%2E794kb0) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97382?refcode=em20251106-9677&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=9677%2E614464%2E794kb0) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97382?refcode=em20251106-9677&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=9677%2E614464%2E794kb0) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97382?refcode=em20251106-9677&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=9677%2E614464%2E794kb0) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97382?refcode=em20251106-9677&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=9677%2E614464%2E794kb0) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97382?refcode=em20251106-9677&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=9677%2E614464%2E794kb0) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97381?refcode=em20251106-9677&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9677%2E614464%2E794kb0)

name: Steve Scalise
subject: Pam Bondi bombshell announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is an UNPRECEDENTED breach of public trust

Words are escaping me right now, Friend...
Attorney General Pam Bondi found that the Biden Administration handed over President Trump's government-issued phone to the Special Counsel Jack Smith.
On top of that, Jack Smith subpoenaed all of President Trump's PERSONAL phone records. [](https://email.alert.conservativelibertywire.com/c/eJyUkbGOnDAQhp_GdCB71jZsQRHpRNJcijRRKjTYw-5ExiBj4PL2kSNtn2tH3zfzj_6f7-M7cuD4-I4L9S5cY9rHDZdpjZ6ndZn2J4WAMa5HdDSCBFMrVUtbOKh8bzqgu62oV60FbRRIWT171GY2HXoCa1VrabZaWoNkZtR3rVXFfVmllLSq1UZ2TUd3cGb2k5R69gaFlhgo5catcad0YuaTAk-U8p-LEzVuXarQP3PednH7ImAQMOzkjkTNxTGRL4SAIRMu9e4w8E4Chok9xdqvv8ssegzFvA2pmInjQ9zecjpIgD3yMjpcNuRHFLe3V97x67f6149GqQ5aM-YS39i2Vq2xAix9jJn9f-MfRzzLxbN24apfTpV6v10cAu-2FVo-FuTw7-H8-YrOHv4GAAD__3tul-g) This is an UNPRECEDENTED breach of public trust. This shows the SHOCKING extent of the Biden White House's weaponization of the federal government. ** ** I'll be perfectly clear with you: ** ** The ONLY reason we know about any of this is because Republicans won the last election. ** ** If we lost, the Democrats would have kept everything under lock and key. Friend – I need to say thank you. I can’t tell you what it means to know that people like you have my back. I’m spending every single day working to do what I can to stop the Trump MAGA agenda. I’m fighting for healthcare funding for millions of Americans. I’m making every effort possible to stop GOP cuts that every day Delawareans and Americans rely on. _But I will also be honest: It’s an uphill battle with Trump in the White House and GOP control of Congress._ But that doesn’t mean the work we put in right now is for nothing, friend. If anything, it’s that much more important that we double down in our efforts and do everything we can to chip away at the cuts and destructiveness of this current Administration. My team is hoping to raise $5,500 from this email to build the momentum we need to take back the Senate in 2026. [**_Can you help us? (If everyone reading this gave just $3, we’d hit that goal in no time!)_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118792544/580908075/-486912179?amount=3&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.06_Gratitude_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_RS-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDA5YzEwMC0zOWJiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ce03OLmJoA1pWWkB2lUBxJTaiViBFRK8-8iaHI627Cs=) | | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118792545/580908076/-486912179?amount=3&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.06_Gratitude_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_RS-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDA5YzEwMC0zOWJiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ce03OLmJoA1pWWkB2lUBxJTaiViBFRK8-8iaHI627Cs=)

name: Aftyn Behn
subject: Uh oh, we’ve got more volunteers than funds
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
Walk cards, flyers, and clipboards
#
Last month, we showed Tennessee what was possible and made headlines across the country.
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=lrp-em-fr-nov25.gTIhSH&refcode=LRP_EM_110625_B1_Aftyn&t=1&akid=5659%2E196590%2EwxXe6X)
Since then, the response from Tennesseans has been overwhelming.
Hundreds of new volunteers have signed up to phone bank and canvass. But to be honest, that requires more resources than we originally planned for.
[**That’s why I’m reaching out to ask for your help in funding walk cards, flyers, clipboards, and refreshments for our dedicated volunteers. If you’re able, please consider sending in a donation of any amount to my campaign and the Long Run PAC right now:**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=lrp-em-fr-nov25.gTIhSH&refcode=LRP_EM_110625_B1_Aftyn&t=2&akid=5659%2E196590%2EwxXe6X)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1281?c0=lrp-em-fr-nov25.HJmUoL&refcode=LRP_EM_110625_B1_Aftyn&t=21&akid=5659%2E196590%2EwxXe6X)**

****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=lrp-em-fr-nov25.dZ_LoF&refcode=LRP_EM_110625_B1_Aftyn&t=24&akid=5659%2E196590%2EwxXe6X)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=lrp-em-fr-nov25.ishYxi&refcode=LRP_EM_110625_B1_Aftyn&t=25&akid=5659%2E196590%2EwxXe6X)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=lrp-em-fr-nov25.h3dppL&refcode=LRP_EM_110625_B1_Aftyn&t=26&akid=5659%2E196590%2EwxXe6X)**
---
****
Every dollar raised means we can reach more voters on their phones and at their doorsteps. And voter turnout is going to be key to winning this district and flipping this seat blue.
**[How much are you able to give to my campaign and the Long Run PAC today?](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=lrp-em-fr-nov25.gTIhSH&refcode=LRP_EM_110625_B1_Aftyn&t=27&akid=5659%2E196590%2EwxXe6X)**
Thanks for powering the work of our volunteers!
Aftyn Behn

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=5659%2E196590%2EwxXe6X). name: Ted Cruz
subject: Impeach Boasberg
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
Boasberg is at the very center of the deep state --

| | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz._i3hUXdGRii95rA)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, I am calling on the House of Representatives to impeach Judge Boasberg. For the good of the country and to ensure we don't see their type of extreme partisanship corrupt the whole American judiciary- we __MUST__ have accountability... And accountability means **IMPEACHMENT** for Boasberg, who used his judicial powers to target his political opponents like me and President Donald J. Trump.
---
[ **JOIN ME: DEMAND CONGRESS IMPEACH BOASBERG NOW >>** ](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)
---
Boasberg personally authorized secret subpoenas for the mobile phone records of at least 9 Senate Republicans, including me. What's worse is that Boasberg ordered AT&T not to inform me that my records had been subpoenaed- outrageous. In America, **Justice should be** _**BLIND**_ , we are a Nation of laws, not men. But Judge Boasberg shattered any pretense of justice when he colluded with Biden's DOJ, Jack Smith, and the Democrat attack machine to spy on Republicans for base political gain. __His absolute lawless conduct is unacceptable__. Stand with me and demand impeachment and accountability right now. We can't let the Democrats get away with this; if we do, that will be a _devastating blow_ to America. [**_Sign the Petition to Demand Impeachment now >>_**](https://trk.email.tedcruz.) Ted Cruz
---
[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)
---
[ _**SEND SUPPORT TO TED CRUZ >>**_ ](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)
---
**PS:** Not only did Jack Smith subpoena my cell-phone records, including calls, texts, and voice-messages, but even requested phone records of my United States Senate office. _This is absolutely insane, and_** _far worse than Watergate_** _._ **[Please chip in now to help me fight back- even $7 is a huge help. Thank you!>>](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)**
---
| | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
---
| | PO Box 25400
Houston, TX 77265
---

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: 🚨 Urgent update on one of the most important races in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
Our race to defend one of the most vulnerable blue seats in the nation just got tougher, Peter. Here's what you need to know:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118794218/580914464/1480058314?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-11-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjMyNmIxYS0zYmJiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YrqQsIfcUQIT4yhS3BgqhCIRzTnIoICPr0ix1l-yXtA=)
---
Hi Peter, it's Marcy Kaptur. I represent one of the most vulnerable blue Congressional seats in the nation, and Laura Gillen said I could reach out with some major news in our race:

**The Ohio Redistricting Commission just agreed to a new Congressional map, and it makes our district even tougher than it is now.**

Republicans can't beat us at the ballot box, so they've tried once again to gerrymander me out of Congress.

But we've won against long odds before, and I'll never back down from a fight to protect my home.

clean_body: Our race to defend one of the most vulnerable blue seats in the nation just got tougher, Peter. Here's what you need to know: | = Hi Peter, it's Marcy Kaptur. I represent one of the most vulnerable blue Congressional seats in the nation, and Laura Gillen said I could reach out with some major news in our race: The Ohio Redistricting Commission just agreed to a new Congressional map, and it makes our district even tougher than it is now. Republicans can't beat us at the ballot box, so they've tried once again to gerrymander me out of Congress. But we've won against long odds before, and I'll never back down from a fight to protect my home. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Peter. — Marcy * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. Gillen for NY PO Box 774 Rockville Centre, NY 11571 United States | = If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above.

name: Matias, United We Dream
subject: 🍳 Just Flavors! is back — watch the season premiere now:
body:
Tune in to Episode 1, “The Big Reunion,” today! | | | Hey Peter, Our communities have been loving the season premiere of _Just Flavors! —_ the first cooking show made by immigrants, for immigrants. 🧂🧡 From the first time your sister came home from college, to the annual posada at work, there’s a story behind every recipe and every reunion. **_Just Flavors!_****celebrates these stories and our power to unite through food and culture. Whether it's over a shared meal at the table or a collective chant at a rally, it's through our unity that transformative change happens.** Featuring guest judges Moisés Zamora (creator of Netflix’s _Selena: The Series)_ and Chelsea Rendon (star of television series _Vida_), this week’s episode will make you feel right at home with dishes our families prepare for big reunions: ceviche de camaron and puff puff & coconut chicken rice. **Catch up on the season premiere of**** _Just Flavors!_****today:** **[START WATCHING](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMVZiCw9e1CjoAxuXDVyOgvAOfjG_WVRSjUHFV3eVcNjAJQeJFjuSdSIENNGMs0mt7F7amKqenc2x1_DW4ZkelJRd63K0Yq52zZL2T5jA0TyFNWkusHVVAm9XKQNC_d0yM5W5DjQpDa4MEfgoxdpHYo6IcrO68XrKPphnhDe0HK-VTVrmDzC4s6DQuOIVEf9BkVIMc97BkvG7ZAUlksFatFU6x5ZpX0xWzTnAbhMSfmC7DbVT8PJGm83L_f90PSyu7uP8Rt6LewmX3HcfWtRBvqHXaNd6ArdCBDJ1OSzLPpHUc_5yEfJ-qOhA4u6iLlyGfBgHUMxvLdP-8Yp6YlqhjRo/4ld/BpKzcOzRTcafhpytYdoD0Q/h0/h001.ASUrlV0qohxkVMBEg_s56dsitPzPKAXx1-eAkbSzqZ8)[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMVZiCw9e1CjoAxuXDVyOgvAOfjG_WVRSjUHFV3eVcNjAd0Az2UUTsH5gZHvIYaP3ihDkGr3KHESgs3Ou5PZ2WBuoycgamJhWcqr46yK1ql1TtRdUMxiXXn2jlWQP_ELq_C1Z1JAwQ3brPHH3sG9JvWJEFJeh8pORTsncnzAMt9khTUt6kDsupyrQBYsGdb-KEhAUdvO8e5OE0hcBLiE7e8K4MML6V7D5f5rusJ8V5Uhk6HwCc4ri4UAT8AsEvgvgW6QQ7VPLsXHrsM4HmOIz2cENKpYrTSIjlW_WGCKTlpDtuScw-4DnljothJU4ZLT-OHXKDKslbZgX-lX7Zaes3t0/4ld/BpKzcOzRTcafhpytYdoD0Q/h1/h001.v0BxD_KYX8wofB_EEyhLmvMBrt4nhs4L8EDvGLES7h8)** **** What recipes bring _your_ family together? name: Derek Tran
subject: The truth about Prop 50 and our race
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118795270/580917648/-1516755731?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWZkZjQyNGEtM2RiYi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZDZmMzM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VzquZTGSaXk_WTbSKSzV8wr8KSSed4jrGUfx4qFbE1A=)
I need to level with you.

California just passed Prop 50 -- the major redistricting reform California voters overwhelmingly supported after Donald Trump and his allies' plot to undermine our democracy.

But here’s the truth: Prop 50 just made our race _a lot_ tougher.

**The _L.A. Times_ reports that Republicans have singled out CA-45 as one of their last real opportunities to flip a seat under the new maps.**

This was already going to be one of the most competitive and expensive House races in the country. Now, it’s likely to be the only real battleground left in California. **Every Republican super PAC and Trump donor is about to set their sights right here.**

Frankly, I’m concerned.

That’s why we launched an emergency 48-hour fundraising push to make sure we have the resources to stay competitive under these new lines.

**[If you've been waiting for the best moment to have an impact on our race -- this is it. I'm humbly asking you to make your first donation of $3 to help us keep CA-45 blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118795271/580917676/-1516755731?refcode=em-11.6.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWZkZjQyNGEtM2RiYi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZDZmMzM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VzquZTGSaXk_WTbSKSzV8wr8KSSed4jrGUfx4qFbE1A=)**

name: Protect Democracy
subject: Every dollar fuels democracy’s defense
body:
Your support helps fight corruption and protect the rule of law.
[](https://go.m.protectourdemocracyfund.org/l/nuwikK-xGhp3cE-8KfHcDxYZ6BpF40L7brR5EuhubKA)When you donate to Protect Our Democracy Fund, you’re not just giving — you’re taking a stand for the future of our country.
Your support helps us:
✅ Investigate and expose abuses of power.
✅ Mobilize citizens to demand accountability.
✅ Push for reforms that strengthen checks and balances.
This isn’t abstract — it’s real, tangible work to defend our institutions and ensure no one, not even a former president, is above the law.
Our democracy is only as strong as those willing to defend it.
👉 [See how your donation makes a difference](https://go.m.protectourdemocracyfund.org/l/nuwikK-xGhp3cE-8KfHcDwZPjwv1iZKYZUfrTq0VuCY)
Together, we can stop the slide toward authoritarianism — and build a stronger, fairer democracy for all.
With gratitude,
Protect Our Democracy Fund

Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Sent By: ProtectOurDemocracyFund
PO Box 15845 Washington, DC 20003

Hi friend, We did it. Voters showed up. Democracy showed up, and Mikie Sherrill won!!! This victory is proof that Republicans never had a mandate for their chaos, cruelty, or shutdowns. _Begin Forwarded Message from Valerie Foushee:_
Peter,
There’s no feeling quite as heavy as waking up the morning after a tough election when the results didn’t go our way.
The disbelief. The disappointment. The sinking feeling that our country was headed in the wrong direction, and that the progress we’d fought so hard for was suddenly at risk.
**One year from now, we’ll wake up after the 2026 midterm election with a chance to turn the page and chart a new course for our nation.** A chance to reject Donald Trump’s extreme agenda and the Republican majority fasttracking it in Congress.
There’s a lot at stake regarding the future of our country. And winning won’t be easy.
**We have one year to do the work. One year to organize. One year to remind the country what we stand for, and who we’re fighting for.**
The deck may be stacked against us, but we can’t afford to wake up the day after next year’s election wishing we had done more. That’s why the work to take back the House — and restore a Congress that works for the American people — starts _right now._
Despite Republicans’ nationwide redistricting scheme, despite their efforts to silence voters, despite it all, I know we have what it takes to defend our democracy and take back the House.
**[I have never backed down from a tough fight, and never will. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---
Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. | | | Experts Sound The Alarm On The Digital Dollar... We have bad news for anyone that has their savings in a US bank... are quietly preparing for the Digital Dollar rollout. This will give the government absolute control over your money, And the ability to freeze your funds, And track every dime you spend... | If your bank is involved, you may have only weeks to protect your savings before the switch begins. Find out if your bank is involved here: | | | 🟡 News From "American Alternative Assets" | (Sponsored) ---|--- Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from YourCapitalMinds.com, an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. # Trump scorches the "Queen of Trading" as she retires after 37 years in Congress
Nancy Pelosi, 85, stunned the political world Thursday by announcing she won't seek reelection after **[nearly four decades in Congress](https://substack.com/redirect/db062356-3eaa-423f-aa98-d3d3dec8a23f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , ending her historic tenure as the first female House Speaker.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/db062356-3eaa-423f-aa98-d3d3dec8a23f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Trump 's Statement On Pelosi's Retirement**: _" The retirement of Nancy Pelosi is a great thing for America. She was evil, corrupt, and focused on bad things for our country. She was rapidly losing control of her party and it was never coming back. I'm very honored she impeached me twice and failed miserably twice. Nancy Pelosi is a highly overrated politician."_
* **Historic Tenure Concludes** : After 37 years representing San Francisco, Pelosi reflected on the unparalleled honor of voicing her constituents' needs on the House floor.
* **Pioneering Speaker Legacy Endures** : As the groundbreaking first woman to lead the House, Pelosi's influence reshaped Democratic leadership.
* **Final Year Focuses on Service** : With a "grateful heart," she pledged to dedicate her remaining term to advocating for her district before stepping aside.

**Editors Note:** Nancy Pelosi's retirement will likely close the book on one of the all time "greatest" Traders. In her time in congress Nancy has made an absolute **FORTUNE** despite "_**not owning any stock.**_ " The saga of her trading prowess **[we documented here](https://substack.com/redirect/be716ed5-bd4e-4b97-b3a8-6c14fd06385a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). **Using apps like **[AutoPilot](https://substack.com/redirect/2735ad96-f318-49c4-9019-e45c2654fede?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **traders were able to mirror Pelosi's spectacular (and highly suspect trades) raking in thousands in profits simply by copying her trades because if you can't beat them, you might as well trade like them.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2735ad96-f318-49c4-9019-e45c2654fede?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
