name: Jena Griswold
subject: 5,300 CO contributions →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg?refcode=251106-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg?refcode=251106-email]
Peter,
I’m so proud of what we’ve built together.
Our campaign has now received more than 5,300 contributions from every corner of Colorado – from Estes Park to Pueblo, from Denver to the Western Slope. That’s more in-state donations than any other campaign in this race.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg?refcode=251106-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg?refcode=251106-email]
We also have the lowest average donation, showing that everyday people are powering this campaign.
This is what real grassroots looks like.
Every single contribution, no matter the size, fuels our fight to protect Coloradans’ rights and freedoms — and to stand up to Donald Trump and MAGA extremists who threaten our democracy.
I’ve never forgotten where I come from — a working-class family that sometimes relied on food stamps to get by. I’m running for Attorney General to make sure every Coloradan has someone who will stand up for them, not the powerful and well-connected.
But I can’t do it alone. We need to keep sending the message that real, dedicated Coloradans are powering this movement.
Can you chip in today to help us keep this momentum going? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg?refcode=251106-email]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thank you for believing in this grassroots campaign and in Colorado’s future.
With gratitude,
Jena Griswold

Fellow American,

Democrats just went off the deep end...

They elected an open **communist** in New York City. And in Virginia, their new top law enforcement officer appears **deranged** , _fantasizing about murdering the Speaker of the House of Delegates and wishing his children would die..._

And it wasn’t just the voters – top Democrat leaders in Washington and across the nation flocked to support these radicals.

Is this a preview of 2026? _Well, that’s up to you, fellow American._

These unhinged Democrats outraised and outspent us in these elections, and this was the result.

_Their base was fired up and all in while we sat back._

**I can’t emphasize enough the need to ramp up our grassroots efforts right now to avoid disaster in the midterms.**

[**Whether it’s $5, $50, or $500, your contribution today will show that you’re serious about protecting our values and freedoms.**](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=638227a2ced24b028a2d44d4261619a5&_e=tnMgL1TGkn2N3fNVZ-H3DqHog8Xjgt-dZPfHJdKAm-k41RAV6VBsQLbpAntj5USbygpwYwR_LYHam9RQ4TAXIWLeofizIMwf6g3CJ9ikEksqzrpCZ7sDWxfIDEzkWYLpCZGj02cCQ4-QOWsC2337W-ag98jYQykNnRw6ZoByBHKnq0zdsDmO8QKK4SJmfDldnJxsAp4AABI9-M9NbzEc1UBL-SexSTuNT_bGCQUwqIE3z0DhN48BY0Q3sujiSvzWYLNzvf0i0-sGhLlHy2ArkyHB7hr6QGHgkW6aDfda7vcOE87-aQR7YRJe3mjKShiklZ5GWsqZCqMKghqFPuzSp1QkCBW-M9jlsMv8qgQTkqe4UnFf9_oJd7FXdasfHFa_hdScoPRfyEp5tr8WLJpysYBJgOpQmszym5VaMp2kSF6nMbSX9vdvHgL5qC5F7ca1cLBFG5pmBwHqVtNwemIE6a0YCl5nTsysxgiT1r3LSf1kXiHT5zzKzoUjSztFya_SaJOsFLCqtj695UKFCJ6v4utomJQEj26eCtCqekzKRoisXtYlgvXUPYHrwe843MQrTXQOEmi1XeJbecjPWepNRurAqDvGYXnSa2q7u2zn9jjRCCZAEHuDBvKNHkqOuEBluW5NgqN4EzMh6LZjaDLAGns022rmdSlbIzmw3q1Et8IuLZVtX5m0b8zEYhS2rr2bELNOMHE7V-aX6kMTqQzBiPQ3x6057wCWjzAYHoiwKIqEXXa8D36zJs7KHeXCkoh3qqICHwNFWvvLfUrHuqWZrYYRb061KiyzLNUCScECprDkbPgp7726i2OTbzENkbF4)

They have us in their sights, fellow American, and they’re coming at us with everything they’ve got.

[**Stand up and fight back today!**](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=638227a2ced24b028a2d44d4261619a5&_e=tnMgL1TGkn2N3fNVZ-H3DqHog8Xjgt-dZPfHJdKAm-k41RAV6VBsQLbpAntj5USbygpwYwR_LYHam9RQ4TAXIWLeofizIMwf6g3CJ9ikEksqzrpCZ7sDWxfIDEzkWYLpCZGj02cCQ4-QOWsC2337W-ag98jYQykNnRw6ZoByBHKnq0zdsDmO8QKK4SJmfDldnJxsAp4AABI9-M9NbzEc1UBL-SexSTuNT_bGCQUwqIE3z0DhN48BY0Q3sujiSvzWYLNzvf0i0-sGhLlHy2ArkyHB7hr6QGHgkW6aDfda7vexYKxB_h9NzmggF9JXm3Z2m8rsxngPmf7XjuNSmcrHqUMdEIrxTCcz5oioIYtn7SGuaT1hCYL1dVUGLKIYzyyxnQftYQ-jRkd8ZydZKOGoiedvJjdWET6SZYKB8kHRqiwgOe4YlLgEs6Bs6FUMRSAGBTve-co99TXmAf2Ob9M4XTN3WH1Aq6ig1ff746ldi18EVUaEo6ZRwJn0gc5x8XZsyOEpSlGA81-SfQ2pnvjZ_ptGk1S7Cnm7w2CEutpP5kc_Q3pDaZTY3L_un7c9rlPTY1g-n67pibEGb1UaIRqAqNw8X5wVqV4xyoREIbGsDL3V5XID6WmSWJFP9R5QlQ4YFfrhO8RLMMBkkdZKqEKDqAGQuBPxFq1Xk20wPaK7iRa26ODf3AndK4WFbC72qfpIgwdYZnxG_nId6UXGJWWOfb7j_Wu4a5O8eiUB8NopfhEw598ZbvC1wnhrJ2yXhGCh4kTvRP8z18ah7GvJGmYG0CxfcWFUeA5fLtKyb-m7PYtq7oiwsPeCkV7gQZYwdi41)

For America,

**_Sen. Steve Daines_**

Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. clean_body: These unhinged Democrats outraised and outspent us in these elections, and this was the result. | Fellow American, Democrats just went off the deep end... They elected an open communist in New York City. And in Virginia, their new top law enforcement officer appears deranged , fantasizing about murdering the Speaker of the House of Delegates and wishing his children would die... And it wasn’t just the voters – top Democrat leaders in Washington and across the nation flocked to support these radicals. Is this a preview of 2026? Well, that’s up to you, fellow American. These unhinged Democrats outraised and outspent us in these elections, and this was the result. Their base was fired up and all in while we sat back. I can’t emphasize enough the need to ramp up our grassroots efforts right now to avoid disaster in the midterms. | They have us in their sights, fellow American, and they’re coming at us with everything they’ve got. For America, Sen. Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Deb Haaland
subject: re: Native American Heritage Month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
History doesn’t just happen. We have to make it together.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=5528%2E400544%2ElyE7VK)
It’s Native American Heritage Month, so I want to take a moment to honor some of the fierce Native women who made me who I am.
**[But first, I’m running to represent all New Mexicans and give a voice to those who don’t have one. Will you donate $5 to our grassroots campaign for governor to help make history in New Mexico?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251106_1_nahm.cfs85S&amount=5&refcode=em20251106-5528&t=2&akid=5528%2E400544%2ElyE7VK)**
From my great-grandmother, mother, and many before them, I’ve been blessed to come from generations of resilient and fierce Pueblo women.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/952?c0=em_ms_dh_20251106_1_nahm.AFkBPw&amount=5&refcode=em20251106-5528&t=3&akid=5528%2E400544%2ElyE7VK)_The fierce women who raised me – plus me in my Garth Brooks tee!_
My mother, Mary Toya, was born and raised in a boxcar, where the Laguna people created a community far from their home. She proudly served in the U.S. Navy, raised four kids as a military wife, and devoted 25 years to Indian education at the Bureau of Indian Affairs.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/952?c0=em_ms_dh_20251106_1_nahm.AFkBPw&amount=5&refcode=em20251106-5528&t=4&akid=5528%2E400544%2ElyE7VK)_Mom served in the Navy and played the snare drum in the Santa Fe Indian Band._
Standing on the shoulders of the Native women who came before me, I summoned the courage to run for office. When I became one of the first Native American women elected to Congress, I swore to leave the ladder down behind me so our youth would know they can be _anything_ they want to be.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/952?c0=em_ms_dh_20251106_1_nahm.AFkBPw&amount=5&refcode=em20251106-5528&t=5&akid=5528%2E400544%2ElyE7VK)_Credit: CNN_
But here’s what I’m reminded of this Native American Heritage Month: History doesn’t just happen. We have to make it together.
**No state in America has ever elected a Native American woman as governor.[Would you consider helping us build momentum with a contribution of $5? Your support could help make history in this race.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251106_1_nahm.cfs85S&amount=5&refcode=em20251106-5528&t=6&akid=5528%2E400544%2ElyE7VK)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251106_1_nahm.cfs85S&amount=5&refcode=em20251106-5528&t=25&akid=5528%2E400544%2ElyE7VK)**
Be fierce,
Deb
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251106-1&t=26&refcode2=5528_400544_lyE7VK&akid=5528%2E400544%2ElyE7VK)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=27&akid=5528%2E400544%2ElyE7VK)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=28&akid=5528%2E400544%2ElyE7VK)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

body:

| | | | | |
# Jeff Walter Makes The Ballot To Bring Common Sense Back to Washington
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=3a16722d48&e=fa724b03ca)
[|
---](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=8c4f09695e&e=fa724b03ca)
| | | We did it! With more than **1,700 signatutres** , we’ve officially **made the ballot for Congress**.
I am running for Congress to bring **common sense, accountability, and real-world experience** to Washington - something that’s badly needed right now.

Let’s talk about common sense for a moment. In Washington, they’re fighting about how to spend more money. In Elburn, we do things differently. We start by asking what can we afford — and we prioritize what’s necessary to keep things running. If the money isn’t there, we don’t spend it. **It’s simple, practical, and responsible.** That’s what **governing with common sense** looks like.
---
| | | | | | | | | | | |
**Meet Jeff Walter** Join me for my first Java with Jeff. Wednesday November 12th, 7:45am - 9am.Corner Square Cafe117 E Van Buren St.Woodstock, Illinois
---
| [|
---](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=c838ae08ac&e=fa724b03ca)
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=47d01607d4&e=fa724b03ca)
|
---
| | | **Top News Items From The Campaign**

Over the past four months, I’ve been traveling all across the district — meeting with **elected officials, community leaders, business owners, and incredible constituents**. Everywhere I go, I hear the same thing: people are ready for **leadership that listens and fights for them**.
Together, we’re **building a movement** — one that’s reaching every corner of this district, sharing our message, and reminding voters that **we’re the ones truly fighting for their future**.
This campaign is about people — not politics — and I’m grateful for everyone who’s joined me on this journey so far.
---
| | | | | | | | | | | |

**Meet Jeff Walter** Join me for my next Java with Jeff. Wednesday November 18th, 7:45am - 9am.Toast and Roast1250 N Green StMcHenry, IL 60050

---
| |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | |
This race won’t be won by ideas and plans alone — it will be won by **people like you** who believe in bringing **common sense and accountability** back to Washington.
We’re taking on **Bill Foster** , his **$2 million war chest** , and his political machine. To compete, we need to raise **$3 million or more** — and every dollar will help us share our message, reach more voters, and win this race.
Will you join our team today by contributing [**$10**](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=df4dad6472&e=fa724b03ca)**,**[**$25**](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=18c4a94e8b&e=fa724b03ca)**,**[**$50**](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=9252ae939f&e=fa724b03ca)**,**[**$100**](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=9b7320ee6a&e=fa724b03ca)**,**[**or whatever you can**](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=271fab90bd&e=fa724b03ca) to help us reach our goal?
Every donation, big or small, gets us one step closer to victory.[[**Contribute Now ➜**](https://jeffwalterforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd07e5cbd6f962285e423156e&id=5f545463e2&e=fa724b03ca)]
Thank you for believing in this campaign and for standing with me — your support means the world.

name: Brent Hennrich
subject: Tuesday's message is clear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITSxjytRqnk5Se65PvvR0SC1Vi60eIcmGaf4kR6MPJnbRGd2XwIrhDn8ZZ-Z4PPuO0Vx2PdmM8zh_l0Ht__s0eBPrq_8mLJE5WDvJcj5ehO0DbO4echPCSVauOyA0o8_JZnyBuvXet7M_5pqbTwoiC6crMSGckO13MXTfz1mAYTrc/4ld/WYoGXOPxSMqzGIbQpSAgPQ/h0/h001.R7y88tBFNTRpfytSkWbatMLvBntnZI4NJb8lvuSpPx8)
---
Peter, Tuesday's election results sent an unmistakable message: Democrats win when they fight for bold ideas -- not when they cave to Trump's extremism. While my opponent Marie Gluesenkamp Perez continues positioning herself as an "independent voice" willing to work with Republicans, Democrats across the country proved there's a better path to victory. In New York City, Zohran Mamdani won despite the political establishment refusing to back him and billionaires spending $22 million against his campaign. He didn't back down from his progressive principles -- _and_ he brought 150,000 new voters into the Democratic Party. California passed Prop 50, putting five Democratic congressional seats back in play and wiping out Texas's redistricting scam. Democrats swept every single statewide race in Virginia. Fellow American,

Yesterday, we saw what happens when conservatives are outgunned. From California to New Jersey, to New York, to Virginia, Democrats cleaned up.

Let’s be honest – _they wiped the floor with us._

**If we can’t be honest about how this happened, there’s no way we can prevent a repeat in 2026.**

Conservatives appear to have become complacent after our sweeping victories in 2024, thinking we could simply coast while enjoying the fruits of our labor.

But all the while, the Left has been openly preparing and plotting for their comeback. Democrats outraised and outspent us at every turn in these elections, and we lost big time.

What’s worse, the Democrat party has taken an even harder left turn, _becoming more radical and unhinged than ever._

We can’t count on that being the key to their demise again. They just walked away with massive victories.

So, here’s the truth: **If we want to prevent a repeat of these elections in 2026,** [**conservatives must start ramping up our fundraising now!**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=46a87f9755a2419ba2764498b89dc565&_e=Wli8Or4ID90xyWQKqTKLze4TJwXEOWFQHv0Z2x3jFAITQgkja7KDQtnwBSqGNZBWlp8eRXGWk2_Up0mz9yrnX74V2F_ISsqa3edWF3lOPdakWBt-72McP9iJ4YM1Q-FHi4ABwg7VFIO0usACle9S_ojCfRI7bRzPRQ1XvjblDFYNAesgiiWiiy-v3bkeEIp3xf_QyXG_pLCeFjJN5_erbTUJppuL_aQRFX2TQyeJoyvA5CFNfA-kpkfyNwamHzmRN9VVQqaO5Q8xaBHYS0VcRfkEuFnK-8RpNWzt4HDHzprKnA0j4yJJ3-eVAYdbZPHy2-TT7vEkZaPSUe30AOsOh45wyUDGoD8APu-VgfNO9CCg5gBMu4tqmY3kIqjm38701WZgUv1aWeNHTQ2M9E72vPbMZ6OD5DtopFnoRjZQ18hVR_1rZBjo9kgP4h2Ihj6-T2p7Dza2OSXoD88atDiHMWu7pxSItSRXS2hL46munjbyDY11rFp5Xjuaz-UghMhMqx7etJUeGsqJINu_ROCY3GxerQusaRXqSaGqrEh5Zhi1kt0k3VLC5OPH1rRCV8e-KaXM15qNCknNaGFzskb_sgx_NQhDivqEA4h63O3T4QUHqpYDWxCef1z1NltxaKsclElFJT3kG2uK2xhiiynego-jsgP8X-PeTENQSXJL8OCgiNZeLpZtJv3zCXE3Y3mYW1X6JPl7rF9Lkio8Tp-mGbwav9WtThz_H09fJjvGXil_7NNy7AeKVBRwzb_6MPgavdert__o99zDr1iKr7mY-qNADypqC7bWiMXvy1sE_Vp6IQuyGagqWRzeRBcZHnho)

_There’s no ifs, ands, or buts about it._

Democrats beat us because their base is more fired up and is raising boatloads.

**We can only stop them by gathering the resources to ensure we’re not outgunned again.**

[**I need every patriot reading this to commit $25, $50, or even $100 or more today to ensure we have the warchest to defend our majorities and the America First agenda from suffering the same fate.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=46a87f9755a2419ba2764498b89dc565&_e=Wli8Or4ID90xyWQKqTKLze4TJwXEOWFQHv0Z2x3jFAITQgkja7KDQtnwBSqGNZBWlp8eRXGWk2_Up0mz9yrnX74V2F_ISsqa3edWF3lOPdakWBt-72McP9iJ4YM1Q-FHi4ABwg7VFIO0usACle9S_ojCfRI7bRzPRQ1XvjblDFYNAesgiiWiiy-v3bkeEIp3xf_QyXG_pLCeFjJN5_erbTUJppuL_aQRFX2TQyeJoyvA5CFNfA-kpkfyNwamHzmRN9VVQqaO5Q8xaBHYS0VcRfkEuFnK-8RpNWzt4HDHzpq8gw5x1Co45uU2_kwpF5c9fBJPkhV-M1Qh_omt6jkaVXxk3zWO1KhB86A3aziOmSbvhweE8BVPhAY8hZEvj5ySxiZkkeixdtMcV1JbVCTK8bkV34z-UCVACIE_tiHQG5GYp1dkYuLjZClF3nwzl-feJgI8iAz5Gbe7drRsEXfXjl0DXIVndt3zlC5QEbaJh9UcXOD0cQQqwEeC8VjACo29UwCuKuZOX_5AMWVbOSpznwQGCd2A1jnspew_AlJDaDi3ne32yKuMBnRWYrZBPk3XhEXwiMlq32WjAzMSr6xzhMIKbRCEV_MxXr9v8AuegDNXq8M09HKJymACvUYScGVfQuxOZRgropF0tJId32dmqZf1RNdgo3uAvkpf8lrfVvNmTpX1Okm-OVe842P_BRUc7Q5s-DkpQz_-tiJSf7Fb2UQq286NOjPjq1iXh7P7huAik6O79mMtgi1XovDlBvbXHH8mC3VgCitETqF32JbrYf9rjZOO1ldY4OeHXlRGHlb6dtZxXF8mIj5JdxkZctbz)

name: Tobias Read
subject: Add your name: No one should go hungry because of politics
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251106em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251106em]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
Right now, Washington is shut down again. And while politicians in D.C. bicker and point fingers, families here in Oregon are wondering how they’ll put food on the table.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251106em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251106em]
That’s not leadership.
No American should go hungry because people in Washington are too busy playing politics.
Here in Oregon, we do things differently. We roll up our sleeves and get to work. Governor Tina Kotek, leaders across our state, and I are calling on the USDA to act immediately to protect vital nutrition assistance and make sure that more than 750,000 Oregonians can still afford food during this shutdown.
This isn’t about party lines — it’s about people’s lives.
When families are struggling, when farmers and small businesses are waiting for support, when kids can’t get their school meals — that’s when real leaders step up.
That’s what we’re doing in Oregon. And that’s what I’ll keep fighting for every single day.
But here’s the truth: while we’re demanding federal action, we also need grassroots power right here at home — people who are willing to stand up and say enough to the dysfunction, the political games, and the cruelty that come from Washington gridlock.
If you agree that it’s time to put people over politics, add your name to demand federal action on SNAP benefits >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/3d3zzNhRE0u9rRVSeu6-yg2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/3d3zzNhRE0u9rRVSeu6-yg2]
We can’t afford to wait. We can’t afford to look away. And we can never stop fighting for the people who depend on us to lead.
Let’s show the country that Oregon is leading the way — with decency, determination, and heart.
Thank you,
Tobias Read
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251106em]

subject: I’m praying for New York

body:

---
Fellow Conservative,

As a former Navy SEAL who has served our nation in 70 foreign countries, I’m gobsmacked by the news out of New York.

**I’m thinking of all the lives we’ve lost against this enemy over the last century, and I want to weep.**

If you’re interested in hearing more about last night from a Navy SEAL's perspective,**[please read the letter I wrote to you.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=d22ea279ad3d4618b457375033e2de68&_e=VbWA1ADuvGz4aHXISIFsq5j9IMYj49kx5l0_RyAQSNCKRdU7AZAFCMl88fQezVL_Rz2RTgZI8qVAyAscC18aoch9Mm_IUvvsk2Gr6w6ptNcrwC3Ca0Telw3UvmzOT70edCbe56IynqPrRK3v5eHmdtHduWKO6XOZwktxey16vLyHLckwlWKXUi9ldYfy4EFJGi5ZZo7BeZe-4LaER080rtZWR0qaayE2Y5TbxISUwMTHFJ7L9H4Cp0et92ZYVRMp_3IYTAGm4aKWPcOhv4sq-fWhwWq6nd8AXr2PA9p2wZWBphVOgaARMfutzK-XjC5iqYn0wq7wYaAPsqFZjYVtswdSrgZXhGq1a0dFKv3aF4mgxoJoACKBltRBu4kKcpcbKrSuckCfcSVYeqh2Zd4WQXp3xKttvCu25IeH5yr73pTEW0_nn1a_mTQN-f6d93KGpuLhAvFJmOrnoVSFL9f_PGRYc9ILL7M15mKTg8-Bb4-LQrwNnUQSsDBwQnWOlhOu66gObS938Lybtxz0_YrnlpSHQiSXo4U9FvZDer5_OHbpH8VAOOo3cYfCDgex61mWix1LPF4-rGmdNg5rB9Z7fk8Nv9Ul8WV_5IOmtYuvFoXLMjbghgE_8i4abBP68E-3CE5C_qQH37KkypHKxLl3D5OoJOm1tG6oY3ZTes7qB8D6fufdVBdXXlDT8XdQbatTpMoNrETLh0RMpQFuVS8vQnKQLZdrgh2yuGwlx5org1njZNjiLLYuI1v9RqWzjDE_ySgBQKpPJtpcm0Hf6p9t-FkAXqAq316svH3CqhWbP5w%3D)**

name: Trisha
subject: Federal workers are about to miss their third paycheck
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yIZLY3PW1-z9ENr4FEHsnNTjQ8WByOMQnoOnVZFWlKpNRp2KdbGVRbu-hboz9-GCRygPyz07t7c0g9zPV-7LKNUGLYTM9Ato31O2woCST4AzVRQ_81EBloi2R4sYh9jWJEOCWjpSBHV-O3GUXxabf6OW1QjVFfzxpr1IUscWteX07fAMP8qfG44eedeTR0QbBTTEAjx8t69du-mst538sI5pb01UMqiXbpvTIj4bOYfW98LfsCn2EA==&c=yG1G1S1YqCQW5E2ZiFJh0D4Va3QyV8lut2jrKSNb-Mlke824QvXp5g==&ch=-DHC2hLkPxV35R3_lmorXEpNSfpl_tXlUVxtNldo3VaHnSCzSpeSrQ==)
---
|

Peter,
Federal workers are about to miss their third paycheck. Families are maxing out credit cards. Savings are gone. And Lauren Boebert and her MAGA allies don't care.
They're holding the livelihoods of hundreds of thousands of families as political hostages. Empty bank accounts and long lines at food banks is no way to treat our veterans and public servants who keep this country running.
I know what it means when a paycheck doesn't come through. And I know exactly who's being hurt the most: working people.
When both my parents were terminally ill, I needed to drop everything to be with them in my hometown of Highlands Ranch, CO. I was a proud member of AFGE Local 3403 at the time, and my fellow union members pulled together to donate their leave so I could care for my parents during their final months without missing a paycheck.
Their kindness changed my life. It taught me the meaning of solidarity and the difference a union makes when life turns upside down.
Now, I'm proud to have AFGE 3403's endorsement in this race.
My fellow federal workers have my back--and I have their backs too--during this government shutdown, and when I get to Congress.
My campaign is teaming up with Labor Force, who are providing grocery cards for federal families who are missing their paychecks during MAGA's government shutdown. [Can you chip in $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to split a donation between my campaign and the Labor Force to stand in solidarity with federal workers?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yIZLY3PW1-z9ENr4FEHsnNTjQ8WByOMQnoOnVZFWlKpNRp2KdbGVRbu-hboz9-GCbRhkZHb0wyn3MCRkUGe7wX__24gXkuWpzQNqSUfQ2q_9iqowZOktZ0l5GBg0g-A2So_Eq2oQ0iO4LYJvOljza3XoRQIBCmnTG7nUxIfFoXxZ1u-Hc2d_h8xIEeltRDUAy0WNd9bpI5_TWfIpztGqtLMddj2EqjGjHrUvnxx2j7wtIm7VxyDYPZkmyy9jqUxP&c=yG1G1S1YqCQW5E2ZiFJh0D4Va3QyV8lut2jrKSNb-Mlke824QvXp5g==&ch=-DHC2hLkPxV35R3_lmorXEpNSfpl_tXlUVxtNldo3VaHnSCzSpeSrQ==)

name: Trisha
subject: Federal workers are about to miss their third paycheck
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q2PJ32UQVe2sWrtuaanNXaq2Hzpn0R5gyryVrOSgpZGryYr_zJiQ_vsLIeck-BttHuMkfjlBfK9Fk-MwaqIBgXg6pc3zCmvXsLVDpZyQxvPmrmH_N4dZaPbMR1lJyqixyTw86d6NK7_0P1lRKTVsPeCvfsSPZAzhT0ihJzlbShsTSZRdWQvcfkjzajsSH3IkrsBYlFtThWvj8Qffb9012PjlBUEF0EiluhdyYDFFBKPIQp0xPSpcKg==&c=CfxDRwclv4xni6dLOKszUmO_RZ5Zz35YF4g6mjgyY2dTEK6ecZAyxA==&ch=_1kG4cJC-AkhkzY361lKMvzyo0hfwFPIDyFOr83TALYfrQd20ER9kA==)
---
|

Peter,
Federal workers are about to miss their third paycheck. Families are maxing out credit cards. Savings are gone. And Lauren Boebert and her MAGA allies don't care.
They're holding the livelihoods of hundreds of thousands of families as political hostages. Empty bank accounts and long lines at food banks is no way to treat our veterans and public servants who keep this country running.
I know what it means when a paycheck doesn't come through. And I know exactly who's being hurt the most: working people.
When both my parents were terminally ill, I needed to drop everything to be with them in my hometown of Highlands Ranch, CO. I was a proud member of AFGE Local 3403 at the time, and my fellow union members pulled together to donate their leave so I could care for my parents during their final months without missing a paycheck.
Their kindness changed my life. It taught me the meaning of solidarity and the difference a union makes when life turns upside down.
Now, I'm proud to have AFGE 3403's endorsement in this race.
My fellow federal workers have my back--and I have their backs too--during this government shutdown, and when I get to Congress.
My campaign is teaming up with Labor Force, who are providing grocery cards for federal families who are missing their paychecks during MAGA's government shutdown. [Can you chip in $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to split a donation between my campaign and the Labor Force to stand in solidarity with federal workers?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q2PJ32UQVe2sWrtuaanNXaq2Hzpn0R5gyryVrOSgpZGryYr_zJiQ_vsLIeck-BttJMD3mfArHNq92muBmMn_QKyFQB3wrB99oqJ85zdcZox75EIomvSDKWcdVaCf3Dh-jPijqiwr6FTNFVPmpShfR0XuUquGqA0lYPCq6-IZMaMDhAkI3tT8t8Yiu8PNd_Pzct6qhNM28ESwzkaaUWKcSoVrOiFz8QlGiJ7YJI4ZwGVv0rkRlUbUc_fa7lhuAmGv2K3aRgyoocM=&c=CfxDRwclv4xni6dLOKszUmO_RZ5Zz35YF4g6mjgyY2dTEK6ecZAyxA==&ch=_1kG4cJC-AkhkzY361lKMvzyo0hfwFPIDyFOr83TALYfrQd20ER9kA==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, Federal workers are about to miss their third paycheck. Families are maxing out credit cards. Savings are gone. And Lauren Boebert and her MAGA allies don't care. They're holding the livelihoods of hundreds of thousands of families as political hostages. Empty bank accounts and long lines at food banks is no way to treat our veterans and public servants who keep this country running. I know what it means when a paycheck doesn't come through. And I know exactly who's being hurt the most: working people. When both my parents were terminally ill, I needed to drop everything to be with them in my hometown of Highlands Ranch, CO. I was a proud member of AFGE Local 3403 at the time, and my fellow union members pulled together to donate their leave so I could care for my parents during their final months without missing a paycheck. Their kindness changed my life. It taught me the meaning of solidarity and the difference a union makes when life turns upside down. Now, I'm proud to have AFGE 3403's endorsement in this race. My fellow federal workers have my back--and I have their backs too--during this government shutdown, and when I get to Congress. My campaign is teaming up with Labor Force, who are providing grocery cards for federal families who are missing their paychecks during MAGA's government shutdown. == Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | Solidarity forever, Trisha Calvarese Democrat for CO-04 | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | | | | | | |

name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: Re: It’s pure corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
How far will the Supreme Court let Trump go this time? | |
---
Peter, **Reports are flying about the arguments the Supreme Court heard regarding Trump’s sweeping tariff agenda yesterday.** The MAGA Supreme Court justices made a big show of skepticism towards the Trump administration's claims of sweeping powers. Trump-nominated Justice Gorsuch questioned if Trump was usurping power from Congress. Even Justice Thomas referred to the same flimsy “major questions doctrine” that the Court frequently invoked to rein in executive actions by Presidents Obama and Biden. **If MAGA Justices are feeling the heat, it means we’re doing our job. Now is not the time to rest.** The MAGA Supreme Court already went too far, giving Trump permission to commit crimes in office—effectively giving him the powers of a King. This term, the Court must decide if they should expand Trump’s powers even further, or retreat back toward the constitutional form of government Americans established 250 years ago. [**That’s why we’re not letting up. We’re following every story and bringing our analysis straight to activists across the country. Chip in today to power our coordinated response to the Supreme Court’s tariffs case!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6k1HsDub_o_gCgkaC5oDh_6wqcCTg0jxC747pM5xuXUhDMuW-sFdKqbTQDadSOyuBNZBXnlCa1ba1kKfnOQs-DjdNdr0x3589jlhs28Zj93rrqrZzwtxiaAgz1bmWrF1h0gcw0kDCAnTttX3IyVfUlQDZJ5TnWIlkE2bjflHbrAb6PenwWbIHVc89EegOIxD2hf_D3xoisG0hvqpQK2g0fxbFIIiwacpu0-n31D4Yp2cqFNX-nPRcvfHGKrxB66v9Tu1iFa7Ks-_Xo2DHsryoKCBdPiXnyOLjQPdcTZK3iyE/4ld/cMHRwOXSRhCI1xAV2358PQ/h0/h001.ay68mETUGrSP4c_C8w4tMBXKp67zQPfqjvZMJYdFxK8) Thank you for keeping up the fight, Morgan Stahr
United for Democracy **\-- PREVIOUS EMAIL --** Peter, **Today, the Supreme Court heard oral arguments regarding Trump’s sweeping, executive tariff agenda.** Trump has been abusing his so-called “tariff powers” to punish his enemies and reward his friends—and he’s done all of it without Congressional approval. Tariffs have already altered the American economy, as corporations raise prices for all of us to keep up with the cost. **And with grocery costs, rent, and healthcare premiums rising, working people are being hit the hardest.** Meanwhile, Trump is exempting corporations who curry favor with him. He raised millions to demolish the East Wing of the White House from the same people who he exempted from his tariffs. **This is corruption, pure and simple.** Trump shouldn’t get to unilaterally reshape the American economy to serve his own ends. **The MAGA justices will have to twist themselves into knots if they want to side with Trump in this case.** If they green light his “emergency” tariffs, they’ll be reversing their own made-up reasoning in a Biden case from just two years ago. In that case, they said that Congress needed to weigh in. **This case should be more cut-and-dry than that—Trump’s sweeping tariff agenda is clearly an illegal exercise of executive power, and his “national emergency” only exists in his mind.** **But the MAGA justices on the Supreme Court have made it clear that they’re willing to enable Trump’s worst impulses and give him broad powers to do whatever he wants.** [**Our experts are monitoring the oral arguments closely, and we’re bringing our analysis back to activists like you across the country. We’re organizing the response to the Supreme Court at every step. Chip in today to power our efforts!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6k1HsDub_o_gCgkaC5oDh_yk2S7RtSa_xVtC_RxuMt3c5ltIebHQ3ls6qdGho8cXs_me2xhKzPnkGtQMwPV0x3UJ8oC_-f5Dv3uNVst0-Z5fkkpAerL2K3kx8DjVmun4i_6eUbR-v1vvkVPQc3hGQo87h2AQ4rLNMBC-t3tqamonj4ptSnKbHV7F4YECf9lL9TrOc3y0-wUoQxmXz04e9nUoO2Tv5w3YTCx-naRU2M8vZXQCsIx0OHr6-xXx-Vk-mg-9opBl2BEz_puKDkXpIc30yMv3s1h-p5BhNEzOFa6g/4ld/cMHRwOXSRhCI1xAV2358PQ/h1/h001.aTdoyhLx7gE3ilkb9jsMKjINL-zu2fQoJ750R-jKedE) Thank you for fighting back against executive overreach, Morgan Stahr
United for Democracy

name: Team Fight Like Hell
subject: From California to New York, voters showed up.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
From coast to coast, progress won big. |
#
---
Team, From California to Michigan to New Jersey, Virginia, and beyond, _we made our voices heard._ We are so excited that we added two new Democratic governors to our ranks, ready to get stuff done and deliver on the kitchen-table issues that help people get ahead. Abigail Spanberger in Virginia and Mikie Sherrill in New Jersey will always put their people first. **Governor Whitmer was proud to support both of them on the campaign trail. Now, they’ll join her as strong, compassionate governors fighting like hell for working families in their states.** And we can’t forget about Michigan. Our work paid off, and voters turned out to elect Democrats in cities like Detroit and Pontiac, proof that when we organize and fight like hell, we win. Tuesday’s elections showed that Democrats are seeing the kind of massive turnout we need to win — but you can bet DC Republicans saw it, too. This was the biggest sign yet that we can win next year, but it’s clear: **National Republicans will pour everything they have into trying to stop our movement in 2026.** **[That’s why we can’t let up. We need to build our grassroots war chest now — before they have a chance to outspend us and outorganize us. clean_body: From coast to coast, progress won big. | Team, From California to Michigan to New Jersey, Virginia, and beyond, we made our voices heard. We are so excited that we added two new Democratic governors to our ranks, ready to get stuff done and deliver on the kitchen-table issues that help people get ahead. Abigail Spanberger in Virginia and Mikie Sherrill in New Jersey will always put their people first. Governor Whitmer was proud to support both of them on the campaign trail. Now, they’ll join her as strong, compassionate governors fighting like hell for working families in their states. And we can’t forget about Michigan. Our work paid off, and voters turned out to elect Democrats in cities like Detroit and Pontiac, proof that when we organize and fight like hell, we win. Tuesday’s elections showed that Democrats are seeing the kind of massive turnout we need to win — but you can bet DC Republicans saw it, too. This was the biggest sign yet that we can win next year, but it’s clear: National Republicans will pour everything they have into trying to stop our movement in 2026. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for fueling our movement, and cheers to building on our progress. — Fight Like Hell Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. name: JD Vance
subject: This is not getting nearly enough attention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Van Epps for Congress
body:
Since Inauguration Day in January, there's been a more than 1,000% increase in assaults against our ICE officers.

| | | | ** ** Hey Friend, Vice President JD Vance here. Since Inauguration Day in January, there's been a **more than 1,000% increase** in assaults against our ICE officers.

No one has done more to encourage this dangerous lawlessness than Democratic politicians, who simply refuse to stop demonizing these brave men and women putting it all on the line to keep us safe.

**Well, what if I told you we're on the verge of electing yet another radical Left Democrat so brazen that she actually filmed herself laughing and bragging about "bullying" - _her words, not mine_ - ICE and law enforcement?**

**If the patriots who helped deliver our 2024 landslide victory do not engage in a major way these next few weeks, that's exactly what may happen in Tennessee on _December 2nd_ , where the whole nation will be watching a critical House special election.**

Not next year. __This year.__

I don't have to tell you how razor-thin our margin is in the House, and losing just one seat like this wouldn't just spell trouble for next year. We would feel the pain immediately.

[**In this vital race, President Trump offered his complete and total endorsement to Matt Van Epps - a West Point graduate, combat veteran, public servant, and America First true believer.**](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkL2OrSAUhZ8GOwwg4rGguD-xO7e9pUHYKhMFwt7Hk3n7icU8wNRr5Vsr3__n_HTxiGn7506wfpkrzrRHjJgybUAU05bA1eMTUp6VUD2Xkgtz92QTrB9B6UU3YOVglDZq1LLZrXlAGNbQe6N7MzopRG-Wse_12o29eOgm2pslpTBKCqHGtuseq3NGGzMocOvCtIAQKdfW54RQL0fxgqVmF7xDahNQc9idqCDrfjE1MTUh-FeF9h1ThdD6fDI1nY6IXy5xKAX5miv3OW0VEJmaPsIdeeAnILoNOO650lx4yeVGdtOLzpk86_7--c2_HzfVhvKOxxHRDEyL7XTxuOca-rHBy6qvAAAA___UrX7a)

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Showing up and listening
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley for Wake**
body:
Whether you’re concerned about the safety of our communities, defending our rights, or making sure justice is applied equally, I want to hear from you. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118803144/580944498/-343666687?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251106_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGZhMTg5Ni01M2JiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z4zHkO7UWdgibYWUmyqxBo-rAYMMRkHqSL8yQh7Q1cA=&emci=90bce98f-53bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&emdi=1dfa1896-53bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&ceid=28008880)
---
Peter, Earlier this week, North Carolina held municipal elections for local office — and what a night it was for Democrats across Wake County! **We proved that we can make a real difference when we show up and listen, put our heads down, and fight to move our state forward.** That’s how Democrats won yesterday, and it’s how we’re going to win this race for Wake County District Attorney next year. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you today.** There’s nothing more important to me than listening to folks like you to explain which issues you care about and want our elected leaders to focus on. Whether you’re concerned about the safety of our communities, defending our rights, or making sure justice is applied equally, I want to hear from you. There’s a lot of work ahead, but after seeing the energy in that room, I know we can do this. **[So Peter, can you take a moment to fill out our priorities survey and share your thoughts with me on what you’d like me to focus on as Wake County’s next District Attorney?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118803148/580944501/2080462204?contactdata=4fwxCGeVvK6MKp3t37clLXtc04WWqNpIS9IJAPR0z7mIzwAJT1jiuzMwAt0PvLezvjx7qTbq2kgLz4O/hQTwPah7rqEXhT9BGF9V808H/+H9w1C56baqhqVinF46gbN0&refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251106_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGZhMTg5Ni01M2JiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z4zHkO7UWdgibYWUmyqxBo-rAYMMRkHqSL8yQh7Q1cA=&emci=90bce98f-53bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&emdi=1dfa1896-53bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&ceid=28008880)** | [SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118803156/580944513/2080462204?contactdata=4fwxCGeVvK6MKp3t37clLXtc04WWqNpIS9IJAPR0z7mIzwAJT1jiuzMwAt0PvLezvjx7qTbq2kgLz4O/hQTwPah7rqEXhT9BGF9V808H/+H9w1C56baqhqVinF46gbN0&refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251106_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGZhMTg5Ni01M2JiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z4zHkO7UWdgibYWUmyqxBo-rAYMMRkHqSL8yQh7Q1cA=&emci=90bce98f-53bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&emdi=1dfa1896-53bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&ceid=28008880)
---
We have a lot of work to do to tackle political corruption in our state, and this is a job that’s going to require _all_ of us working together to get North Carolina back on track.
Wake County deserves a DA who will show up in the community and listen to people’s concerns.
I’m running to make a difference, and I couldn’t do it without you. Thanks for being part of this effort.
— Wiley

* * *
Wiley for Wake
PO Box 563
Raleigh, NC 27602

clean_body: Whether you’re concerned about the safety of our communities, defending our rights, or making sure justice is applied equally, I want to hear from you. | Peter, Earlier this week, North Carolina held municipal elections for local office — and what a night it was for Democrats across Wake County! We proved that we can make a real difference when we show up and listen, put our heads down, and fight to move our state forward. That’s how Democrats won yesterday, and it’s how we’re going to win this race for Wake County District Attorney next year. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. There’s nothing more important to me than listening to folks like you to explain which issues you care about and want our elected leaders to focus on. Whether you’re concerned about the safety of our communities, defending our rights, or making sure justice is applied equally, I want to hear from you. There’s a lot of work ahead, but after seeing the energy in that room, I know we can do this. | We have a lot of work to do to tackle political corruption in our state, and this is a job that’s going to require all of us working together to get North Carolina back on track. Wake County deserves a DA who will show up in the community and listen to people’s concerns. I’m running to make a difference, and I couldn’t do it without you. Thanks for being part of this effort. — Wiley Wiley for Wake PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States | mailto:info@wileynickel.com | Paid for by Wiley for Wake

body:
Did you catch my interview on MeidasTouch, Derek? I joined last week to discuss the Republican shutdown and their failure to address the healthcare crisis they caused: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118803235/580944762/981825435?refcode=email_110625_meidastouch&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmYxMDdiZS01M2JiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=llJr2ZJJtvl6qt9197UHj1T3VcZHkqq4znp9UgmlBxA=) Right now, Pennsylvanians and folks across the country are staring down the barrel of spiking healthcare premiums. Some of my constituents are looking at an increase of thousands of dollars more per month just to keep their health coverage. To put it simply: this is going to blow up people’s budgets. If Republicans refuse to work with Democrats to clean up the GOP's mess, lots of people are going to be faced with health insurance they can’t afford and financial ruin if they get sick. **Derek, this is the Republican plan. They have full control in Washington, and they have created this crisis. Americans are getting pounded by high costs in every aspect of life— _and they’ve done nothing to fix it._** The only way to stop this? I refuse to accept decline as destiny. I understand why a lot of young people are cynical about the American Dream. It's up to us to revive it, and that's what we're going to do in Ohio.
Here's my plan to address and FIX the affordability crisis:

* Reduce electric bills by producing more energy.
* Bring down housing costs by building more homes.
* Cut red tape that impedes business formation.
* Curb inflation by ending government waste.

[I’m running for Governor because if we get this right, Ohio becomes the model, and America follows.](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/HIEYHLW8mQ43ipGIfo0wnTi_UzFulk_PUhfZtAN8T5In9y5jFdk0uo7IXN8vinnxKaMoD-fvM7-dsXuf9dz-SBwlOqZjKFNiQrLtg7Lt8xKyn-PkdfDySHdTXIfRu5lhluTuKgR3ralzeEUE6uud71ZdUIkU-WJVLFjUwhAM4nd_6NL7xJ2hPoLqlOK1SZOyUfaILE3r2GCWjaVO6FqM4tPXGpGTZe2eZjsgMubnH2jcWsCuEpS6rAgDSbocgIA9Pwei2xmvauT34MtQpJMZPw5CaA3sgpupRY3P5An5TvUcp0GC_hOpI7F4Ri5fr_3ZTVirkozIfmsxDfBC_iJWEjM7OBBIIZCfzyWT6jbY2NFz3JGEcL1R5d3wKqSoLtevYZQEbWOs0jsZTmpikww5COeKGPrR1wI9YW-F5Qjcoik-pFlWvLtdWUyABmpUPL6WoL2D0hikwGtw9BH2dw855Hk7dcuvS1EZVhXMA27_dAo8BzJr9LRVNphZxxTb9gu5g5Gkokhb7MR3D1q2H0JpF7K79l6M-E4dq6WbVyu-kMK_SP6EbrZflDgMdP2t_dFvi1XelKNvRuAguua3GM79pVsX-1bZ93WLdbe5EfFdmJeVoiCvVzbiAgdZ5rBKywm-ANzgCxz9qYsPXlyQzrkwfSJyq7fYL52i29QFJmcNtYX2IU6Bd_Ko7gFjemTP7fLLTGO1qwpQwxdTvPi6n0EkEjeXP9are3KI7TikSh80sfTK9yEHRzTFWMJ-6iioLgUgIH0ywoplYRcZSAXyMpCxQwtFwgflkusG5_7IKmYOyndxRnnPJHkZQ9fJXzMvqnMv6D3wZEvUkrx_HEuiRQ/yjgUBgDy6dAj-ZELqLG24kAPfyoYSPH4/14)[ENDORSE MY PLAN

clean_body: Because if we get this right, Ohio becomes the model, and America follows. , I refuse to accept decline as destiny. I understand why a lot of young people are cynical about the American Dream. It's up to us to revive it, and that's what we're going to do in Ohio. Here's my plan to address and FIX the affordability crisis: Reduce electric bills by producing more energy. Bring down housing costs by building more homes. Cut red tape that impedes business formation. Curb inflation by ending government waste. by state. City by city. We spark a national revival. We take back control from the bureaucrats, the political elites, and the career politicians who have dragged this country into decline. But make no mistake: The Left will do everything they can to stop us. make Ohio the blueprint and let's make America great - FOR GOOD. Vivek Ramaswamy Candidate for Governor of Ohio| | | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this,

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: thank you, Speaker Pelosi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
---
| | Nancy Pelosi is the greatest Speaker of all time. The United States is a much better nation today because of her dedication to serving the children, the climate and the country. Because of Speaker Pelosi’s leadership, Democrats passed meaningful legislation that has made life better for the American people, including the Affordable Care Act, the Inflation Reduction Act and the American Rescue Plan. During her 20 years leading House Democrats, she fiercely navigated many trials and tribulations, including a once-in-a-century pandemic and a horrific attack on the United States Capitol. Through it all, she led with strength and dignity. Speaker Pelosi has been an incredible mentor, trusted friend and awesome colleague who has profoundly blessed me with her insights, perspectives and leadership values. As Speaker Pelosi embarks on this new chapter, my prayers and gratitude are with her and her family. Keep the faith, Hakeem

---

---

Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats.

clean_body: | | Nancy Pelosi is the greatest Speaker of all time. The United States is a much better nation today because of her dedication to serving the children, the climate and the country. Because of Speaker Pelosi’s leadership, Democrats passed meaningful legislation that has made life better for the American people, including the Affordable Care Act, the Inflation Reduction Act and the American Rescue Plan. During her 20 years leading House Democrats, she fiercely navigated many trials and tribulations, including a once-in-a-century pandemic and a horrific attack on the United States Capitol. Through it all, she led with strength and dignity. Speaker Pelosi has been an incredible mentor, trusted friend and awesome colleague who has profoundly blessed me with her insights, perspectives and leadership values. As Speaker Pelosi embarks on this new chapter, my prayers and gratitude are with her and her family. Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. name: Emilia Sykes
subject: I wanted you to hear this from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
Ohio Republicans just cemented their most gerrymandered maps yet.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T035b8dde-d5f3-4c01-8940-7151fd912a64/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| I wanted you to hear this from me, Peter: Ohio Republicans just cemented their most gerrymandered House maps yet. Under these maps, my race in OH-13 remains one of the most competitive in the country. A dark money group is piling on with a new $5 MILLION ad buy targeting me and fellow Democrats in key toss-up races. Republicans will do whatever it takes to grow their razor-thin House majority. [I won my race by just 2.2 points last year, and the GOP will spend MILLIONS to unseat me this time. That’s why we’ve set a bold goal to raise $50,000 today to fight back. Can you please rush in $10 split between Blue Amp Action and me before midnight?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tce72a1cc-1dcb-45f5-bcb9-87db03624139/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2632cf72-8428-4e1d-9853-5f19aff11642/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $20](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0b88b81-6b03-48ac-bf8d-0eb549b1d675/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE MORE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T029f8e07-aa87-4e38-81c6-9269bc683fa1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| My top priority is bringing the voices of folks in OH-13 to Congress with me so our communities have a champion fighting for them. Meanwhile, my Republican colleagues rammed through legislation that slashes Medicaid and nutrition benefits for millions of Americans. Then they shut down the government. The GOP knows their unpopular policies could cost them the midterms. They can’t win fair and square. That’s why they’re rigging the maps and pouring millions in dark money behind attack ads. [We can make sure voters hear the truth above the GOP’s noise. But I’m relying on your urgent support to make it happen. Please rush in a split donation of $10 to Blue Amp Action and me right now to power this critical work >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T54a50300-b6de-424e-80af-031d33c76b79/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for helping meet the urgency of this moment. I can’t do this without you. — Emilia Sykes

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3971f9d7-bf71-41e4-9eef-dff7cf2a4bf7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Patriot Cigars
subject: NEW LIMITED CIGAR RELEASE "The Garand"
body:
THE GARAND

Introducing The Garand — a limited-release salute to American grit and battlefield glory from Patriot Cigar Company.

Hand-rolled in a commanding 7.5 x 48 Churchill, The Garand stands tall like the legendary rifle it’s named after — a symbol of strength, precision, and American might. Expertly crafted with 7-year aged Nicaraguan tobacco and finished in a rich Habano wrapper, this cigar delivers a smooth, medium-strength profile that fires off bold flavor with every draw — steady, confident, and unmistakably patriotic.

AVAILABLE IN 5 PACKS ONLY!
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=d60fa5a8b5&e=fbf55fa623

This is a STRICTLY limited release.
When The Garand is gone — it’s gone. No restock. No second run.

Lock, load, and light up history.

About The Garand

The Garand from Patriot Cigar Company is more than a premium hand-rolled cigar — it is a cigar built in tribute to the rifle that helped secure victory for freedom across the world: the M1 Garand, the rifle General George S. Patton famously called “the greatest battle implement ever devised.”

A commanding 7.5 x 48 Churchill, The Garand is rolled with precision and reverence, echoing the engineering excellence of its namesake. Packed with 7-year aged Nicaraguan filler and binder, and clad in a beautifully finished Habano wrapper, this cigar offers a confidently smooth medium-strength profile — a slow-burning, dignified smoke with depth, refinement, and authority. It is rich without being overpowering, balanced yet bold, a cigar built for those who honor legacy as much as flavor.
------------------------------------------------------------

** A Tribute to a Legend
------------------------------------------------------------

Adopted by the U.S. military in 1936 and carried proudly through World War II and the Korean War, the M1 Garand was the first standard-issue semi-automatic battle rifle in the world — a game-changer in combat. Where other nations’ soldiers still chambered rounds by hand, American troops were able to fire shot after shot with speed and reliability. It was rugged. It was accurate. It was trusted in the mud, the snow, the jungles, and the beaches of Normandy. It represented innovation, confidence, and overwhelming American firepower.

The M1 Garand wasn’t just a rifle — it was a handheld symbol of American dominance and ingenuity, a lifeline to soldiers whose courage reshaped history.
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Cigar Worthy of the Name
------------------------------------------------------------

The spirit of that legendary rifle lives in this limited-edition release:
* 7.5 x 48 Churchill — a proud, commanding presence
* 7-year aged Nicaraguan tobacco — matured for depth and character
* Habano wrapper — warm, rich, and worthy of a namesake of warfighters
* Medium strength — a long, thoughtful smoke that marches forward with confidence

This cigar is meant to be enjoyed the way history is remembered — deliberately, with pride, and without rush.
------------------------------------------------------------

** A One-Time Tribute
------------------------------------------------------------

Like the heroes who carried the M1 across the world, The Garand will not be mass-produced or remade. This is a strictly limited release — when this cigar is gone, it’s gone. No second run. No encore.

Light one in honor of the warriors who stood between tyranny and liberty — and for the enduring American spirit that still refuses to yield.

The Garand
A rifle that won wars.
A cigar that honors the warrior.

AVAILABLE IN 5 PACKS ONLY
USE PROMO CODE
FOR 20% OFF CIGARS

** NEW PATRIOT PACK
------------------------------------------------------------
INCLUDES: TRAVEL CASE, CUTTER & CIGARS!

The Patriot Pack — Smoke for the Bold and the Free

Stand tall and light up freedom with The Patriot Pack from Patriot Cigar Company — a powerful lineup built for true American patriots. Featuring The “Pledge” Premium Leather 3-Cigar Travel Case, the Old Glory Cigar Cutter, and three powerhouse blends — TNT, MOAB, and Sidewinder — this set is your all-American arsenal of premium, hand-rolled cigars. Crafted for quality. Fueled by liberty. Made for those who never back down.
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=4a145db5b1&e=fbf55fa623

**
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Patriot Pack
A Bold Salute to Liberty
------------------------------------------------------------

Raise your colors high — the Patriot Pack from Patriot Cigar Company is the ultimate tribute to freedom, made for those who stand proud. This isn’t just a cigar set; it’s a declaration, a statement, and a smoke-filled salute to the red, white, and blue.

** Included Inside the Patriot Pack
------------------------------------------------------------

**
“The Pledge” Premium Leather 3-Cigar Travel Case
------------------------------------------------------------

Carry your cigars in patriotic style. This rugged yet elegant case is crafted in premium printed leather with the pledge of allegiance, built to safeguard your Patriot Cigars while projecting staunch American pride. Designed for travel, with room for three cigars up to a 60-ring size and a secure closure, it’s more than storage—it’s armor for your freedom smoke.

** Old Glory Cigar Cutter
------------------------------------------------------------

No patriot’s toolkit is complete without a sharp edge. The Old Glory Cigar Cutter is a dual-blade instrument worthy of the name. It slices clean and precise, honoring the flag with every snip (and making sure your draw is perfect).
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Finest Blends Under the Flag
------------------------------------------------------------

** TNT
------------------------------------------------------------

Explosive in flavor and bold in character, TNT is a powerhouse medium to full blend that commands your attention. From first light to the last ember, it burns with authority.

** MOAB (Mother of All Bombs)
------------------------------------------------------------

MOAB delivers a full-bodied punch, a maduro cigar that lives up to its name. Deep, rich, and intense — this is not for the faint of heart but for the true patriot who demands maximum firepower in flavor.

** Sidewinder
------------------------------------------------------------

Sleek, swift, and sly — the Sidewinder rounds out the pack with a medium blend that strikes with finesse. Balanced, bold, and full of character, it’s the curveball every patriotic smoker needs.

The Patriot Pack doesn’t stop there, you’ll also get a Patriot-branded beverage koozie, coaster, sticker, and patch—because every smoke session deserves a touch of American pride.
------------------------------------------------------------

** Why the Patriot Pack Matters
------------------------------------------------------------

This is not merely a sampler or gift set. The Patriot Pack is your on-demand arsenal of American spirit and premium craftsmanship. It’s a perfect companion for travel, a striking gift for fellow flag-bearers, or your own daily reminder that freedom is worth celebrating — one premium puff at a time.

Light up The Patriot Pack. Puff with pride. And let the smoke carry your pledge to liberty.

** Uncompromising Quality, Made for Patriots
------------------------------------------------------------

At Patriot Cigar Company, every cigar is handcrafted in Estelí, Nicaragua, using premium-aged tobacco (aged a minimum of three years). Our blends were born from the desire to bring together the love of premium smokes and the love of our country, forging a brand built on passion and pride.

** NEW PREMIUM
8 CIGAR SAMPLER PACK
------------------------------------------------------------
USE PROMO CODE: EAGLE FOR 20% OFF CIGARS
Experience true American freedom with 8 bold, premium cigars—including the gold-wrapped MOGUL and exclusive Operation Never Tell—only available in the Patriot Cigar Company Premium Sampler Pack.

Cigars Included

1xMOAB
1xTNT
1xMARK48
1xHellfire
1xSidewinder
1xSidewinder Maduro
1x24K Gold Wrapped Mogul
1xLimited Release Unbanded Operation Never Tell

https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=b1fa94b8ba&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=d84f9ab4ba&e=fbf55fa623

For the true American cigar patriot, this is the ultimate way to experience the full power, pride, and craftsmanship behind Patriot Cigar Company. The Premium Sampler Pack delivers 8 premium cigars that represent the heart and soul of our lineup—crafted for those who believe in freedom, hard work, and savoring every damn moment.

You’ll receive all 6 flagship blends that built our reputation for bold flavor and uncompromising quality, plus two standouts that make this sampler truly elite: the 24Kt Gold-Wrapped MOGUL, a cigar that radiates luxury and dominance with every draw, and the Limited Release Operation Never Tell—a 5.5×50 Maduro Robusto shrouded in mystery. We’re not revealing the tobaccos inside, but trust us—it’s smooth, powerful, and absolutely unforgettable. Operation Never Tell is exclusive to this pack, and once these are gone, they’re gone.

The Premium Sampler Pack doesn’t stop there. Alongside your 8 cigars, you’ll get a Patriot-branded beverage koozie, coaster, sticker, and patch—because every smoke session deserves a touch of American pride.

8 Cigars. 1 Mission. 100% Patriot.
Light up, lean back, and let freedom burn.
NEW CIGAR LIMITED RELEASE
"OPERATION NEVER TELL"

The Unbanded Limited Release Operation Never Tell—a 5.5×50 Maduro Robusto shrouded in mystery. We’re not revealing the tobaccos inside, but trust us—it’s smooth, powerful, and absolutely unforgettable. Operation Never Tell is exclusive to the Premium Sampler Pack available at MYPATRIOTCIGARS.COM (https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=cc529175c6&e=fbf55fa623) , and once these are gone, they’re gone.

Don't miss this cigar!

About The Garand The Garand from Patriot Cigar Company is more than a premium hand-rolled cigar — it is a cigar built in tribute to the rifle that helped secure victory for freedom across the world: the M1 Garand, the rifle General George S. Patton famously called “the greatest battle implement ever devised.” A commanding 7.5 x 48 Churchill, The Garand is rolled with precision and reverence, echoing the engineering excellence of its namesake. Packed with 7-year aged Nicaraguan filler and binder, and clad in a beautifully finished Habano wrapper, this cigar offers a confidently smooth medium-strength profile — a slow-burning, dignified smoke with depth, refinement, and authority. It is rich without being overpowering, balanced yet bold, a cigar built for those who honor legacy as much as flavor. A Tribute to a Legend Adopted by the U.S. military in 1936 and carried proudly through World War II and the Korean War, the M1 Garand was the first standard-issue semi-automatic battle rifle in the world — a game-changer in combat. Where other nations’ soldiers still chambered rounds by hand, American troops were able to fire shot after shot with speed and reliability. It was rugged. It was accurate. It was trusted in the mud, the snow, the jungles, and the beaches of Normandy. It represented innovation, confidence, and overwhelming American firepower. The M1 Garand wasn’t just a rifle — it was a handheld symbol of American dominance and ingenuity, a lifeline to soldiers whose courage reshaped history. The Cigar Worthy of the Name The spirit of that legendary rifle lives in this limited-edition release: 7.5 x 48 Churchill — a proud, commanding presence 7-year aged Nicaraguan tobacco — matured for depth and character Habano wrapper — warm, rich, and worthy of a namesake of warfighters Medium strength — a long, thoughtful smoke that marches forward with confidence This cigar is meant to be enjoyed the way history is remembered — deliberately, with pride, and without rush. A One-Time Tribute Like the heroes who carried the M1 across the world, The Garand will not be mass-produced or remade. This is a strictly limited release — when this cigar is gone, it’s gone. No second run. No encore. Light one in honor of the warriors who stood between tyranny and liberty — and for the enduring American spirit that still refuses to yield. The Garand A rifle that won wars. A cigar that honors the warrior. AVAILABLE IN 5 PACKS ONLY USE PROMO CODE FOR 20% OFF CIGARS eagle Shop Now 20% OFF CIGARS () NEW PATRIOT PACK INCLUDES: TRAVEL CASE, CUTTER & CIGARS! The Patriot Pack — Smoke for the Bold and the Free Stand tall and light up freedom with The Patriot Pack from Patriot Cigar Company — a powerful lineup built for true American patriots. Featuring The “Pledge” Premium Leather 3-Cigar Travel Case, the Old Glory Cigar Cutter, and three powerhouse blends — TNT, MOAB, and Sidewinder — this set is your all-American arsenal of premium, hand-rolled cigars. Crafted for quality. Fueled by liberty. Made for those who never back down. The Patriot Pack A Bold Salute to Liberty Raise your colors high — the Patriot Pack from Patriot Cigar Company is the ultimate tribute to freedom, made for those who stand proud. This isn’t just a cigar set; it’s a declaration, a statement, and a smoke-filled salute to the red, white, and blue. Included Inside the Patriot Pack “The Pledge” Premium Leather 3-Cigar Travel Case Carry your cigars in patriotic style. This rugged yet elegant case is crafted in premium printed leather with the pledge of allegiance, built to safeguard your Patriot Cigars while projecting staunch American pride. Designed for travel, with room for three cigars up to a 60-ring size and a secure closure, it’s more than storage—it’s armor for your freedom smoke. Old Glory Cigar Cutter No patriot’s toolkit is complete without a sharp edge. The Old Glory Cigar Cutter is a dual-blade instrument worthy of the name. It slices clean and precise, honoring the flag with every snip (and making sure your draw is perfect). The Finest Blends Under the Flag TNT Explosive in flavor and bold in character, TNT is a powerhouse medium to full blend that commands your attention. From first light to the last ember, it burns with authority. MOAB (Mother of All Bombs) MOAB delivers a full-bodied punch, a maduro cigar that lives up to its name. Deep, rich, and intense — this is not for the faint of heart but for the true patriot who demands maximum firepower in flavor. Sidewinder Sleek, swift, and sly — the Sidewinder rounds out the pack with a medium blend that strikes with finesse. Balanced, bold, and full of character, it’s the curveball every patriotic smoker needs. The Patriot Pack doesn’t stop there, you’ll also get a Patriot-branded beverage koozie, coaster, sticker, and patch—because every smoke session deserves a touch of American pride. Why the Patriot Pack Matters This is not merely a sampler or gift set. The Patriot Pack is your on-demand arsenal of American spirit and premium craftsmanship. It’s a perfect companion for travel, a striking gift for fellow flag-bearers, or your own daily reminder that freedom is worth celebrating — one premium puff at a time. Light up The Patriot Pack. Puff with pride. And let the smoke carry your pledge to liberty. Uncompromising Quality, Made for Patriots At Patriot Cigar Company, every cigar is handcrafted in Estelí, Nicaragua, using premium-aged tobacco (aged a minimum of three years). Our blends were born from the desire to bring together the love of premium smokes and the love of our country, forging a brand built on passion and pride. NEW PREMIUM 8 CIGAR SAMPLER PACK USE PROMO CODE: EAGLE FOR 20% OFF CIGARS Experience true American freedom with 8 bold, premium cigars—including the gold-wrapped MOGUL and exclusive Operation Never Tell—only available in the Patriot Cigar Company Premium Sampler Pack. Cigars Included 1xMOAB 1xTNT 1xMARK48 1xHellfire 1xSidewinder 1xSidewinder Maduro 1x24K Gold Wrapped Mogul 1xLimited Release Unbanded Operation Never Tell For the true American cigar patriot, this is the ultimate way to experience the full power, pride, and craftsmanship behind Patriot Cigar Company. The Premium Sampler Pack delivers 8 premium cigars that represent the heart and soul of our lineup—crafted for those who believe in freedom, hard work, and savoring every damn moment. You’ll receive all 6 flagship blends that built our reputation for bold flavor and uncompromising quality, plus two standouts that make this sampler truly elite: the 24Kt Gold-Wrapped MOGUL, a cigar that radiates luxury and dominance with every draw, and the Limited Release Operation Never Tell—a 5.5×50 Maduro Robusto shrouded in mystery. We’re not revealing the tobaccos inside, but trust us—it’s smooth, powerful, and absolutely unforgettable. Operation Never Tell is exclusive to this pack, and once these are gone, they’re gone. name: Chris Pappas HQ
subject: Inside Elections just downgraded our chances of winning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Democrats can’t flip the Senate without winning New Hampshire. That’s why we have to rally around Chris right now.
#
Peter, we have a problem.
A top election analyst just downgraded our chances of winning the U.S. Senate race in New Hampshire after former Sen. John Sununu announced his comeback bid.
Let us be absolutely clear: **If Chris Pappas loses in New Hampshire, Democrats have _no_ viable path to flipping the Senate.**
We can’t afford to fall behind in this moment. **[That’s why we’re asking you to support Chris and State Democrats Committee with a donation today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97268?refcode=em20251106-9678&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9678%2E614464%2EhQN5zi)**
With Senator Shaheen retiring, this seat is wide open and extremely vulnerable.
And with Sununu in the race, Republicans just got a huge boost in their efforts to flip this seat and keep the Senate majority.
John Sununu isn’t just any Republican. He’s backed by the entire Washington establishment. He comes from a political dynasty, has national name recognition, and brings a fundraising machine fueled by Wall Street and corporate special interests.
**Chris Pappas is the Democrat who can win this race.** He’s a proven public servant who’s won his purple Congressional district in New Hampshire four times. But this race just got more expensive, more competitive, and more dangerous for Democrats. That’s why we’re asking:
**[Can you split a donation between State Democrats Committee and Chris Pappas right now to stop Republicans’ scheme to keep control of the Senate?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97268?refcode=em20251106-9678&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9678%2E614464%2EhQN5zi)**
**[RUSH A DONATION](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97268?refcode=em20251106-9678&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9678%2E614464%2EhQN5zi)**
Far-right billionaires and special interests are already flooding New Hampshire with cash to flip this seat red.
If Democrats lose here, we lose the Senate. It’s that simple. We must hold this seat by electing Chris Pappas to keep our chances of flipping Senate control alive. And that only happens if we help him build the grassroots support he’ll need to overcome the money pouring into New Hampshire.
**[Please split a donation between Chris Pappas and State Democrats Committee right now. It’s never been more critical.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97268?refcode=em20251106-9678&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9678%2E614464%2EhQN5zi)**
**[RUSH A DONATION](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97268?refcode=em20251106-9678&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=9678%2E614464%2EhQN5zi)**
Thanks for stepping up,
Team Pappas

| Peter,

This week, Abigail Spanberger made history, _and so did Emerge._

**An Emerge alum is now the first woman ever elected Governor of Virginia.**

Abigail is a mom and former CIA officer who watched her congressman vote to take away healthcare from Virginia families and decided to do something about it. Her mother encouraged her to join Emerge’s historic 2017 class, and with Emerge’s training and community behind her, she flipped a Republican seat, defended it twice, and never stopped fighting for working families.

**Now, as Governor—eight years after her Emerge training—she’ll keep doing what our alums do best: delivering results.**

[_**Abigail’s win shows what happens when we train and support Democratic women who are ready to lead with courage and conviction.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118803578/580945934/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-11-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ4MDA0ZThhLTU0YmItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGQ2ZjMzOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UOL0Nmdj_QrUyXd1jzT4fbrUxs1vfEk0RFMVgsiWsdk=)

Rebecca is gaining momentum against corrupt Republican incumbent Derrick Van Orden because she _gets it_ — she knows what it's like to put in a double shift waitressing. She knows the support local farmers need because she grew up working on her family's dairy farm in Eau Claire. And she knows that even as the polls shift slightly in her favor, she's got a long road and tough race ahead.

Van Orden is one of the richest members of Congress. He has continuously ignored Wisconsin farmers and cut health care for Wisconsin families. And he'll say and do and spend whatever it takes to win this race — including calling on his billionaire friends to flood the field with money.

Still, this poll is an early indicator that the people of Wisconsin are ready for a change. They're ready for a leader who will protect health care, defend reproductive freedom, grow local economies, and make sure every family, no matter their zip code and no matter their income, has a real shot. And that leader is Rebecca Cooke.

**That's why EMILYs List has supported Rebecca from day one, and why we'll work tirelessly until she flips this seat — and the U.S. House — in 2026.**

clean_body: The latest update on WI-03 >> | = Peter — Did you catch the new poll on Rebecca Cooke's race in Wisconsin's 3rd Congressional District? = **= | = Rebecca is gaining momentum against corrupt Republican incumbent Derrick Van Orden because she gets it — she knows what it's like to put in a double shift waitressing. She knows the support local farmers need because she grew up working on her family's dairy farm in Eau Claire. And she knows that even as the polls shift slightly in her favor, she's got a long road and tough race ahead. Van Orden is one of the richest members of Congress. He has continuously ignored Wisconsin farmers and cut health care for Wisconsin families. And he'll say and do and spend whatever it takes to win this race — including calling on his billionaire friends to flood the field with money. Still, this poll is an early indicator that the people of Wisconsin are ready for a change. They're ready for a leader who will protect health care, defend reproductive freedom, grow local economies, and make sure every family, no matter their zip code and no matter their income, has a real shot. And that leader is Rebecca Cooke. That's why EMILYs List has supported Rebecca from day one, and why we'll work tirelessly until she flips this seat — and the U.S. House — in 2026. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for stepping up, Ben Ray (he/him/his) Deputy Chief Campaigns Officer, Federal and Gubernatorial = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Andrea Salinas
subject: I won’t lie
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
the stakes of the race here in OR-06 just keep getting higher and higher.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118804026/580947544/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGQxYTJhNC01NWJiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AP98kEUTmuu--aOK8czEMEWOlPgbflz4C0WnsSDoYQA=) It’s Andrea. I won’t lie to you, the stakes of the race here in OR-06 just keep getting higher and higher. **FIRST → National Republicans spent _MILLIONS_ to take me down two cycles in a row.** We beat them back both times, but there’s no doubt in my mind that they’re preparing to try again this cycle. **THEN → They kicked off a national redistricting war._GERRYMANDERING_** the maps in states like Texas, Indiana, and Missouri to cheat their way into a permanent majority. **NOW → With Speaker Mike Johnson STILL refusing to swear in Democratic Rep.-elect Adelita Grijalva for _OVER A MONTH_ , it’s clear to me that the Republican party will do ANYTHING to retain control over Washington. _But I won’t stand for it._** **[I’m calling for 100 Democrats to pitch in before midnight to help ensure the GOP’s schemes BLOW UP in their faces as they watch us take back the House on Election Day. Donald Trump already has a head start raising a massive warchest to boost extreme candidates across the country, but I know that together, we can overcome ANYTHING they throw our way. So what do you say?
