# [Pelosi finally retires after forcing conservative politics on congressional Democrats for decades](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=178221874&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4MjIxODc0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjI0Njc2MzYsImV4cCI6MTc2NTA1OTYzNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.StU1-02pL7efWziee6a3I5nu1s2xJwaBvJCf-uIp9o0)
### "Journalists" are re-writing history today to serve a powerful political dynasty, cement a cult of personality, and further degrade the vestiges of democracy--and none of that is about Trump
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---
| Nov 6
---
| [](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=178221874&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4MjIxODc0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MjQ2NzYzNiwiZXhwIjoxNzY1MDU5NjM2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Ep_RPMzDIcDsCRJTTvwUW31IpdV_NwKGU8x8-qSBAyQ&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=178221874&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4MjIxODc0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjI0Njc2MzYsImV4cCI6MTc2NTA1OTYzNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.StU1-02pL7efWziee6a3I5nu1s2xJwaBvJCf-uIp9o0&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=178221874&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4MjIxODc0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjI0Njc2MzYsImV4cCI6MTc2NTA1OTYzNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.StU1-02pL7efWziee6a3I5nu1s2xJwaBvJCf-uIp9o0)
---
| | [](https://substack..0pdb4zR1_UP9HlbsL-OOO2l1CmhpPb1wrUAW2bBIip0?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/pelosi-finally-retires-after-forcing?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I spent much of the last two days writing about Zohran Mamdani's historic victory in the New York City mayor's race and what it portends, but will have to return to that analysis in order to address an even bigger political earthquake: this morning's announcement by former House speaker Nancy Pelosi that she will finally retire, after 38 years of relentless insider trading while serving as a critical enforcer of conservatism among Democrats in Congress.
### **" Journalism" gaslighting the public**
Reading about Pelosi's retirement announcement offered me a pleasant surprise this morning. As I dug through one after another hagiography published by news outlets across the political spectrum, however, I found myself first rolling my eyes, then gnashing my teeth, and eventually gaining a new level of disgust for [whatever passes for "journalism"](https://substack.com/redirect/6190b522-ff78-4c26-a958-42f9550f1a62?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in this seemingly God forsaken country.
Professional writers are falling over each other heaping praise on Pelosi for being a trailblazing woman in Congress--ignoring her policy record, [the ways she used her influence](https://substack.com/redirect/433a7d9a-7aad-4214-a12f-fd536eb2b5e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) during her decades in Washington, and [how she retained her seat](https://substack.com/redirect/cc70d781-5fd5-4f34-90d7-d0bc9cd37e6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the one time she faced a challenge from the Left.
To whatever vanishing extent they hadn't already done so, journalists have shamelessly embraced the role of propagandists.
As long as they remain committed to covering up history, I'll remain dedicated to exposing it.
_Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! You can help inform your friends and challenge corporate disinformation by sharing this post._
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=178221874&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4MjIxODc0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjI0Njc2MzYsImV4cCI6MTc2NTA1OTYzNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.StU1-02pL7efWziee6a3I5nu1s2xJwaBvJCf-uIp9o0)
### **The history that journalists cover up**
As a matter of (unfortunate, but inescapable) fact, Nancy Pelosi is the [particular reason](https://substack.com/redirect/256a3ac2-30c3-4bd0-afee-6e4dd9d31cc5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) why Congress has never held a hearing on any proposed universal healthcare program, even though the principle has been acknowledged as a basic human right [everywhere](https://substack.com/redirect/d37b1d56-5df1-4cf3-94fd-05104a0f03ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) around the world--except in the United States--for decades.
As the former Chair of the House Intelligence Committee, Pelosi--as much as any single individual in the country--bears responsibility for insulating the bipartisan surveillance state from a transparent public debate that she, herself, has been ducking for nearly 40 years. The [last time](https://substack.com/redirect/5a959646-3630-4a37-80b1-46b782915bd9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) she defended her ideas against an informed opponent in public was in 1987.
When, as a young Muslim lawyer in the nation's capital, I fought in the courts for marriage equality for LGBTQ couples starting in 2004, Pelosi was nowhere to be found. Despite representing the nation's LGBTQ capital in Congress, she found it too risky to stick her neck out for her constituents. Nonetheless, LGBTQ organizations today treat her as if she's the second coming of Christ.
It's a bit like watching a pig being fed bacon.
_Learning anything? Don 't stop now! Subscriptions are free._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..4mZ--ebw11dSltVowhhMqjyASwtUdYKY-acsDD6HbAs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=178221874)
That's not the half of it. During an era when the global climate catastrophe grew to threaten--and possibly doom--life on Earth, Pelosi knelt on the neck of the future, refusing to consider adequate solutions and deriding the ideas of younger, more insightful legislators as a "Green New Dream."
Meanwhile, she pocketed over $200 million accumulated by leveraging her office for inside information that would be illegal for anyone else to use as a basis for trading securities. Why is it legal for Members of Congress to do exactly what corporate executives are prohibited from? Because Members of Congress write the laws!
### **Pelosi enabled Trump while claiming to oppose him**
Perhaps most revolting to me is how professional journalists continue to craft a false public narrative about Pelosi supposedly fighting Trump. In fact, she did everything possible to empower him, while embracing acts of meaningless political theater suggesting tension between them.
Pelosi [tore up](https://substack.com/redirect/ecd5cacb-cf5e-4d0b-864f-a8acf45c3dba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Trump's State of the Union address! She [sternly pointed](https://substack.com/redirect/5a74462e-5239-4c11-a013-f3b8c14f74d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at him across a table! She [put on sunglasses](https://substack.com/redirect/a84d8ea2-694f-4d17-bdc9-1575acd7cb27?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) while wearing [a red coat](https://substack.com/redirect/029ca4c6-b300-4de3-b2a9-11ff19e532ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) while walking out of the White House!
None of that meant anything more than her [donning kente cloth](https://substack.com/redirect/e52e103b-7ec2-4fda-92eb-e8ce18885486?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on the House floor after legislating policies for decades that filled America's prisons with millions of men & women of color.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c019a193-1e02-455b-8999-cf44e4e1fa56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Every act that Donald Trump undertook in his first term was possible only because Pelosi chose to write the checks. As the Speaker of the House at a time when Democrats controlled it, she held the purse strings. Yet, despite her vaunted acts of theatrical "resistance," she chose to fund every one of Trump's programs, including the construction of ICE concentration camps, and the deployment of DHS goon squads to suppress constitutionally "protected" dissent in cities including Portland and Kenosha, Wisconsin.
Trump did none of that alone. Each of those acts required Pelosi's support, which she consistently offered as journalists looked the other way.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=178221874&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4MjIxODc0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjI0Njc2MzYsImV4cCI6MTc2NTA1OTYzNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.StU1-02pL7efWziee6a3I5nu1s2xJwaBvJCf-uIp9o0)
The most compelling example of Pelosi's supposed resistance to Trump was the pair of impeachment processes that she led late in his first term. But Pelosi stonewalled any attempt at impeachment until it became impossible for her to continue doing so--largely, I dare say, because I was facing her in a general election at the time and [screaming bloody murder about the need for the president to be impeached](https://substack.com/redirect/d75ce092-2aec-4f72-a7e4-80e09519ab09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
When Pelosi changed her position on impeachment in the face of my critique, it was one of half a dozen issues on which she shifted positions during the three months between March 2020 (when I won the jungle primary on the eve of the COVID-19 outbreak) and July 2020 (when my public character assassination began on the eve of my birthday).
Impeachment might be the greatest legacy that Pelosi left--not because she allowed it to happen, but because she limited it, ensuring that the process would fail by blocking from it any consideration of the president's [notorious](https://substack.com/redirect/b8887eb3-bca6-4fa8-bc2f-9bdda0c8dd37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [expanding](https://substack.com/redirect/cad3355e-72d5-440a-ad00-d75e69d4abf6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) self-enrichment in public office. As I've written and said many times, Pelosi could not possibly enforce the Emoluments Clause, having [violated it herself in broad daylight](https://substack.com/redirect/5d97cae3-b8fe-41ed-b0d3-c93d7e993c95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for several decades.
_Want to see more work like this? The next paid subscriber to Chronicles of a Dying Empire will be the 71st supporter enabling writing that 21,000 other readers enjoy --and learn from--for free._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..4mZ--ebw11dSltVowhhMqjyASwtUdYKY-acsDD6HbAs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=178221874)
### **Bipartisan corruption in plain sight**
How does a public figure go nearly 40 years without having to defend their ideas, or unrepentant continuing corruption?
It happens with the [support of journalists](https://substack.com/redirect/b9374d99-0a5b-47b7-b16f-ab895c617d02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ignorant about [what white supremacy looks like in practice](https://substack.com/redirect/92c8b8da-1122-4710-b264-a508e339d132?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). In Pelosi's case, they are ironically arrayed across the political spectrum.
Ultimately, political writers are as co-opted as the politicians around whom they cultivate cults of personality. Their project to falsely characterize partisan news grew most overt in 2024, when depicting Democrats as a supposed alternative to the right wing while [a Democratic president actively enabled](https://substack.com/redirect/d94c0f72-60e2-4e95-8c98-2a305abbfffe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) an ongoing genocide in Gaza.
I wrote about the revolting relationship between journalists and the genocidal corporate Democratic Party in the wake of the 2024 Democratic National Convention:
## [The tragedy of cults of personality](https://substack.com/redirect/0f75bd8a-323a-491b-b613-12fad9e50ee8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/profile/15484941-shahid-buttar)| | *
---|---|---
| August 25, 2024
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0f75bd8a-323a-491b-b613-12fad9e50ee8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[In the wake of Joe Biden's long overdue withdrawal from the 2024 presidential election race and his replacement by Vice President Kamala Harris, Democrats celebrated themes at their national convention including unity, joy, and defending democracy. Buried under the enthusiasm, however, are some uncomfortable realities that most Democrats--and the journalists who enable them--have preferred to ignore.](https://substack.com/redirect/0f75bd8a-323a-491b-b613-12fad9e50ee8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/0f75bd8a-323a-491b-b613-12fad9e50ee8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The co-optation of the press (and the courts) was made painfully clear to me years earlier, when I became the target of [racist disinformation](https://substack.com/redirect/cc70d781-5fd5-4f34-90d7-d0bc9cd37e6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) orchestrated to silence me after emerging as the only leftist to threaten Pelosi's seat over the course of her entire 40-year career. Writers across the political spectrum published the various lies of politically motivated accusers, suppressed [whistleblowers](https://substack.com/redirect/14009e62-df05-456e-8f4a-faf7e04e3fae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) including women and women of color, ignored evidence of an orchestrated (and ultimately successful) attempt to rig an election by blocking a public debate, and ignored the conflicts of interests among figures who eventually reaped rewards from the Democratic establishment in exchange for their loyalty.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=178221874&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4MjIxODc0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjI0Njc2MzYsImV4cCI6MTc2NTA1OTYzNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.StU1-02pL7efWziee6a3I5nu1s2xJwaBvJCf-uIp9o0)
### **Mutual support to & from the right wing**
At the same time that centrist journalists contrive an artificial picture of Pelosi as a champion of the people, right wing journalists reciprocally demonize her as a leftist, even though she is the best thing that ever happened to the Republican party.
From one perspective, Pelosi's leadership of Democrats over the last generation resembles a strategy not unlike that used by the Greeks in antiquity when infiltrating their enemies' camp with the infamous Trojan horse. The Greeks had hidden their own troops inside what seemed like a gift, and then planned an attack on Troy from within, after the horse was brought inside the city walls.
Similarly, Pelosi led Democrats in Congress for years, all while supporting Republican policies, kneecapping leftists from me to Ilhan Omar, and controlling congressional procedure to block even the mere public consideration of progressive demands.
Don't expect journalists to recognize any of this, however.
One might imagine that the principal source of disinformation in politics today is a [maniacal president](https://substack.com/redirect/45c282b2-d002-47dd-9c8f-4c2c5b38e10d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with no concern for the truth.
Unfortunately, the problem extends far beyond him, beyond his party, and even beyond politics to infect journalism itself.
### **Gratitude & Thanksgiving**
What little hope I had for this country has [faded every day](https://substack.com/redirect/924ed31d-13fc-499d-a128-0b84cc2f1239?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for the past five years, especially when I reflect on what could have been possible if journalists embraced their stated values of transparency and accountability, rather than degrading those values by embracing white supremacy instead.
## [How much can change in just five years?](https://substack.com/redirect/924ed31d-13fc-499d-a128-0b84cc2f1239?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/profile/15484941-shahid-buttar)| | *
---|---|---
| November 11, 2024
[](https://substack.com/redirect/924ed31d-13fc-499d-a128-0b84cc2f1239?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Veterans Day is an apt day to recall not only the sacrifices made by veterans, but also the casual disregard with which Washington ignores their sacrifices, belittles their service, and even insults their memories even after they have secured military victories.](https://substack.com/redirect/924ed31d-13fc-499d-a128-0b84cc2f1239?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/924ed31d-13fc-499d-a128-0b84cc2f1239?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Watching a country--and a political party, and a press establishment--so ignorant that they are willing to praise an unapologetically corrupt, dynastic [authoritarian](https://substack.com/redirect/433a7d9a-7aad-4214-a12f-fd536eb2b5e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is enough to make me throw my hands in the air and wish upon this country everything that it unfortunately deserves.
I'm feeling more grateful than ever today for dodging the bullet of my aspiration to help defend democracy in Washington. Having done as much as anyone over the past two generations to hold accountable an oligarch who continues to enjoy the praise of a confused public, I find myself comforted by the [prophetic words](https://substack.com/redirect/f43a094e-37e9-4531-8c67-0e23443bffb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of Brother Malcolm X: "If you're not careful, the newspapers will have you hating the people who are being oppressed, and loving the people who are doing the oppressing."
You're currently a free subscriber to [Chronicles of a Dying Empire](https://substack.com/redirect/1d4fbc53-f592-4e54-9d92-f9ea283f5054?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For the full experience, [upgrade your subscription.](https://substack..4mZ--ebw11dSltVowhhMqjyASwtUdYKY-acsDD6HbAs?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

Writers across the political spectrum published the various lies of politically motivated accusers, suppressed including women and women of color, ignored evidence of an orchestrated (and ultimately successful) attempt to rig an election by blocking a public debate, and ignored the conflicts of interests among figures who eventually reaped rewards from the Democratic establishment in exchange for their loyalty. Mutual support to & from the right wing At the same time that centrist journalists contrive an artificial picture of Pelosi as a champion of the people, right wing journalists reciprocally demonize her as a leftist, even though she is the best thing that ever happened to the Republican party. From one perspective, Pelosi's leadership of Democrats over the last generation resembles a strategy not unlike that used by the Greeks in antiquity when infiltrating their enemies' camp with the infamous Trojan horse. The Greeks had hidden their own troops inside what seemed like a gift, and then planned an attack on Troy from within, after the horse was brought inside the city walls. Similarly, Pelosi led Democrats in Congress for years, all while supporting Republican policies, kneecapping leftists from me to Ilhan Omar, and controlling congressional procedure to block even the mere public consideration of progressive demands. Don't expect journalists to recognize any of this, however. One might imagine that the principal source of disinformation in politics today is a with no concern for the truth. Unfortunately, the problem extends far beyond him, beyond his party, and even beyond politics to infect journalism itself. Gratitude & Thanksgiving What little hope I had for this country has for the past five years, especially when I reflect on what could have been possible if journalists embraced their stated values of transparency and accountability, rather than degrading those values by embracing white supremacy instead. | | | | ---|---|--- | November 11, 2024 | Watching a country--and a political party, and a press establishment--so ignorant that they are willing to praise an unapologetically corrupt, dynastic is enough to make me throw my hands in the air and wish upon this country everything that it unfortunately deserves. I'm feeling more grateful than ever today for dodging the bullet of my aspiration to help defend democracy in Washington. Having done as much as anyone over the past two generations to hold accountable an oligarch who continues to enjoy the praise of a confused public, I find myself comforted by the of Brother Malcolm X: "If you're not careful, the newspapers will have you hating the people who are being oppressed, and loving the people who are doing the oppressing." You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Shahid Buttar South Lake Tahoe, CA 96150 ? ?

# **_From Trump: You’ve got me worried_**
**__**

I’ve been trying to reach you for DAYS, and I’m starting to think that you’re ignoring me.
I really hope it’s because my messages haven’t been getting through to you.
Because the Fake News has been saying that MAGA support is at an ALL-TIME LOW...
_But I know you haven’t abandoned me._
I’m reaching out because **_YOUR NAME_** is at the top of my list of special MAGA Patriots, and I can’t afford to lose you.
**_[So could you take a quick second to reaffirm your support and give me your response to some important questions I have for you?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=76e3146843354a1fb2a7308a772e2012&_e=axNn2Pw-hNFOPryAMo4Rrs0tLmSRdw1oo4ADqIfqlXkr4b_is80NALNefrATCMAiiWuT2hf6F_QDLfAtVqmbkyzDt6IhFTr1xg_uN01hjQUbcQf3yTcacaL0MSPK4fh5fhwFQ8eRgzMu14nmP23plJ5jcY3aW-WEl7o7IQQqiOHMwwOEbMIwkfgczD0jriuf-STXDQn5UmvFiEBkMjjWXeSOhsgGtT_FbYVhzivCO4WgZcplxdXXvOK8tU33aVC2jNgWGQYve0dBhjOIGh_Ip7QmsUuhpWVy4w-0xuSaiaq5s7falNfx_RJZutn4JZ37-dH-fDWLQcvKt9ieVptyniHTGRQo7zOh3kjMk57iZUwxqDk6WYqgKfJw1XFrgJ7Dz61Y0Vwot17z2D3tRf3hsbS7Si6XJmy1bgC8PrZzCNt4zw8tboaZJBxss75ZjTtS808_N1MXO5BMnJCZdvY2LkcZu-YnlExSvHW9WnWXTh7U93NoE1LzQ_Pi04vwLl-dlzdxOCDQ1lDygLv_DWAK4zD-2EuQXP0g9Hktz5SOcuiBDtvQFDJg8y1pzM7AaXnvFqovXwlvW8Y-3fdO_lsgvT0iCucIKDXL0-LAuk1VCW0iSur0WHxvvQ6Bje6FRWT9o8KSzvQDZ7O_GyDS3taHjpwvIT3ZqFSQL3T5P6B_zy5wrJmDhDTbG1YF2zcSKKlXmMo0zV6vXvQRSNpu6bzl-f1gJuN2lL67E9o6YLmrbfQ%3D)_**

clean_body: It’s been a while since I heard from you. | | | | From Trump: You’ve got me worried I’ve been trying to reach you for DAYS, and I’m starting to think that you’re ignoring me. I really hope it’s because my messages haven’t been getting through to you. Because the Fake News has been saying that MAGA support is at an ALL-TIME LOW... But I know you haven’t abandoned me. I’m reaching out because YOUR NAME is at the top of my list of special MAGA Patriots, and I can’t afford to lose you. I know that you have never abandoned me and the MAGA Movement, but it’s been a while since I’ve heard from you... Please, I know that you’re a very busy person, but I could really use your response to some important questions that I have for you. I have always taken into account YOUR thoughts, and I need them now more than ever. THANK YOU. \- President Donald J. body:
Democrats can’t flip the Senate without winning New Hampshire. That’s why we have to rally around Chris right now.

We have a problem.

A top election analyst just downgraded our chances of winning the U.S. Senate race in New Hampshire after former Sen. John Sununu announced his comeback bid.

Let us be absolutely clear: **If Chris Pappas loses in New Hampshire, Democrats have no viable path to flipping the Senate.**

We can’t afford to fall behind in this moment. [**_That’s why we’re asking you to support Chris and Maggie Hassan with a donation today._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118807908/580960460/1047731393?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.06_Chris-Pappas-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzFmMDQ4My02MmJiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xfOUSJTvqyt6_kOu8pE2zV5d-ASNBS-ETs_-uPob5wE=)

With Senator Shaheen retiring, this seat is wide open and extremely vulnerable.

And with Sununu in the race, Republicans just got a huge boost in their efforts to flip this seat and keep the Senate majority.

John Sununu isn’t just any Republican. He’s backed by the entire Washington establishment. He comes from a political dynasty, has national name recognition, and brings a fundraising machine fueled by Wall Street and corporate special interests.

**Chris Pappas is the Democrat who can win this race.** He’s a proven public servant who’s won his purple Congressional district in New Hampshire four times. But this race just got more expensive, more competitive, and more dangerous for Democrats. That’s why we’re asking:

[**_Can you split a donation between Maggie Hassan and Chris Pappas right now to stop Republicans’ scheme to keep control of the Senate?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118807909/580960461/1047731393?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.06_Chris-Pappas-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzFmMDQ4My02MmJiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xfOUSJTvqyt6_kOu8pE2zV5d-ASNBS-ETs_-uPob5wE=) | | [RUSH A DONATION >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118807910/580960462/1047731393?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.06_Chris-Pappas-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzFmMDQ4My02MmJiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xfOUSJTvqyt6_kOu8pE2zV5d-ASNBS-ETs_-uPob5wE=)

clean_body: Democrats can’t flip the Senate without winning New Hampshire. That’s why we have to rally around Chris right now. We have a problem. A top election analyst just downgraded our chances of winning the U.S. Senate race in New Hampshire after former Sen. John Sununu announced his comeback bid. Let us be absolutely clear: If Chris Pappas loses in New Hampshire, Democrats have no viable path to flipping the Senate. We can’t afford to fall behind in this moment. = With Senator Shaheen retiring, this seat is wide open and extremely vulnerable. And with Sununu in the race, Republicans just got a huge boost in their efforts to flip this seat and keep the Senate majority. John Sununu isn’t just any Republican. He’s backed by the entire Washington establishment. He comes from a political dynasty, has national name recognition, and brings a fundraising machine fueled by Wall Street and corporate special interests. Chris Pappas is the Democrat who can win this race. He’s a proven public servant who’s won his purple Congressional district in New Hampshire four times. But this race just got more expensive, more competitive, and more dangerous for Democrats. That’s why we’re asking: = | | = Far-right billionaires and special interests are already flooding New Hampshire with cash to flip this seat red. If Democrats lose here, we lose the Senate. It’s that simple. We must hold this seat by electing Chris Pappas to keep our chances of flipping Senate control alive. And that only happens if we help him build the grassroots support he’ll need to overcome the money pouring into New Hampshire. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Chris Pappas and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for stepping up, Team Pappas If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Seth Koslow
subject: Thank you all for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koslow for Nassau
body:
LOGO [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/116214/images/Artboard%20161.png]
Dear Friend,

Some time has passed since Election Day, and I’ve had the opportunity to reflect on what we built, together. While the results weren’t what we hoped for, I am filled with gratitude – for the people I met, the stories I heard, and the movement we created.

I called Bruce Blakeman to congratulate him on his victory and to wish him success in his continued service as County Executive. For the sake of Nassau County, I sincerely hope he succeeds.

Running for this office was one of the greatest honors of my life. From the first petition signed to the last door knocked, I saw the best of this county. I met neighbors who care deeply about their communities and believe that honest, accountable leadership can make life better for working families.

My wife, kids, and I have learned a lot over the past 16 months. We met kind, thoughtful, and hardworking, people who care deeply about building a better Nassau County. Jill and I are forever grateful to everyone who embraced our family and stood by our side through the thick and thin of this campaign.

To my campaign team, volunteers, donors, and every person who offered encouragement along the way – thank you. You gave your time, your energy, and your belief in a vision of a stronger, fairer Nassau County. I’m proud of the positive, solutions-driven campaign we ran, one that put people first and never wavered from our values.

Though this race has ended, the work continues. I remain committed to the issues that brought us together – affordability, transparency, and opportunity for every resident of Nassau County.

From the bottom of my heart, thank you for your trust, your support, and your friendship.

With gratitude,

Seth

| | **_Meet Rob:_** Rob Bresnahan is a fifth generation Northeastern Pennsylvanian serving his first term in Congress as the Representative for Pennsylvania’s 8th Congressional District. A product of the American Dream, Rob learned the true meaning of hard work at an early age. He learned the ins and outs of the electrical industry by wiring junction boxes, running heavy equipment, driving trucks, and getting his hands dirty. In the process, he learned about the real-world challenges facing America’s blue-collar workers. At just 19 years old, Rob joined his family’s business as the CFO for Kuharchik Construction. He became the CEO of the company in 2013. The sole member of the National Electrical Contractors Association serving in the People’s House, Rob spent over a decade working and connecting with blue-collar Americans across the country before running for Congress in 2024. He’s learned exactly how far-left energy policies coming out of Washington have strangled the American energy sector. And sadly, he’s seen the destructive impacts these policies have had on Pennsylvania’s blue-collar workers first-hand. But the people of Northeastern Pennsylvania demanded change in November 2024 when they sent Rob to Congress. Through his work in Washington, Rob is 100% devoted to restoring America’s energy independence, deregulating the economy, and bringing well-paying jobs back to our great commonwealth.
---
| | [ ](https://links.rob4pa.com/els/v4/zxgqg1d6ua72eyuaxmsrq/Y9SDnjOdRltlo6ZbRVhoUehncpKHY4THWMKbthTyRzXwPGq8XOqN-AxPJ5iwWsAcyJln/bYgh4cFkOc99YHWH7whEQRoblpkBXb5u7rIEsA7_gMJ3OCt60OheO8lWlZtX9ObYKlD6xxaZJdFK7ChQ4zvGYGGcmmD0s1TJbeJspD21w0y5U5vRuGghzyYHT4RPRfO-R-_OKZxLsiExdo0-Qeg7ircYEt6RpN_OteJlhyF_g4xonKtBIwYUnXfNcZLmKC6FLKTap19Mp4tafB-GSOSwGiPUTK7A7Nzj0ntJq0wZrMcw6girYPpY1hF2drJ0)

| | **_A personal message from Rob:_** Friend, I don’t take the fight for Northeastern Pennsylvania’s freedom and prosperity lightly. Each and every day that I show up for work in Washington, you have my word that I’ll give 110% effort to advance the best interests of our district’s hard working families – especially our blue collar workers. Our nation could not endure without the men and women who keep the lights on from coast to coast. So together, we’re going to revive America’s energy independence and return our great nation to its rightful place atop the world stage. _Can I count on your grassroots support to usher in a new era of leadership in our nation’s capital?_

name: Gov. Andy Beshear
subject: Tragedy in Louisville
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
How you can help >>
Peter,

Earlier this week, a tragic plane crash and explosion near Louisville International Airport left families devastated and an entire community reeling.

We're still learning the full extent of the damage and loss, **but what's clear is that this is a critical moment for us to come together and help our neighbors.**

Kentuckians have faced hardship before — _from tornadoes to floods and storms_ — and every single time, we've stepped up to take care of one another. This moment calls for that same compassion and generosity.

That's why the Team Kentucky Emergency Relief Fund has been activated to provide immediate and long-term assistance to those impacted by this tragedy.

[**If you're able, please consider contributing today to help ensure that affected families get the support they need. You can donate here >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118808025/580960805/1978450180?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGZiNTRkN2QtNjNiYi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZDZmMzM4IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0k2uKJQRaSiXG51mWqqOYpKerFCoPde87SOa9slgM5w=&emci=85104cb8-42bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&emdi=0fb54d7d-63bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&ceid=17458827)

_Together, we can make sure no one faces this tragedy alone._

— Andy

**_BREAKING:_ The Trump administration is drawing up plans for a regulatory change that could result in the biggest Social Security cut in history.**

Republicans like Senator Rand Paul are proposing _raising the retirement age to 70 years old._

_They’re trying to make it more difficult for older Americans to qualify for Social Security._

Even though Trump pledged not to cut benefits, **his administration’s proposed regulatory changes enact de-facto cuts to the program that nearly 73.9 million Americans rely on.**

clean_body: As Trump draws up plans, we need to fight back >> | = BREAKING: The Trump administration is drawing up plans for a regulatory change that could result in the biggest Social Security cut in history. Republicans like Senator Rand Paul are proposing raising the retirement age to 70 years old. They’re trying to make it more difficult for older Americans to qualify for Social Security. Even though Trump pledged not to cut benefits, his administration’s proposed regulatory changes enact de-facto cuts to the program that nearly 73.9 million Americans rely on. clean_body: You've been selected for this opportunity because | | | | THIS WILL ONLY TAKE 10 SECONDS... CONGRATULATIONS! So you’ve been selected as a , and we need your thoughts IMMEDIATELY. If not, you may miss this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. Because of the government shutdown, I can only keep this position open until midnight, so act fast because I really want YOU to be my White House Advisor! Your support of me and the MAGA movement has meant the world to me. We have truly been through it all together, this is why... I love you & I’m crossing my fingers that you still feel the same way about me. If you love me, will you make it known to my closest MAGA patriots by becoming an Official Trump White House Advisor? body:
| | | **Federal agents are targeting peaceful protestors.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lC87RV9ONjG63TCp4NCM7n9Axc_ec0W2nmJrYmByp0RAhe2gxydzT0lWankVjTSkui9hm0zvyxQCmG6Rsx1Sl7wBwuCwBD_2Uu0FFdgK3B0ReZ1iwAAYluoWMmVT9yc5YL5M4gC5cotXGr7dbEL5ZLeVNcWxVbb_naB4E1MC4st80xoXw-Dn5XcnMyp2NNrLLOap0uKmm2-EhUPT3dnK9ZlOfHRXomPXJerx8_SW4hjaX8CyJchGN47h2bfULSYBt9As1Oq2smrrigqrgaiOQQEgEuw_UotHIEzcYIJLhe78TckncuN3ygHZ9q7nrZEJbbdxgbRwTG1kIYE5o0VOpIs/4ld/WI0aKEcWTg2dGNClOSjSAw/h0/h001.PxJlj9NZXqu1dv3ANqryjHwaeURsqmpgV5qf8gZn8us)**[Protect our communities. * * *
According to court documents, a masked federal agent allegedly pointed a gun at a peaceful combat veteran protesting the ICE invasion of Chicago and sneered, “Bang, bang. You’re dead, liberal.” That isn’t law enforcement, it’s political terror. And it’s happening under the Trump administration. They believe power means impunity. Federal agents violated a judge’s order, fired tear gas at unarmed citizens, and then _bragged_ about it online. This is how democracy unravels – when those sworn to serve the people turn their weapons on them. **At Able Dems, we’re building a movement for inclusive democracy – one that protects every American. clean_body: | | | Federal agents are targeting peaceful protestors. According to court documents, a masked federal agent allegedly pointed a gun at a peaceful combat veteran protesting the ICE invasion of Chicago and sneered, “Bang, bang. You’re dead, liberal.” That isn’t law enforcement, it’s political terror. And it’s happening under the Trump administration. They believe power means impunity. Federal agents violated a judge’s order, fired tear gas at unarmed citizens, and then bragged about it online. This is how democracy unravels – when those sworn to serve the people turn their weapons on them. At Able Dems, we’re building a movement for inclusive democracy – one that protects every American. We fight so no one has to face intimidation, violence, and threats for standing up for what’s right. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Democracy won’t defend itself. \- Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. name: John Nagel
subject: Ilhan Omar’s radical agenda ends here
body:
It’s time to take our country back

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bsyL/?__vbtrk=MzMxOTgzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMxOTgzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Fellow patriot, I never planned to run for Congress.
For three decades, I proudly served Minnesota as a Lieutenant with the State Patrol, protecting our communities and upholding the law.
But now, I’m watching everything I fought for being dismantled by radical anti-American socialists like Ilhan Omar.
Omar and her far-left allies attack our police, divide our communities, and push a socialist agenda that leaves hardworking Minnesotans behind. They are turning our state into a testing ground for their Marxist experiment - and I refuse to let that happen.********
**[That’s why I’m running for Congress in Minnesota’s 5th Congressional District to Fire Ilhan Omar.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bsyL/?__vbtrk=MzMxOTgzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMxOTgzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)******
**I’m John Nagel - a husband, father, man of faith, and proud Minnesotan who has spent his life serving others.**
Over 30 years in the State Patrol, I earned the Meritorious Service Award, Employee of the Year, and several community service honors - not for politics, but for service.
Now, I’m stepping up again - this time to protect our state and our country from Ilhan Omar’s dangerous vision for America.
But I can’t do it alone. Omar’s allies in Washington and the media are already mobilizing against me, and they’ll stop at nothing to keep their grip on power.
**It’s time to replace Ilhan Omar with a true America First warrior who will actually fight for Minnesota**** _[and I need your help to make it happen](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bsyL/?__vbtrk=MzMxOTgzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMxOTgzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
| | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bsyL/?__vbtrk=MzMxOTgzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMxOTgzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
| | [HELP DEFEAT ILHAN OMAR](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bsyL/?__vbtrk=MzMxOTgzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMxOTgzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, Chuck Schumer and the old Democrat moderates are being replaced by the literally nuts Ilhan Omar and her radical socialist cohorts.
**These aren’t Democrats anymore - they’re socialist thugs, a ball of snakes determined to rip apart the very fabric of our nation.**
But Minnesota is better than this. _America is better than this._
It’s time to get behind honest American values - faith, family, and freedom - and remind Ilhan Omar that Minnesota belongs to the people, not to the radicals in Washington.
**_[If you’re ready to take our state back from Ilhan Omar and her socialist machine, I need you in this fight with me today](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bsyL/?__vbtrk=MzMxOTgzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMxOTgzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
Together, we can send a message that will echo from Minneapolis to Washington: Minnesota stands with America - not socialism.
_For Minnesota and America,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bsyL/?__vbtrk=MzMxOTgzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMxOTgzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**John Nagel**
Candidate for U.S. Congress - Minnesota’s 5th District
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bsyL/?__vbtrk=MzMxOTgzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMxOTgzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
|
---
**_[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bsyM/?__vbtrk=MzMxOTgzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMxOTgzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=331983&trkid=1065555270&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: This chaos is no accident
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251106-1610-foote&t=1001&akid=1610%2E342411%2Ezu7rOg ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Over 4,100 layoff notices have gone out since October 10th.

That’s what this government shutdown has meant for thousands of federal
workers — lives on the line, and families left wondering how they’ll pay
rent, buy groceries, or make it through the holidays.

And this chaos is no accident. Trump tried to weaponize a government
shutdown for political gain, using it as a shield to fire thousands of
federal employees and get away with it.

But last week, a federal judge in San Francisco said enough is enough.

Judge Susan Illston granted an injunction that barred the Trump
administration from moving forward with the mass firings, ruling that
evidence shows the cuts were baseless and politically motivated.

The lawsuit, filed by the American Federation of Government Employees and
several other labor unions, argued that the layoffs were an abuse of
authority, intended to target workers and pressure Congress to give in to
Trump’s demands.

Thanks to this ruling, thousands of federal workers have a fighting chance
to keep their jobs and make it through this shutdown.

This is more than a courtroom victory — it’s a lifeline for people whose
livelihoods were suddenly at risk, and a powerful reminder that when we
stand together, organize, and fight back for working families, we can win.

But we have to keep up the momentum.

The Squad Victory Fund is standing shoulder to shoulder with workers and
labor unions, fighting to make sure no one is left behind during the
government shutdown. But we need you with us to keep pushing this movement
forward.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251106-movement.JOIRX5&refcode=em20251106-1610&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1610%2E342411%2Ezu7rOg ]Can you chip in $3 today to help us protect federal
workers and keep up the fight?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251106-movement.JOIRX5&refcode=em20251106-1610&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1610%2E342411%2Ezu7rOg ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1610%2E342411%2Ezu7rOg

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com
clean_body: [ ]Squad Victory Fund Peter, Over 4,100 layoff notices have gone out since October 10th. That’s what this government shutdown has meant for thousands of federal workers — lives on the line, and families left wondering how they’ll pay rent, buy groceries, or make it through the holidays. And this chaos is no accident. Trump tried to weaponize a government shutdown for political gain, using it as a shield to fire thousands of federal employees and get away with it. But last week, a federal judge in San Francisco said enough is enough. Judge Susan Illston granted an injunction that barred the Trump administration from moving forward with the mass firings, ruling that evidence shows the cuts were baseless and politically motivated. The lawsuit, filed by the American Federation of Government Employees and several other labor unions, argued that the layoffs were an abuse of authority, intended to target workers and pressure Congress to give in to Trump’s demands. Thanks to this ruling, thousands of federal workers have a fighting chance to keep their jobs and make it through this shutdown. This is more than a courtroom victory — it’s a lifeline for people whose livelihoods were suddenly at risk, and a powerful reminder that when we stand together, organize, and fight back for working families, we can win. But we have to keep up the momentum. The Squad Victory Fund is standing shoulder to shoulder with workers and labor unions, fighting to make sure no one is left behind during the government shutdown. But we need you with us to keep pushing this movement forward. [ ]Can you chip in $3 today to help us protect federal workers and keep up the fight? [ ]Contribute ›› In solidarity, The Squad Victory Fund

name: Eileen Laubacher
subject: I’m the retired Admiral running against Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118808724/580963385/1408422911?amount=15&refcode=email_110625_laubacher_rs2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzBiMjcwNi02NWJiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N-WijADquhEnpkg8AuqIhiDsmBB3Ma0Xn0Spjpv5ivQ=) Hello, **My name is Eileen Laubacher, and I am the Democrat and retired U.S. Navy Rear Admiral running against Lauren Boebert here in Colorado.** I was 17-years-old the first time I raised my right hand and took an oath to support and defend the Constitution against all enemies, foreign and domestic. I took those words, and that responsibility, seriously every day for the next 4 decades. When I was an intelligence officer. When I was deployed to Afghanistan. When I became an Admiral. And as a member of the president’s National Security Council. But in all those years, I have never felt as much of a threat to our country, our Constitution, and our very democracy as I do right now. I said I would never run for office. But in this moment, I feel an obligation to step up, serve my community, and defend our country once again. **I am running for Congress to defeat Lauren Boebert because when she was sworn into office, Lauren took a similar oath to defend our Constitution – and she has betrayed it almost every single day since then.** Adam Frisch only lost to Lauren Boebert by 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. With the right Democrat, we can finally put an end to Lauren Boebert’s embarrassing political career – but I need your help now to do it. My campaign has set a goal to raise $50,000 to defeat Lauren Boebert and take back the House for Democrats, but right now, we’re still very short. **If I am going to send Lauren Boebert packing and flip this seat blue, I need grassroots donors like you to chip in right now to my campaign:** **[Please, will you split a donation right now between my campaign and John Hickenlooper to help me defeat Lauren Boebert, flip this seat blue, and take back the House for Democrats? I am not accepting money from corporate PACs like Boebert is, so no amount you can give is too small.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118808725/580963386/1408422911?amount=15&refcode=email_110625_laubacher_rs2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzBiMjcwNi02NWJiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N-WijADquhEnpkg8AuqIhiDsmBB3Ma0Xn0Spjpv5ivQ=)** | | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118808726/580963387/1408422911?amount=15&refcode=email_110625_laubacher_rs2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzBiMjcwNi02NWJiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N-WijADquhEnpkg8AuqIhiDsmBB3Ma0Xn0Spjpv5ivQ=)

name: Chris Brooks, LCV
subject: Houston Chronicle reports: Trump is proposing to open coasts to new offshore drilling
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTMxNDQ3NDkS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjM0MDA3ODU3OAS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter — The Houston Chronicle is reporting that the Trump
administration is considering opening huge areas off our coasts to new offshore
drilling. Trump’s plan could open areas off the Alaskan coast and the California
coastline. But Florida’s coastline, where Trump lives much of the time, would be
protected from drilling under the proposal. Trump’s proposed offshore drilling plan is so extreme that even Republicans in Congress are opposed. We have a real chance to stop new offshore drilling, but it’s going to take a massive effort.We need to continue to organize coastal communities, put pressure on lawmakers,
and drive tens of thousands of public comments from Americans opposed to the
drilling plan. We need your help. The best thing you can do right now is to renew your LCV membership. Right now, $5 is all it takes. Please don’t wait — respond today to make an immediate impact for our environment >> https://links.messages.lcv. The Trump administration knows their offshore drilling scheme is deeply unpopular. Both Democrats and Republicans from coastal states have come out
against it. Trump even backed down from a similar move during his first term
after bipartisan pushback. In short, Trump is pushing to wreck our coasts for profit. We can’t let that happen. We need to scale up our campaign and raise pressure on Congress to take action
once again. But to do that, we need your help. Please, renew your LCV membership right now. $5 is all it takes to renew today. You’ll make an immediate impact to fight back against Trump’s polluter giveaways >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/DzpWMVq~ Thanks for everything you do for the environment, Peter. Chris Brooks
Vice President of Membership
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=13144749&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjM0MDA3ODU3OAS2&spReportId=MjM0MDA3ODU3OAS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=13144749&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjM0MDA3ODU3OAS2&spReportId=MjM0MDA3ODU3OAS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/yAyZMN_rb_

| | Hi Peter, Austin Davis here. Today is day 38 of the government shutdown. That’s 38 days of federal Republicans blaming Democrats, even though they control the House, Senate, _AND_ the White House. That’s 38 days that the GOP could have spent actually working for we the people. Last month, we saw a huge push of momentum after the No Kings protests in response to these harmful policies and actions that the Trump administration has taken. **This week, we saw overwhelming wins for Democrats across the country. Here in Pennsylvania, we voted to retain _all three_ Democratic Supreme Court Justices.** This election season has shown us that the country is tired. We are tired of Trump bailing out his allies while dismantling our democracy and harming our loved ones. We need to keep this momentum going, and we have to do it together. I can’t do that if my fundraising is behind, and I need your help. [**Can you chip in $10 now to help my team keep the momentum going?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118808913/580964071/-92396084?amount=10&source=AD_EM_110725_B1_Shutdown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzM5YzY5My02NmJiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YMZjXKNi4yNU6AMSOeBn2twe-enUjKlSCsoNPS2SWpI=) | | **[CHIP IN $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118808914/580964072/950170653?amount=10&source=AD_EM_110725_B1_Shutdown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzM5YzY5My02NmJiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YMZjXKNi4yNU6AMSOeBn2twe-enUjKlSCsoNPS2SWpI=)**

**American democracy was born in the Commonwealth and is something I will always fight to protect.** Pennsylvania is going to be a **critical battleground state** in 2026. clean_body: Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi Peter, Austin Davis here. Today is day 38 of the government shutdown. That’s 38 days of federal Republicans blaming Democrats, even though they control the House, Senate, AND the White House. That’s 38 days that the GOP could have spent actually working for we the people. Last month, we saw a huge push of momentum after the No Kings protests in response to these harmful policies and actions that the Trump administration has taken. This week, we saw overwhelming wins for Democrats across the country. Here in Pennsylvania, we voted to retain all three Democratic Supreme Court Justices. This election season has shown us that the country is tired. We are tired of Trump bailing out his allies while dismantling our democracy and harming our loved ones. We need to keep this momentum going, and we have to do it together. I can’t do that if my fundraising is behind, and I need your help. = | | = Our campaign is built on grassroots support and real connection throughout the Commonwealth. American democracy was born in the Commonwealth and is something I will always fight to protect. Pennsylvania is going to be a critical battleground state in 2026. It's important that I'm prepared to combat the Republican mega-donors that are prepping to flood the state. = **If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | **=** | **=** | **=** | **=** | **=** | **=** I know that together, we can continue to make a difference, so thanks for standing with me. —Austin Davis | | | ---|---|--- | get involved to support austin davis for PA Lieutenant Governor While serving as Lieutenant Governor, Austin Davis helped advance some of the most progressive changes the Commonwealth has seen in decades. name: VoteVets
subject: Advance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
#
Peter, the GOP is on its heels.
They finally realized Trump is an anchor around their necks.
They spent all year kowtowing to a wannabe dictator, supporting every ridiculous ambition he has, and abandoning their commitments to Veterans, to Military Families, and everybody else he’s screwed over.
They’re disorganized, they’re weak, and they have no idea what to do.
VoteVets spent millions of dollars supporting candidates in critical races this Tuesday, and the reason we could afford to make those investments was because our supporters stepped up all year long.
Some people curled up after Trump won, after he took office, and started tearing our country apart. Not you. You didn’t quit, you fought back.
Now, what do you do when your adversary is in full retreat?
**_Advance.**_
You keep pushing them. We can’t let up, we can’t rest on our victories, and we definitely can’t give them room to recover.
We have a lot of work to do between now and November 2026. We’re going to need you to stay in this fight, Peter. Are you still with us?
**[Use this link to sign your name alongside thousands of others who have endorsed the VoteVets mission. It’s going to take all of us doing our part to take back the House and Senate next year, and we’d love to know we can count on you.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/251106_vv_mission/?source=em251106-1-120&akid=34750%2E3013755%2EZeS3Ss)
It might seem like a small act, but it speaks volumes about what we’re trying to do here. **We’re putting together the team that is going to save this country from Donald Trump.**
Thank you in advance for being a part of it.
The team at VoteVets
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/251106_vv_mission/?source=em251106-1-120&akid=34750%2E3013755%2EZeS3Ss)

body:
I’m the only candidate that both sides of the aisle fear. Take 2 mins to read what I mean | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=3f7e5a9620b6425a8c162cf8a8e92909&_e=3eUZmC_q_xTlCHhuMq5mjmPgvw8j4BUma2ngUmODpkawawHPWU9nIxFPSUTEM-xUyqskuo3alxurQBTc8lGUwAhloV6ubrhOb8Ez5W2S6RNgxG-T4cFbcDG6ACZowccZYciy8DyfrifSDVf9t27NZJKu_OdQEmZASv-s3K8zyOOaooIImz4r_JH40RmNxieP_onCW5XsGVnVBkbHoKXwaUDRhflQOZzMUSKqw2cNELL4pd1PlPq9ZBSvyU-3yOhA27xKggWE_V5bejYUQDGyHubZ64oaXEFb3SbsL5z2V4XOgwH6gBT6_6tiEVdejjsPSXqY19fr8jCFfG2q0z6JuoP3K3zQNbqp0Oxn9v1i5WL9HLKRNrhB4U_E6WeGiCJmpl0JP8P90aLA1dXTI9caR57ZIhuMV8N4c3KAbuZeVZ3DAHRVd2VUsIpe4Eg_RBQ_ZaNyHB_kJut-CJICRN6ltJZvFcmHy-86UuzcCw5oPnkSByq2lEOM3YwgYDnfFMpp2_LKkctIa6nONdy_ZKgiEeY6F2oWw1HdEnEmNH3OBxXoxaMis8oaPgQf8tQvWPNU)
---
Peter,

**NEW YORK CITY HAS FALLEN, DAY OF MAMDANI!!**

We are in a political race for results now. I hope the Republican Party and MAGA movement can hear me on this. The stewards of capitalism must find a financial remedy to our current situation, through innovation and a commitment to sacred honor, before the nihilism and cynicism of Socialism take root. The "free market" and "free trade" must be modified for the times.

**THIS IS THE RED ALERT!** Mamdani is only the beginning. We must remain the party and movement of the working class.

| [ **FIGHT BACK AGAINST COMMUNISM** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=3f7e5a9620b6425a8c162cf8a8e92909&_e=3eUZmC_q_xTlCHhuMq5mjmPgvw8j4BUma2ngUmODpkawawHPWU9nIxFPSUTEM-xUyqskuo3alxurQBTc8lGUwAhloV6ubrhOb8Ez5W2S6RNgxG-T4cFbcDG6ACZowccZYciy8DyfrifSDVf9t27NZJKu_OdQEmZASv-s3K8zyOOaooIImz4r_JH40RmNxiePrevbQA7wTLcNDE1qJArNCY5cnbkWO7Apigug1yiSaUp0pt8Zrdd2_6iTr97OJke9ef_6vRZ9T_KwpH5m-bF4upDmPl7i4RGrrvJViDomedKBDcqmpZuEbW6CItjx6jmnQSkwYNm4MGSpgYQZ0yZq49B2M_qFTLPOJvaLlBqgxFvoRh98m3GVVgETDAVTDL2moEaAMwCkinSmen6k06No60c0dOB46DTEIHAq4_5wxKTapkSVYGEOUbsjKvl5eCN1LSRfyUgpetcRHOrHmSO1585mEdD-pCR-2mTvqVfz7mTRIg2RQCLzfEcnkO6Q4nuTjR3iPHzjzVxsrdNZtAjnJpumPjr32-G_hPg1m34VuEgcSwiLzJ6BeVUOF6DgDI5g)
---

We need to deregulate, reduce taxes on the working class, and, most importantly, enforce our antitrust laws. The monopolization in America is out of control, and the monopolization of finance is abhorrent. The problem is that politicians can't say that and hope to win because the control of money controls our elections, most of the time. At this point, if we try to hold onto this way, we will have to do it by force, and inevitably, that will become destabilizing itself.

What has staved off communism in America, in the past, was the cultural belief in socioeconomic mobility. The social piece is all but blown as everyone believes they're the star in their own movie now. Everybody believes they're more important than they actually are. Which has created an inverse epidemic of self-doubt and self-hatred. The economic mobility piece must be restored. But artificial intelligence and socialism won't do it. People have to be motivated and incentivized to get better, at a craft, a passion, a job, a skill...

_If those things become invaluable, we will have an even bigger existential crisis. Who are we even as humankind?_

Still, we cannot continue to pretend like the game hasn't been rigged. It disappoints me that more Republicans don't listen to Steve Bannon when he says we have to find a way to spread this wealth around... Yes, we detest communists because we can see when and where they have waved their flag in history, genocide follows.

**The uncomfortable truth about America is at our core, we have already become a communist nation.** When we print money, bail out the failures of the rich, and socialize the risk, we have undermined capitalism and meritocracy. If your society is built on money and you socialize the money, you're a communist nation. We have to turn back now. This has to become the beating heart of the MAGA movement. We must hold the principle and move people toward the principle.

**Convenience will be the death of freedom.** If you trade your freedom for security, you deserve neither, and you will have neither. This is true for the security of basic necessities or food and welfare, as well as the security of a military-industrial complex and dollar empire.

_**THIS IS WHY THEY FEAR ME, on both sides of the aisle.**_

[**If you agree with ANYTHING I said, I’m humbly asking you to donate $10 to my campaign before midnight.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=3f7e5a9620b6425a8c162cf8a8e92909&_e=3eUZmC_q_xTlCHhuMq5mjmPgvw8j4BUma2ngUmODpkawawHPWU9nIxFPSUTEM-xUyqskuo3alxurQBTc8lGUwAhloV6ubrhOb8Ez5W2S6RNgxG-T4cFbcDG6ACZowccZYciy8DyfrifSDVf9t27NZJKu_OdQEmZASv-s3K8zyOOaooIImz4r_JH40RmNxiePA0Vi2IsQ9u0EnnBUKlGiRvQwUYuPjX_JYKB0iLLpVqpCr9YXOd0ml0zp7pVq6Rwyjr3Sm6VDg2yIvhxhu7cWKDISxIiqsR2DSvh3U3XwN3bJlvu3nZrLzG5APqSxUERJT0mtvq_C1tA-1EGPsTJLDW1q8jShL3OrcnG3hNgwmdd1dpWSp67Ty00ZGRXFB-9rC31bP0wMRS3Q6Bamtk17v8mFFrN1JhsKosT4lbYGItxiIaOix9Ys8ii8SJFdEWdFQ3NX9Bpn4F7bTl_oa-ElRWv8fGytGnCANnmPGHVvn8e95Oii2-w1EPjnNVBFhePqx80jIwUK-Jx7RY8cQBRWP8vq9pk-KRQ5Jv8IdipVsfDFyUFM-hQ90B9mmQuqWBa-)

**We need outspoken, strong Republican leaders in Washington.** If nothing else, I will NEVER back down from speaking my mind, even in a room full of Woke Radical Communists and Uniparty Members.

[ **RUSH $10** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=3f7e5a9620b6425a8c162cf8a8e92909&_e=3eUZmC_q_xTlCHhuMq5mjmPgvw8j4BUma2ngUmODpkawawHPWU9nIxFPSUTEM-xUyqskuo3alxurQBTc8lGUwAhloV6ubrhOb8Ez5W2S6RNgxG-T4cFbcDG6ACZowccZYciy8DyfrifSDVf9t27NZNMKWv5_kq2DJlIWQLnNubd0xSEh65zxoIECjJqXu5jK86y_ku2cN6HeTig3s_AquWR50_ohLpEcnMxkRm_W8tinMSyLlSjy7r4RvcsGUNqY7wP2SHkZ0kg6efFHuJaTq4eAa75br3vJCDklJFueo6leSObyteT_SjXTEpKOrbN_pTqpBItxcQHTNNDrqy4aKWgwNZFWa5nEXbnv45eHlG6V5ZUIR8yU1qBHX6OL9FdiZjoDOzwG4C2Vpav_CV4FIxxzCgk--VXfcygtESmTz95vAik3iZI0OkvLlfrP3MHxf7VR3XzP-t3oRe4GcUAlvvt7v_mhMfki27pwcQgD2N6xtz7Y8-NVK7Kp-fAAdAdwXBbGt1pT1lY_9cmyEV7wTdzHaK5rNd_ZANHzTXiJVU5WffcwbVVd7f213DvF251A)

Thank you,
Royce White for U.S. Senate MN 2026
America 1st
Revive The Little Guy

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=3f7e5a9620b6425a8c162cf8a8e92909&_e=3eUZmC_q_xTlCHhuMq5mjmPgvw8j4BUma2ngUmODpkawawHPWU9nIxFPSUTEM-xUyqskuo3alxurQBTc8lGUwAhloV6ubrhOb8Ez5W2S6RNgxG-T4cFbcDG6ACZowccZYciy8DyfrifSDVf9t27NZJKu_OdQEmZASv-s3K8zyOOaooIImz4r_JH40RmNxieP5va3IvxRWDN1-KdCdZ2cLhdVvee6WrZClsnX2RfSb8EyOB6r3qGDkAPv5Cqcj1Ibo8i1VGD8RNB4ZJSu8M8E568xGWwlWdydXBDS2w7H0HGxHRoWVRHsx00BnzG4xHuNjWZH3SjkODuBaBr_98hK1t1K1nKG89yYY8C_U7j5ov7s6ORnhy3BjsZcN-FuisutG6SdXZzAtlw-qAUJwK8aFiTtzyYWKX1VeHAsGNeAttmIs1eNqdXix4pgQ3CdDYx9F2nI2tGwc5dQiibwZAOZuK_kLsrFMgAGFmrKK2KFhcFKrB36D2Ap6phxHRaEXn_XU9uNUo-2NElZ7ehn1MEzkBFE4as98mgRcBo5ayPUU0KSZvfTYuAeg4hOlrrST4-T)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

clean_body: I’m the only candidate that both sides of the aisle fear. Take 2 mins to read what I mean | Peter, NEW YORK CITY HAS FALLEN, DAY OF MAMDANI!! We are in a political race for results now. I hope the Republican Party and MAGA movement can hear me on this. The stewards of capitalism must find a financial remedy to our current situation, through innovation and a commitment to sacred honor, before the nihilism and cynicism of Socialism take root. The "free market" and "free trade" must be modified for the times. THIS IS THE RED ALERT! Mamdani is only the beginning. We must remain the party and movement of the working class. | We need to deregulate, reduce taxes on the working class, and, most importantly, enforce our antitrust laws. The monopolization in America is out of control, and the monopolization of finance is abhorrent. The problem is that politicians can't say that and hope to win because the control of money controls our elections, most of the time. At this point, if we try to hold onto this way, we will have to do it by force, and inevitably, that will become destabilizing itself. What has staved off communism in America, in the past, was the cultural belief in socioeconomic mobility. The social piece is all but blown as everyone believes they're the star in their own movie now. Everybody believes they're more important than they actually are. Which has created an inverse epidemic of self-doubt and self-hatred. The economic mobility piece must be restored. But artificial intelligence and socialism won't do it. People have to be motivated and incentivized to get better, at a craft, a passion, a job, a skill... If those things become invaluable, we will have an even bigger existential crisis. Who are we even as humankind? Still, we cannot continue to pretend like the game hasn't been rigged. It disappoints me that more Republicans don't listen to Steve Bannon when he says we have to find a way to spread this wealth around... Yes, we detest communists because we can see when and where they have waved their flag in history, genocide follows. The uncomfortable truth about America is at our core, we have already become a communist nation. When we print money, bail out the failures of the rich, and socialize the risk, we have undermined capitalism and meritocracy. If your society is built on money and you socialize the money, you're a communist nation. We have to turn back now. This has to become the beating heart of the MAGA movement. We must hold the principle and move people toward the principle. Convenience will be the death of freedom. If you trade your freedom for security, you deserve neither, and you will have neither. This is true for the security of basic necessities or food and welfare, as well as the security of a military-industrial complex and dollar empire. THIS IS WHY THEY FEAR ME, on both sides of the aisle. - We need outspoken, strong Republican leaders in Washington. If nothing else, I will NEVER back down from speaking my mind, even in a room full of Woke Radical Communists and Uniparty Members. Thank you, Royce White for U.S. Senate MN 2026 America 1st Revive The Little Guy Meet Royce White: Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards. After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy. Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc. Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans. PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: I just confronted Mike Johnson

body:
I couldn't stay silent while the Speaker deflected blame for the 36-day shutdown.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118809529/580966046/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODQwNTY4NC02OGJiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KOTtoMtdH8u7u78AqrxRKupWmJZsRyphJ1dagxxmyHo=&emci=797b0b85-32bb-f011-8194-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a8405684-68bb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek –

I just confronted Speaker Johnson on the U.S. Capitol steps. Why? I couldn't stay silent while he deflected blame for the longest government shutdown in our nation’s history. I spoke up and demanded accountability.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118809530/580966047/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1186-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODQwNTY4NC02OGJiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KOTtoMtdH8u7u78AqrxRKupWmJZsRyphJ1dagxxmyHo=)
Enough is enough. Enough political posturing. Enough chaos. Enough of President Trump and his enablers in Congress refusing to meet with Democrats, refusing to end the needless suffering, refusing to put people over politics.
I said to Speaker Johnson: **“You have an obligation to call the leadership of both parties and bring us together and solve this problem together.”**
His response? He tried to blame Democrats and lecture me but I didn't back down. We, all of us, are sick and tired of being held hostage by extreme politics, and I was there to remind him that his job is to govern – not to grandstand.
This moment is about more than just a confrontation on a set of steps. It is a snapshot of exactly why I ran for Congress: _to be a leader who fights for common sense and bipartisanship, not to join a party that values political victory over delivering results._
I’ve been trying to work across the aisle on paid family leave, on supporting our veterans, and on addressing the real needs of our farmers – but all of that vital work is put on hold when the Speaker chooses chaos and shutdowns.
The other side is seeing our momentum, especially after this week’s election results, and they know our moderate, problem-solving approach is a threat to their extreme agenda.
**[I cannot stand up to the extreme fringe alone. I need you with me today. Will you chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can afford right now to keep me fighting for our values in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118809531/580966048/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1186-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODQwNTY4NC02OGJiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KOTtoMtdH8u7u78AqrxRKupWmJZsRyphJ1dagxxmyHo=)**

body:

We have less than one year — less than 52 weeks — until this race is over
and the voters of New Hampshire choose our next senator.

The stakes could not be higher.

Our new opponent has deep pockets, and MAGA Republicans are spending every
dollar they can to flip this seat and elect a rubber stamp for their
agenda.

They may have the backing of dark money and far-right megadonors, but we
have grassroots supporters like you standing with us.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251106_2_weeks.nVG4Gs&refcode=em20251106-2&t=1003&akid=3332%2E582294%2EtR0Ed3 ]Will you make your
first contribution today to power our campaign and keep
New Hampshire blue?

This campaign has always been about serving the people – not special
interests and corporations.

But over the next year, we need to prove that this people-powered movement
has the momentum to win against the MAGA machine.

Every conversation, every volunteer, and every penny count in this race.

Let’s
make this campaign one they can’t compete with. [ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251106_2_weeks.nVG4Gs&refcode=em20251106-2&t=1004&akid=3332%2E582294%2EtR0Ed3 ]Please chip in

Thank you,

Chris Pappas
