name: Team Haley
subject: Will you sign our card for Nancy Pelosi?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Thank you, Speaker Pelosi

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1316%2E49239%2EjipbOG)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8150?t=2&akid=1316%2E49239%2EjipbOG)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8151?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=1316%2E49239%2EjipbOG)
null,

This week, Speaker Nancy Pelosi – the first woman to ever lead the U.S. House of Representatives – announced her retirement from Congress.
**[Will you take a moment to sign our card to give a simple but deeply heartfelt t hank-you to Speaker Pelosi?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8151?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=1316%2E49239%2EjipbOG)**
| | [Add Your Name](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8151?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1316%2E49239%2EjipbOG)
---
She’s a trailblazer. A fighter. An expert legislator.

She led House Democrats through some of the most consequential battles of our lifetimes – from passing the Affordable Care Act to holding Donald Trump accountable. And she knows what it takes to win tough races and defend democracy.
In 2018, Haley was proud to be part of the class that flipped the House and sent a wave of women and first-time candidates to Washington. That victory was possible because of Nancy Pelosi’s leadership and vision.

Now, Speaker Pelosi is on Team Haley – helping us keep Michigan blue and flip the Senate for Democrats.
And as she closes this chapter of public service, we want to show her just how much appreciation and admiration this grassroots team has for everything she’s done.

**[Will you take a moment to add your name to our thank-you card for Nancy Pelosi?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8151?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1316%2E49239%2EjipbOG)**
| | [Add Your Name](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8151?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=1316%2E49239%2EjipbOG)
---
With gratitude,

Team Haley

# [Byron Donald GOES OFF on crazy Communist Mamdani during explosive CNN interview](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=178221851&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4MjIxODUxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjI0NzM4MjksImV4cCI6MTc2NTA2NTgyOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OXNbQwCTas0jqaTv6Kbc_Z4avd1dLwtedqVeByExrAw)
### "He's a communist! His policies NEVER WORK. The truth is there is no free lunch!"
| | [Politibrawl](https://substack.com/@politibrawl)
---
| Nov 6
---
| [](https://substack.com/@politibrawl)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=178221851&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4MjIxODUxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MjQ3MzgyOSwiZXhwIjoxNzY1MDY1ODI5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.FxIPSrkJMNT4JPxkxlHxMz3YU8nYgw7_z-RtJbr_AZY&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=178221851&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4MjIxODUxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjI0NzM4MjksImV4cCI6MTc2NTA2NTgyOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OXNbQwCTas0jqaTv6Kbc_Z4avd1dLwtedqVeByExrAw&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=178221851&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4MjIxODUxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjI0NzM4MjksImV4cCI6MTc2NTA2NTgyOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OXNbQwCTas0jqaTv6Kbc_Z4avd1dLwtedqVeByExrAw)
---
| | [](https://substack..NHuvLJUyjkRWwBaGrYcE5gHAiGFcnl1y1mSd4wbbrB4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/byron-donald-goes-off-on-crazy-communist?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

GOP Rep. Byron Donalds **[went off when a CNN host claimed](https://substack.com/redirect/2a0c6118-0b7b-41d0-99c3-3d0f65a1cbe8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that NYC Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani was not "a communist," insisting that Democratic Socialism was very different than the destructive ideology.
"I can't tell the difference! He wants government grocery stores,... The truth is nobody gets a free lunch!" Donalds fired back at the interviewer.
**[Watch the tense moment here:](https://substack.com/redirect/2a0c6118-0b7b-41d0-99c3-3d0f65a1cbe8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2a0c6118-0b7b-41d0-99c3-3d0f65a1cbe8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/2a0c6118-0b7b-41d0-99c3-3d0f65a1cbe8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together with Logical Health Alternatives](https://substack.com/redirect/ae716ed8-7aa4-4e4b-ada3-c8e0a47f55bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **A terrible secret was hidden in this Manhattan Project lab for 80 years ...**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ae716ed8-7aa4-4e4b-ada3-c8e0a47f55bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Take a look at this circled window at Los Alamos Laboratory...
A stunning document commissioned by Robert Oppenheimer, father of the atomic bomb, was hidden here in 1945.
The US government denied its existence for 80 years...
**[But now, you can finally view the stunning truth for yourself right here.](https://substack.com/redirect/ae716ed8-7aa4-4e4b-ada3-c8e0a47f55bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/ae716ed8-7aa4-4e4b-ada3-c8e0a47f55bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **New York Republican criticizes Mamdani for luxurious Puerto Rico trip during painful shutdown**
Rep. Mike Lawler (R-N.Y.) criticized Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani for attending the 2025 SOMOS Conference at the El Caribe Hilton in San Juan, Puerto Rico--an "iconic beachfront paradise"--**[days after winning his election and during the longest government shutdown in U.S. history](https://substack.com/redirect/cb9d28af-27f0-4e59-bb17-342ed0c172db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , saying "if Zohran Mamdani is truly serious about helping working families, he wouldn't be jetting off to a luxury resort."
* **Mamdani attending James-hosted reception Thursday:** Mamdani is expected to travel Thursday to attend a cocktail reception hosted by New York Democrat Attorney General Letitia James at the multi-day conference, Fox News reported, which includes receptions, luncheons, policy panels, and ends Saturday with a "Toes in the Sand Beachfront Party."
* **Questions raised about other NY Democrats ' attendance:** Lawler questioned whether Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries, and Gov. Kathy Hochul were also attending, asking "who's looking out for New Yorkers while they're on the beach?" though Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand confirmed she is not attending.
* **Conference attendance amid affordability crisis:** Lawler called the attendance "a disgrace -- and why New Yorkers are leaving this state in droves," demanding reporters ask Democrats "why they're partying in Puerto Rico while New Yorkers are suffering through an affordability crisis and a government shutdown."

* * *
# **Ex-DOJ employee acquitted of sandwich assault**
Sean Charles Dunn, 37, **[was found not guilty](https://substack.com/redirect/e9eaec70-04cf-4a09-8f8c-b67b375076cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Thursday of assaulting a federal employee after throwing a Subway sandwich at Customs and Border Patrol Agent Gregory Lairmore during an August 10 protest against President Trump's surge of federal troops in Washington, DC, with the hoagie captured on viral video "exploding all over" the agent.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e9eaec70-04cf-4a09-8f8c-b67b375076cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Defense argued "harmless gesture" of political speech:** Dunn's lawyers successfully argued the incident was a "harmless gesture" and an exercise of free speech while protesting, seeking to have charges dismissed on grounds he was targeted for protected political expression, after the government failed to secure a grand jury indictment on a felony assault count and downgraded to a misdemeanor.
* **Agent testified about sandwich impact and aftermath:** Lairmore told the jury he could feel the hoagie's impact "through my ballistic vest," describing how it "exploded all over" leaving him smelling "onions and mustard," with onions strewn on his police radio and mustard staining his shirt yellow, while the incident became a joke among co-workers who gifted him a "felony footlong" patch and plush sandwich.
* **Dunn fired and became symbol of Trump opposition:** Dunn, an international affairs specialist in the DOJ's criminal division, was fired following the incident and became a symbol of opposition to Trump's use of federal agents to combat domestic crime, with Attorney General Pam Bondi announcing his arrest and calling him "an example of the Deep State" after he called agents "fascists" and "racists" before launching the sandwich.

* * *

Latino Voters: The Midterms and Beyond - A USC Center for the Political Future Special. With Mike Murphy & Helen Torresl | Season 2025, Episode 36 | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/latinos.vote/podcast-season2025-usc-special-8345287?e=5bd167f239)

|

| |
# **[THE LATINO VOTE NOW ON SUBSTACK!](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=79ea9b53ba&e=5bd167f239)**

|
# [The 2025 Elections: What the Democratic Wave Tells Us About 2026 (And What It Doesn't)](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=6d1c8b89ad&e=5bd167f239)

A Substack exclusive sneak peak of this morning's episode recording!
Chuck and Mike breakdown Tuesday's election results and what it means looking forward to the 2026 midterms.
---
[ ](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=45819f2d65&e=5bd167f239)
|
---
| |
# **[INTRODUCING A SPECIAL PANEL](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=ea029c9c68&e=5bd167f239)**
---
| [ ](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=f4517bf22b&e=5bd167f239 "The Latino Vote Explained: Top Strategists Reveal What Both Parties Get Wrong | USC Panel")
---

_**Latino Voters:
The Midterms and Beyond **_

**A USC Center for the Political Future Special.
With Mike Murphy & Helen Torres**

The Latino Vote Podcast - SPECIAL
| In this special edition of The Latino Vote Podcast, Chuck Rocha and Mike Madrid are joined by **Helen Torres, CEO of Hispanas Organized for Political Equality (HOPE)** , and**Mike Murphy, veteran Republican strategist** , for a dynamic **USC Center for the Political Future panel discussion** on the fastest-growing and most consequential voting bloc in American politics: **The Latino Voter**.

The panel tackles the seismic shifts in Latino voting patterns, from the **historic 22-point collapse in Democratic support** to what this means for the 2026 midterms and beyond. Madrid, Rocha, and Torres dissect why this **isn't a realignment but a "de-alignment"** \- with Latino voters becoming **more anti-party and populist rather than more conservative**.
---
|
---
| | | |
**Today's Headlines:**

[Trump reacts to Democrats' projected election night wins](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=04ef754c75&e=5bd167f239) By: CBS News

[CA Voters Approve Redistricting | GOP Consultant Mike Madrid | Prop. 50 Architect Paul Mitchell | Sacramento Splash Vernal Pools](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=88732eef56&e=5bd167f239) By: Insight With Vicki Gonzalez

[LEFT Sees Big Gains In YOUTH And HISPANIC VOTE In 2025 ELECTION](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=26f760aa2b&e=5bd167f239) By: The Hill

[How key demographic groups voted in 2025, according to the AP Voter Poll](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=b6541ef38c&e=5bd167f239) By: Associated Press

[Dodgers relish World Series win—but owner's ICE ties have fans feeling blue](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=84b26346d2&e=5bd167f239) By: Daily Kos

[Democrats hit back and a winning message - four election night takeaways](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=ed83a1ed33&e=5bd167f239) By: BBC

[Republicans Lost Latino Voters Practically Overnight Thanks to Trump](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=e5f87a5b7d&e=5bd167f239) By: The New Republic

[Exit Polls Show Democrats Making Big Gains With Latino Voters in 2025](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=2a6f0b3c85&e=5bd167f239) By: We are mitu

[North Carolina municipal general elections 2025: How did the Latino candidates fare?](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=d3d592d24d&e=5bd167f239) By: Enlace Latino NC

[A massive shift back': Latino voters overwhelmingly broke for Sherrill on Tuesday](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=c981752584&e=5bd167f239) By: MSNBC

[Latinos Swung Back To Democrats In Tuesday’s Election After Trump’s Historic Gains](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=56f0d8aef8&e=5bd167f239) By: Forbes

[Don’t Celebrate Hate’: Fans Demand Dodgers Refuse Trump Invite](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=384b7fb104&e=5bd167f239) By: Parrivia

[GOP Rep. Warns Republicans Are Losing The Latinos Who Helped Trump Win In The Last Election: 'Wake Up'](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=455a9cfa12&e=5bd167f239) By: The Latin Times

[Can Democrats win back the suburbs?](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=756ec28b15&e=5bd167f239) By: MSNBC

[Democrats had a big night. Here are 5 takeaways from the 2025 elections](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=4613afb204&e=5bd167f239) By: NPR

name: Magsig for State Senate
subject: Magsig Receives Multiple State Senators' Endorsements
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Nathan Magsig for State Senate 2026
body:
Magsig secures endorsements from State Senators Tony Strickland, Rosilicie Ochoa Bogh, Steven Choi, and Kelly Seyarto

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cd796ac43f43/magsig-receives-multiple-state-senators-endorsements?e=6cdbd718cb)
---
|
---
|
---
| |
# Magsig Earns Endorsements from State Senators Tony Strickland, Rosilicie Ochoa Bogh, Steven Choi and Kelly Seyarto
---
|
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** November 6th, 2025Contact: nathan@nathanmagsig.com
---
| | | | | | **Magsig Announces State Senate Endorsements**
**(Clovis, CA)** \- Today, Nathan Magsig announced that he has received the endorsements of State Senator Tony Strickland, State Senator Rosilicie Ochoa Bogh, State Senator Steven Choi and State Senator Kelly Seyarto for his campaign for State Senate.
Magsig released the following statement: _“I am deeply honored to have the support of Senators Strickland, Ochoa Bogh, Choi and Seyarto. They have been tireless advocates for fiscal responsibility, safer communities, and stronger families in California. Their confidence in our campaign is a testament to their belief that I will bring common-sense leadership to Sacramento. I look forward to continuing conversations with Sacramento leaders about our campaign in SD-12._ ”

This announcement follows Magsig’s impressive fundraising total of over $700,000. Senators Strickland, Ochoa Bogh, Choi and Seyarto join a growing list of leaders supporting Magsig’s campaign, including:
Assemblyman David Tangipa, Fresno County Supervisor Buddy Mendes, Fresno County Supervisor Garry Bredefeld, Tulare Supervisor Pete Vander Poel, Tulare Supervisor Dennis Townsend, Fresno County DA Lisa Smittcamp, Fresno County Sheriff John Zanoni, Fresno Mayor Jerry Dyer, Fmr. Fresno Sheriff Margaret Mims, Fresno City Councilman Nick Richardson, Fresno City Councilman Mike Karbassi, Clovis Mayor Pro-Tem Diane Pierce, Clovis Mayor Vong Mouanoutoua, Clovis City Councilman Matt Basgall, Clovis City Councilman Drew Bessinger, Fmr. Sec of State Bill Jones, Kingsburg Mayor Brandon Purcell, Kingsburg Mayor Pro Tem Vince Palomar, Fmr. Kingsburg Mayor Michelle Roman, Richard and Karen Spencer, and dozens of law enforcement organizations, community organizations, and business leaders.

---
| | ###
Nathan Magsig is a current Fresno County Supervisor, former Mayor of Clovis, and is running for the 12th Senate District. His family, wife Julie and their three children, reside in Clovis, CA.
---
|
---
|
---
| | **Follow Nathan**
---

name: Justice Democrats
subject: A wake-up call
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Zohran Mamdani’s momentous win this week capped off a game-changing,
grassroots campaign that shocked the political world — and everyone from
MAGA Republicans to the Democratic establishment is trying to cope.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251106.0JF1Go&refcode=ema20251106-37171&t=1002&akid=37171%2E1203867%2EO5oNIs ]CBS News: Here's what Mamdani's NYC mayoral win, and the rise of a
democratic socialist, could mean for Democrats nationwide

For corporate, do-nothing Democrats, this should be a wake-up call. If
you’re not serving the interests of everyday, working-class people and
taking morally courageous stances like opposing genocide and ending
corporate greed, your time in office is limited. Gone are the days of
settling for mediocrity or the lesser of two evils.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251106.0JF1Go&refcode=ema20251106-37171&t=1003&akid=37171%2E1203867%2EO5oNIs ]The Hill: Mamdani’s win creates opportunities and challenges for the
Democratic Party. Zohran Mamdani’s victory in NYC’s mayoral race
highlights the divide within the Democratic Party and the rise of
progressive...

Out-of-touch politicians can’t just copy Zohran’s creative branding or
social media strategy and expect to win: they need to put working people
before corporate interests and actually stand for something — or get the
hell out of the way.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251106.0JF1Go&refcode=ema20251106-37171&t=1004&akid=37171%2E1203867%2EO5oNIs ]The New Republic: Trump Goes on Bizarre Rant About Zohran Mamdani's
Mayoral Win

Meanwhile, Republicans, billionaires, and lobby groups like AIPAC are
crashing out. Fox News anchor Sean Hannity said he was “literally in
tears” and is urging his rich friends to flee NYC for Florida. Donald
Trump is in meltdown mode, as he and other right-wing extremists keep
trying to scare people with the same old playbook of racist, Islamophobic
attacks. Keep crying, losers!

Clearly, on both sides of the aisle, corporate shills and their megadonors
are afraid of what Zohran and Justice Democrats have proven time and
again: organized people CAN beat organized money.

At Justice Democrats, we know how we can build on the energy from Zohran’s
win by expanding into Congressional Democratic primaries nationwide to
take out the hundreds of Andrew Cuomos of Congress still selling out
voters to the highest bidder.

We’re keeping up the pressure on entrenched politicians in both parties
and using this momentum to launch even more 2026 Democratic primary
challenges, so we can send more candidates like Zohran to fight alongside
our incumbents in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251106.0JF1Go&refcode=em20251106-37171&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1005&akid=37171%2E1203867%2EO5oNIs ]If you’re ready to take the movement the people built in NYC to
Washington for even more progressive victories in next year’s critical
midterm elections, donate $5 to Justice Democrats today.
Every dollar goes to defeating a corporate stooge in Washington.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251106.0JF1Go&refcode=em20251106-37171&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1024&akid=37171%2E1203867%2EO5oNIs ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251106-37171-footer&t=1025&refcode2=37171_1203867_O5oNIs&akid=37171%2E1203867%2EO5oNIs

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=37171%2E1203867%2EO5oNIs

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: EMILYs List
subject: Sign our card for Nancy Pelosi:
body:
We're so proud to have stood by the Speaker Emerita Pelosi throughout her storied career. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118810009/580967603/-404114363?refcode=WUENEK19_20251106_PelosiThankYou_PL_v1s2&sourceid=1057310&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWQxOWI4ZC02YmJiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vKvdVrqdCyRpPVxkCeeIRPUsfi8L_T4kevEX8I1V1H4=&emci=0a63ab86-6bbb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&emdi=45d19b8d-6bbb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&ceid=5177934) Peter,

Today, Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi — the first and only woman to serve as Speaker of the United States House of Representatives, and one of the most powerful Democratic leaders in American history — announced she will not run for reelection once her current term ends.

We are marking this moment with deep gratitude.

For decades, Nancy Pelosi shattered glass ceilings, redefined what leadership looks like, and changed the trajectory of our country for the better. She protected and expanded quality health care. She championed working families. She guided our democracy through moments of profound crisis. And every step of the way, she proved that women belong at the highest levels of power — and lead brilliantly when we get there.

EMILYs List has been proud to stand with her since the beginning. Now, we want to send her a message of appreciation from our entire community. ****[**Will you sign our thank you card to Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi and leave her a personal note?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118810010/580967604/-404114363?refcode=WUENEK19_20251106_PelosiThankYou_PL_v1s2&sourceid=1057310&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWQxOWI4ZC02YmJiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vKvdVrqdCyRpPVxkCeeIRPUsfi8L_T4kevEX8I1V1H4=&emci=0a63ab86-6bbb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&emdi=45d19b8d-6bbb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&ceid=5177934)**** | [ADD YOUR NAME & THANK NANCY PELOSI](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118810011/580967605/-404114363?refcode=WUENEK19_20251106_PelosiThankYou_PL_v1s2&sourceid=1057310&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWQxOWI4ZC02YmJiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vKvdVrqdCyRpPVxkCeeIRPUsfi8L_T4kevEX8I1V1H4=&emci=0a63ab86-6bbb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&emdi=45d19b8d-6bbb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&ceid=5177934)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118810012/580967606/-404114363?refcode=WUENEK19_20251106_PelosiThankYou_PL_v1s2&sourceid=1057310&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWQxOWI4ZC02YmJiLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRkNmYzMzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vKvdVrqdCyRpPVxkCeeIRPUsfi8L_T4kevEX8I1V1H4=&emci=0a63ab86-6bbb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&emdi=45d19b8d-6bbb-f011-8e61-6045bdd6f338&ceid=5177934)
Nancy Pelosi's legacy is lasting, expansive, and deeply felt. She has inspired generations of women to run, lead, govern, and win. As we honor her service, we're also committing to the work ahead: electing the next generation of fierce Democratic pro-choice women who will carry her mantle forward.

Thank you for being part of this community — and for helping us honor a true trailblazer.

With gratitude,

The EMILYs List team

clean_body: We're so proud to have stood by the Speaker Emerita Pelosi throughout her storied career. | Peter, Today, Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi — the first and only woman to serve as Speaker of the United States House of Representatives, and one of the most powerful Democratic leaders in American history — announced she will not run for reelection once her current term ends. We are marking this moment with deep gratitude. For decades, Nancy Pelosi shattered glass ceilings, redefined what leadership looks like, and changed the trajectory of our country for the better. She protected and expanded quality health care. She championed working families. She guided our democracy through moments of profound crisis. And every step of the way, she proved that women belong at the highest levels of power — and lead brilliantly when we get there. EMILYs List has been proud to stand with her since the beginning. Now, we want to send her a message of appreciation from our entire community. **** | Nancy Pelosi's legacy is lasting, expansive, and deeply felt. She has inspired generations of women to run, lead, govern, and win. As we honor her service, we're also committing to the work ahead: electing the next generation of fierce Democratic pro-choice women who will carry her mantle forward. Thank you for being part of this community — and for helping us honor a true trailblazer. With gratitude, The EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded?
